1.2 BMFF data cleaning, QC and PCA
```{r}
#Batch 1

#UKB withdrawn participants
colnames(ukb_withdraw) = "eid"

#Spine - remove NAs, withrawals and SD (voxels) < 3*SD below mean
Spine_BMFF_df = na.omit(spine_BMFF_31748)
mean(Spine_BMFF_df$No.voxels)
sd(Spine_BMFF_df$No.voxels)
Spine_BMFF_df = subset(Spine_BMFF_df, No.voxels >612.057)
Spine_BMFF_df <- Spine_BMFF_df %>%
  filter(!eid %in% ukb_withdraw$eid)

Batch_1_spine_BMFF_df = Spine_BMFF_df

export(Batch_1_spine_BMFF_df, "Batch_1_spine_BMFF_df.csv")

#Femoral head
Femoral_head_BMFF_df = na.omit(head_BMFF_29939)
Femoral_head_BMFF_df = subset(Femoral_head_BMFF_df, No.voxels >=20)
Femoral_head_BMFF_df <- Femoral_head_BMFF_df %>%
  filter(!eid %in% ukb_withdraw$eid)

export(Femoral_head_BMFF_df, "Batch_1_femoral_head_BMFF_df.csv")

#Total hip
Total_hip_BMFF_df = na.omit(totalhip_BMFF_29186)
Total_hip_BMFF_df = subset(Total_hip_BMFF_df, No.voxels >=20)
Total_hip_BMFF_df <- Total_hip_BMFF_df %>%
  filter(!eid %in% ukb_withdraw$eid)

export(Total_hip_BMFF_df, "Batch_1_total_hip_BMFF_df.csv")

#Diaphysis
Diaphysis_BMFF_df = na.omit(diaphysis_BMFF_29358)
Diaphysis_BMFF_df = subset(Diaphysis_BMFF_df, No.voxels >=20)
Diaphysis_BMFF_df <- Diaphysis_BMFF_df %>%
  filter(!eid %in% ukb_withdraw$eid)

export(Diaphysis_BMFF_df, "Batch_1_diaphysis_BMFF_df.csv")

# List of data frames
dfs <- list(Spine_BMFF_df[,c(1,4,8)], Femoral_head_BMFF_df[,c(1,4,8)], Total_hip_BMFF_df[,c(1,4,8)], Diaphysis_BMFF_df[,c(1,4,8)])

# Merging all data frames by 'eid'
BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df <- reduce(dfs, function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "eid"))
colnames(BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df) = c("eid", "Spine_BMFF", "Spine_voxels", "Femoral_head_BMFF", "Femoral_head_voxels", "Total_hip_BMFF", "Total_hip_voxels", "Diaphysis_BMFF", "Diaphysis_voxels")

Batch_1_BMFF_outlier_PCA = prcomp(BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df[,c(2,4,6,8)], scale = TRUE)
Batch_1_BMFF_outlier_PCA_df = data.frame(Batch_1_BMFF_outlier_PCA$x)
Batch_1_BMFF_outlier_PCA_df = Batch_1_BMFF_outlier_PCA_df*-1
BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df = cbind(BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df, Batch_1_BMFF_outlier_PCA_df)

BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% ggplot(aes(x=Spine_BMFF, y=PC2))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_bw()

BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% ggplot(aes(x=Femoral_head_BMFF, y=PC2))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_bw()

BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_bw()

export(BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df, "Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df.csv")
Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df$rt_Spine_BMFF = RankNorm(Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df$Spine_BMFF)
Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df$rt_Femoral_head_BMFF = RankNorm(Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df$Femoral_head_BMFF)
Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df$rt_Total_hip_BMFF = RankNorm(Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df$Total_hip_BMFF)
Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df$rt_Diaphysis_BMFF = RankNorm(Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df$Diaphysis_BMFF)
Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df$rt_PC2 = RankNorm(Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df$PC2)

#Reshape data to long format
long_df <- Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(rt_Spine_BMFF, rt_Diaphysis_BMFF, rt_Femoral_head_BMFF, rt_Total_hip_BMFF),
               names_to = "Measurement",
               values_to = "Value")

BMFF_PC_lm = Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df %>% lm(rt_PC2~rt_Spine_BMFF, data=.)
summary(BMFF_PC_lm)

long_df$Measurement <- factor(long_df$Measurement, levels=c('rt_Spine_BMFF', 'rt_Femoral_head_BMFF', 'rt_Total_hip_BMFF', 'rt_Diaphysis_BMFF'))

#Plot all in one
ggplot(long_df, aes(x = Value, y = rt_PC2)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = Measurement), method = lm) +
  labs(x = "BMFF (normalised)", y = "PC2 (normalised)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 5, b = 5)),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")) +
  theme(legend.title=element_blank())+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("rt_Spine_BMFF" = "red",
                                "rt_Femoral_head_BMFF" = "orange",
                                "rt_Total_hip_BMFF" = "steelblue",
                                "rt_Diaphysis_BMFF" = "#7a384c"), 
                     labels = c("rt_Spine_BMFF" = "Spine BMFF :\nβ = 0.88, R² = 0.78, p<2e-16",
                                "rt_Femoral_head_BMFF" = "Femoral head BMFF :\nβ = -0.22, R² = 0.05, p<2e-16",
                                "rt_Total_hip_BMFF" = "Total hip BMFF :\nβ = -0.15, R² = 0.02, p<2e-16",
                                "rt_Diaphysis_BMFF" = "Diaphysis BMFF :\nβ = -0.16, R² = 0.03, p<2e-16"))


#PCA diagnostic plots
fviz_eig(Batch_1_BMFF_outlier_PCA, addlabels = TRUE)

#Show percentage contribution to PC1 and PC2 on bar plot
BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df = Batch_1_BMFF_outlier_PCA$rotation
BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df = BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df*100
BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df <- as.data.frame(BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df)
BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df = BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df*-1 #Invert PCs so that PC2 reflects a measurement that is positively associated with spine BMFF
BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df$Variable <- rownames(BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df)
BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df$Variable = c("Spine BMFF", "Femoral head BMFF", "Total hip BMFF", "Diaphysis BMFF")

library(reshape2)
BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df <- melt(BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df, id.vars = "Variable", variable.name = "PrincipalComponent", value.name = "Percentage")

subset(BMFF_1_PCA_loading_df, PrincipalComponent == "PC2" | PrincipalComponent == "PC1") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Variable, y = Percentage, fill = PrincipalComponent)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", Percentage)), 
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), 
            fontface = "bold") +
  labs(y = "% Contribution", x = "") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(face = "bold"))

Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df %>% ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2))+
  geom_point()+
  labs(x="PC1 (60.4%)", y="PC2 (21.4%)")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(face="bold"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(face="bold"))+
  theme(legend.text = element_text(face = "bold"))+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"))


#Batch 2
#UKB withdrawn participants
colnames(ukb_withdraw) = "eid"

#Spine - remove NAs, withrawals and SD (voxels) < 3*SD below mean
Spine_BMFF_df = na.omit(spine_BMFF_18920)
mean(Spine_BMFF_df$No.voxels)
sd(Spine_BMFF_df$No.voxels)
Spine_BMFF_df = subset(Spine_BMFF_df, No.voxels >634.3218)
Spine_BMFF_df <- Spine_BMFF_df %>%
  filter(!eid %in% ukb_withdraw$eid)

Batch_2_spine_BMFF_df = Spine_BMFF_df

export(Batch_2_spine_BMFF_df, "Batch_2_spine_BMFF_df.csv")

#Femoral head
Femoral_head_BMFF_df = na.omit(head_BMFF_17522)
Femoral_head_BMFF_df = subset(Femoral_head_BMFF_df, No.voxels >=20)
Femoral_head_BMFF_df <- Femoral_head_BMFF_df %>%
  filter(!eid %in% ukb_withdraw$eid)

export(Femoral_head_BMFF_df, "Batch_2_femoral_head_BMFF_df.csv")

#Total hip
Total_hip_BMFF_df = na.omit(TP_BMFF_18065)
Total_hip_BMFF_df = subset(Total_hip_BMFF_df, No.voxels >=20)
Total_hip_BMFF_df <- Total_hip_BMFF_df %>%
  filter(!eid %in% ukb_withdraw$eid)

export(Total_hip_BMFF_df, "Batch_2_total_hip_BMFF_df.csv")

#Diaphysis
Diaphysis_BMFF_df = na.omit(diaphysis_BMFF_17160)
Diaphysis_BMFF_df = subset(Diaphysis_BMFF_df, No.voxels >=20)
Diaphysis_BMFF_df <- Diaphysis_BMFF_df %>%
  filter(!eid %in% ukb_withdraw$eid)

export(Diaphysis_BMFF_df, "Batch_2_diaphysis_BMFF_df.csv")

# List of data frames
dfs <- list(Spine_BMFF_df[,c(1,4,8)], Femoral_head_BMFF_df[,c(1,4,8)], Total_hip_BMFF_df[,c(1,4,8)], Diaphysis_BMFF_df[,c(1,4,8)])

# Merging all data frames by 'eid'
BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df <- reduce(dfs, function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "eid"))
colnames(BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df) = c("eid", "Spine_BMFF", "Spine_voxels", "Femoral_head_BMFF", "Femoral_head_voxels", "Total_hip_BMFF", "Total_hip_voxels", "Diaphysis_BMFF", "Diaphysis_voxels")

Batch_2_BMFF_outlier_PCA = prcomp(BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df[,c(2,4,6,8)], scale = TRUE)
Batch_2_BMFF_outlier_PCA_df = data.frame(Batch_2_BMFF_outlier_PCA$x)
Batch_2_BMFF_outlier_PCA_df$PC1 = Batch_2_BMFF_outlier_PCA_df$PC1*-1
BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df = cbind(BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df, Batch_2_BMFF_outlier_PCA_df)

BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% ggplot(aes(x=Spine_BMFF, y=PC2))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_bw()

BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_bw()

export(BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df, "Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df.csv")
Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df$rt_Spine_BMFF = RankNorm(Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df$Spine_BMFF)
Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df$rt_Femoral_head_BMFF = RankNorm(Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df$Femoral_head_BMFF)
Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df$rt_Total_hip_BMFF = RankNorm(Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df$Total_hip_BMFF)
Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df$rt_Diaphysis_BMFF = RankNorm(Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df$Diaphysis_BMFF)
Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df$rt_PC2 = RankNorm(Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df$PC2)

#Reshape data to long format
long_df <- Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(rt_Spine_BMFF, rt_Diaphysis_BMFF, rt_Femoral_head_BMFF, rt_Total_hip_BMFF),
               names_to = "Measurement",
               values_to = "Value")

long_df$Measurement <- factor(long_df$Measurement, levels=c('rt_Spine_BMFF', 'rt_Femoral_head_BMFF', 'rt_Total_hip_BMFF', 'rt_Diaphysis_BMFF'))

BMFF_PC_lm = Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df %>% lm(rt_PC2~rt_Diaphysis_BMFF, data=.)
summary(BMFF_PC_lm)

#Plot all in one
ggplot(long_df, aes(x = Value, y = rt_PC2)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = Measurement), method = lm) +
  labs(x = "BMFF (normalised)", y = "PC2 (normalised)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 5, b = 5)),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")) +
  theme(legend.title=element_blank())+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("rt_Spine_BMFF" = "red",
                                "rt_Femoral_head_BMFF" = "orange",
                                "rt_Total_hip_BMFF" = "steelblue",
                                "rt_Diaphysis_BMFF" = "#7a384c"), 
                     labels = c("rt_Spine_BMFF" = "Spine BMFF :\nβ = 0.89, R² = 0.79, p<2e-16",
                                "rt_Femoral_head_BMFF" = "Femoral head BMFF :\nβ = -0.22, R² = 0.05, p<2e-16",
                                "rt_Total_hip_BMFF" = "Total hip BMFF :\nβ = -0.15, R² = 0.02, p<2e-16",
                                "rt_Diaphysis_BMFF" = "Diaphysis BMFF :\nβ = -0.14, R² = 0.02, p<2e-16"))


#PCA diagnostic plots
fviz_eig(Batch_2_BMFF_outlier_PCA, addlabels = TRUE)

#Show percentage contribution to PC1 and PC2 on bar plot
BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df = Batch_2_BMFF_outlier_PCA$rotation
BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df = BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df*100
BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df <- as.data.frame(BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df)
BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df = BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df*-1 #Invert PCs so that PC2 reflects a measurement that is positively associated with spine BMFF
BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df$Variable <- rownames(BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df)
BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df$Variable = c("Spine BMFF", "Femoral head BMFF", "Total hip BMFF", "Diaphysis BMFF")

library(reshape2)
BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df <- melt(BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df, id.vars = "Variable", variable.name = "PrincipalComponent", value.name = "Percentage")

subset(BMFF_2_PCA_loading_df, PrincipalComponent == "PC2" | PrincipalComponent == "PC1") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Variable, y = Percentage, fill = PrincipalComponent)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", Percentage)), 
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), 
            fontface = "bold") +
  labs(y = "% Contribution", x = "") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(face = "bold"))

Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df %>% ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2))+
  geom_point()+
  labs(x="PC1 (58.0%)", y="PC2 (21.8%)")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(face="bold"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(face="bold"))+
  theme(legend.text = element_text(face = "bold"))+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

#Combine the above data frames: Since the PCA for batch 1 and batch 2 produced similar outcomes (see figure x), the two batches were first combined prior to carrying out the PCA. Combining the two batches together prior to PCA also ensures that the PCA is being carried out on the largest possible sample size, which is beneficial for several reasons, including the fact that a larger and more diverse data set allows for more variation to be captured by each principal component whilst reducing the imprecisions of the factor loadings (the correlation between each input variable and principal component) and eigenvalues (the amount of variance explained by each principal component) (10.1515/eko-2016-0014) Furthermore, as the central aim of the current project is to investigate the implications of bone marrow adiposity distribution across the entire cohort of participants (to maximize the statistical power for various downstream analyses), the PCA was performed on the complete data set after joining batches 1 and 2 together. 

BMFF_PCA_df = rbind(Batch_1_BMFF_PCA_df, Batch_2_BMFF_PCA_df)
colnames(BMFF_PCA_df)[c(10,11,12,13)] = c('batch_PC1', 'batch_PC2', 'batch_PC3', 'batch_PC4')

BMFF_PCA = prcomp(BMFF_PCA_df[,c(2,4,6,8)], scale = TRUE)
BMFF_PCA_analysis_df = data.frame(BMFF_PCA$x)
BMFF_PCA_analysis_df = BMFF_PCA_analysis_df*-1 #Invert PCs so that PC2 reflects a measurement that is positively associated with spine BMFF
BMFF_PCA_df = cbind(BMFF_PCA_df, BMFF_PCA_analysis_df)

fviz_eig(BMFF_PCA, addlabels = TRUE)

#Show percentage contribution to PC1 and PC2 on bar plot
BMFF_PCA_loading_df = BMFF_PCA$rotation
BMFF_PCA_loading_df = BMFF_PCA_loading_df*100
BMFF_PCA_loading_df = BMFF_PCA_loading_df*-1
BMFF_PCA_loading_df <- as.data.frame(BMFF_PCA_loading_df)
BMFF_PCA_loading_df$Variable <- rownames(BMFF_PCA_loading_df)
BMFF_PCA_loading_df$Variable = c("Spine BMFF", "Femoral head BMFF", "Total hip BMFF", "Diaphysis BMFF")

library(reshape2)
BMFF_PCA_loading_df <- melt(BMFF_PCA_loading_df, id.vars = "Variable", variable.name = "PrincipalComponent", value.name = "Percentage")

subset(BMFF_PCA_loading_df, PrincipalComponent == "PC2" | PrincipalComponent == "PC1") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Variable, y = Percentage, fill = PrincipalComponent)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", Percentage)), 
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), 
            fontface = "bold") +
  labs(y = "% Contribution", x = "") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(face = "bold"))

BMFF_PCA_df %>% ggplot(aes(x=PC1x, y=PC2x))+
  geom_point()+
  labs(x="PC1 (59.6%)", y="PC2 (21.5%)")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(face="bold"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(face="bold"))+
  theme(legend.text = element_text(face = "bold"))+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

BMFF_PCA_df %>% ggplot(aes(x=Spine_BMFF, y=PC2x))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_bw()

BMFF_PCA_df %>% ggplot(aes(x=Femoral_head_BMFF, y=PC2))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_bw()

BMFF_PCA_df %>% ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2))+
  geom_point()+
  theme_bw()

#Reshape data to long format
export(BMFF_PCA_df, "BMFF_PCA_df.csv")

long_df <- BMFF_PCA_df[,-c(10:13)] %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(rt_Spine_BMFF, rt_Diaphysis_BMFF, rt_Femoral_head_BMFF, rt_Total_hip_BMFF),
               names_to = "Measurement",
               values_to = "Value")

BMFF_PC_lm = BMFF_PCA_df %>% lm(rt_PC2~rt_Diaphysis_BMFF, data=.)
summary(BMFF_PC_lm)

long_df$Measurement <- factor(long_df$Measurement, levels=c('rt_Spine_BMFF', 'rt_Femoral_head_BMFF', 'rt_Total_hip_BMFF', 'rt_Diaphysis_BMFF'))

#Plot all in one
ggplot(long_df, aes(x = Value, y = rt_PC2)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_smooth(aes(color = Measurement), method = lm) +
  labs(x = "BMFF (normalised)", y = "PC2 (normalised)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 5, b = 5)),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")) +
  theme(legend.title=element_blank())+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("rt_Spine_BMFF" = "red",
                                "rt_Femoral_head_BMFF" = "orange",
                                "rt_Total_hip_BMFF" = "steelblue",
                                "rt_Diaphysis_BMFF" = "#7a384c"), 
                     labels = c("rt_Spine_BMFF" = "Spine BMFF :\nβ = 0.88, R² = 0.78, p<2e-16",
                                "rt_Femoral_head_BMFF" = "Femoral head BMFF :\nβ = -0.22, R² = 0.05, p<2e-16",
                                "rt_Total_hip_BMFF" = "Total hip BMFF :\nβ = -0.15, R² = 0.02, p<2e-16",
                                "rt_Diaphysis_BMFF" = "Diaphysis BMFF :\nβ = -0.15, R² = 0.02, p<2e-16"))

#No regression lines - for figure 1 manuscript publication

long_df <- BMFF_PCA_df[,c(14:18)] %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(rt_Spine_BMFF, rt_Diaphysis_BMFF, rt_Femoral_head_BMFF, rt_Total_hip_BMFF),
               names_to = "Measurement",
               values_to = "Value")

ggplot(long_df, aes(x = Value, y = rt_PC2)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, col=long_df$Measurement) +
  labs(x = "BMFF (normalised)", y = "PC2 (normalised)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 5, b = 5)),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")) +
  theme(legend.title=element_blank())

meas_cols <- c(
  'rt_Spine_BMFF'        = 'darkred',
  'rt_Femoral_head_BMFF' = 'darkblue',
  'rt_Total_hip_BMFF'    = 'darkblue',
  'rt_Diaphysis_BMFF'    = 'darkblue'
)

ggplot(long_df, aes(x = Value, y = rt_PC2, color = Measurement)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = meas_cols) +
  labs(x = "BMFF (normalised)", y = "PC2 (normalised)", color = NULL) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.position="none",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold")
  )

#Heatmap/correllelogram
PC2_BMFF_corr_df = BMFF_PCA_df[,c(14:17,23)]
colnames(PC2_BMFF_corr_df) = c("Spine BMFF", "Femoral head BMFF", "Total hip BMFF", "Diaphysis BMFF", "PC2")

#Including PC2

           hc.order = TRUE,
           type = "lower",
           lab = TRUE) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text("r" , face = "bold")
  )

           hc.order = TRUE,
           type = "lower",

  labs(fill = "r") +
  theme(
    text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

autoplot(BMFF_PCA, data = BMFF_PCA_analysis_df, loadings = TRUE,
         loadings.label = TRUE)

  ggplot(aes(x = PC1x, y = PC2x)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_point(data = subset(bio_outliers_BMFF_PCA, Femoral_head_BMFF<60), aes(x = PC1x, y = PC2x), col = 'red', size=3) +
  geom_point(data = subset(bio_outliers_BMFF_PCA, Total_hip_BMFF<60), aes(x = PC1x, y = PC2x), col = 'steelblue', size=3) +
  labs(x = "PC1 (59.6%)", y = "PC2 (21.5%)") +

  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

  ggplot(aes(x = PC1x, y = PC2x)) +
  geom_point(color = "darkgray", alpha = 0.75) +
  labs(x = "PC1 (59.6%)", y = "PC2 (21.5%)") +
  theme_bw() +

    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold")
  )
```

Missingness~sex counts and chi-square forloop 
```{r}
# Required packages
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Input
df <- BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df

# Settings
regions <- c("spine", "femoral_head", "total_hip", "diaphysis")
miss_cols <- paste0("Outlier_flag_", regions)

# Ensure the expected columns exist
miss_cols <- miss_cols[miss_cols %in% names(df)]
if (length(miss_cols) == 0L) stop("No Outlier_flag_* columns found in df.")

# Identify available batch groups
batch_col <- "Batch"
batch_groups <- c("Batch_1", "Batch_2")
if (!(batch_col %in% names(df))) {
  batch_groups <- character(0)
}
# Always include a combined ("All") group
batch_groups <- c(batch_groups, "All")

# Helper to subset by batch group
subset_by_batch <- function(d, batch_group) {
  if (batch_group == "All" || !(batch_col %in% names(d))) return(d)
  d %>% filter(.data[[batch_col]] == batch_group)
}

# Only consider M/F and only values explicitly "Missing" or "Complete"
valid_sexes <- c("M", "F")
valid_levels <- c("Outlier", "Normal")

# Container for results
out_list <- list()
row_id <- 0

for (col in miss_cols) {
  # Derive region from column name (after last underscore)
  region <- sub("^Outlier_flag_", "", col)
  
  for (bg in batch_groups) {
    d_bg <- subset_by_batch(df, bg) %>%
      filter(Sex %in% valid_sexes) %>%
      mutate(.y = as.character(.data[[col]])) %>%
      filter(.y %in% valid_levels)
    
    # Chi-squared test M vs F for Missing vs Complete within this region and batch
    p_val <- NA_real_
    if (nrow(d_bg) > 0) {
      tab <- table(d_bg$Sex, d_bg$.y)
      # Ensure both sexes present and both levels present
      if (all(valid_sexes %in% rownames(tab)) && all(valid_levels %in% colnames(tab))) {
        # Try chisq.test; handle errors (e.g., zero rows/cols)
        chi_res <- try(chisq.test(tab), silent = TRUE)
        if (!inherits(chi_res, "try-error")) {
          p_val <- as.numeric(sprintf("%.3f", chi_res$p.value))
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Counts and % Missing by sex
    for (sx in valid_sexes) {
      d_sx <- d_bg %>% filter(Sex == sx)
      n_missing  <- sum(d_sx$.y == "Outlier", na.rm = TRUE)
      n_complete <- sum(d_sx$.y == "Normal", na.rm = TRUE)
      denom <- n_missing + n_complete
      pct_missing <- if (denom > 0) (n_missing / denom) * 100 else NA_real_
      pct_missing <- if (is.na(pct_missing)) NA_real_ else as.numeric(sprintf("%.3f", pct_missing))
      
      row_id <- row_id + 1
      out_list[[row_id]] <- tibble::tibble(
        region = region,
        batch_group = bg,
        sex = sx,
        Outlier = n_missing,
        Normal = n_complete,
        Outlier_pct = pct_missing,
        chi_sq_p = p_val  # same p-value for both sex rows within region/batch
      )
    }
  }
}

summary_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(out_list) %>%
  arrange(region, batch_group, sex)

summary_df<- summary_df %>%
  mutate("Outlier/Normal" = factor(paste(Outlier, 
                                              "/", 
                                              Normal, 
                                              " (", 
                                              Outlier_pct, 
                                              ")", 
                                              sep = "")))

export(summary_df, 'Outlier_sex_count_df.csv')

# Result:
# summary_df has one row per region x batch_group x sex with:
# - Missing, Complete counts
# - Missing_pct = Missing / (Missing + Complete) * 100 (rounded to 3 decimals)
# - chi_sq_p = chi-square p-value comparing M vs F within the same region and batch_group (rounded to 3 decimals)
#   (repeated for both sex rows in that stratum)
# View first rows:
# head(summary_df)

```


Missingness~anthropometry logistic regressions forloop
```{r}
# Required packages
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)

# Inputs
df <- BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df

# Settings
regions <- c("spine", "femoral_head", "total_hip", "diaphysis")
outcome_types <- c("BMD_missingness", "Outlier_flag")
sex_groups <- c("All", "M", "F")
exposures <- c("Height_first_second_imaging", "Weight_first_second_imaging")

# Helpers ------------------------------------------------------------

subset_by_sex <- function(d, sex) {
  if (sex == "All") return(d)
  d %>% filter(Sex == sex)
}

# Turn outcome into 0/1 with the "event" = Missing for BMD_missingness and Outlier for Outlier_flag (if present)
to_binary <- function(x, outcome_type) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  ux <- unique(na.omit(as.character(x)))
  if (outcome_type == "BMD_missingness") {
    if ("Missing" %in% ux) return(as.integer(x == "Missing"))
    if (all(ux %in% c("0","1"))) return(as.integer(x))
  } else if (outcome_type == "Outlier_flag") {
    if ("Outlier" %in% ux) return(as.integer(x == "Outlier"))
    if (all(ux %in% c("0","1"))) return(as.integer(x))
    if ("Yes" %in% ux) return(as.integer(x == "Yes"))
  }
  if (any(grepl("^1$", ux))) return(as.integer(x))
  stop(paste0("Could not coerce outcome to binary 0/1 for outcome_type = ", outcome_type,
              ". Values: ", paste(head(ux, 5), collapse = ", ")))
}

# FIX: Avoid rename() entirely (which may be masked by plyr), set names directly
count_levels <- function(vec) {
  tt <- as.data.frame(table(vec, useNA = "no"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (nrow(tt) == 0) {
    return(tibble(level = character(0), n = integer(0)))
  }
  value_col <- setdiff(names(tt), "Freq")[1]
  names(tt)[names(tt) == value_col] <- "level"
  names(tt)[names(tt) == "Freq"] <- "n"
  tt$level <- as.character(tt$level)
  tibble::as_tibble(tt)
}

# Fit logistic regression y ~ exposure, return OR, 95% CI, p-value
fit_logit <- function(dat, y_bin, exposure) {
  keep <- complete.cases(y_bin, dat[[exposure]])
  y <- y_bin[keep]
  x <- dat[[exposure]][keep]
  if (length(unique(y)) < 2L) {
    return(list(OR = NA_real_, lcl = NA_real_, ucl = NA_real_, p = NA_real_, n = length(y)))
  }
  fit <- try(glm(y ~ x, family = binomial()), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(fit, "try-error")) {
    return(list(OR = NA_real_, lcl = NA_real_, ucl = NA_real_, p = NA_real_, n = sum(keep)))
  }
  sm <- summary(fit)$coefficients
  if (!("x" %in% rownames(sm))) {
    return(list(OR = NA_real_, lcl = NA_real_, ucl = NA_real_, p = NA_real_, n = sum(keep)))
  }
  beta <- sm["x", "Estimate"]
  se <- sm["x", "Std. Error"]
  pval <- sm["x", "Pr(>|z|)"]
  lcl_b <- beta - 1.96 * se
  ucl_b <- beta + 1.96 * se
  list(
    OR = exp(beta),
    lcl = exp(lcl_b),
    ucl = exp(ucl_b),
    p = pval,
    n = sum(keep)
  )
}

# Main loops ---------------------------------------------------------

# Collect counts (per region/outcome/sex with all levels wide)
counts_list <- list()
# Collect regression rows
reg_rows <- list()

row_id <- 0
count_id <- 0

for (outcome_type in outcome_types) {
  for (region in regions) {
    outcome_col <- paste0(outcome_type, "_", region)
    if (!(outcome_col %in% names(df))) next
    
    for (sex in sex_groups) {
      d_sex <- subset_by_sex(df, sex)
      
      # Counts on original values
      lvl_counts <- count_levels(d_sex[[outcome_col]])
      if (nrow(lvl_counts) == 0) {
        counts_wide <- tibble()
      } else {
        counts_wide <- lvl_counts %>%
          mutate(level_col = paste0("Count_", make.names(level))) %>%
          select(level_col, n) %>%
          pivot_wider(names_from = level_col, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)
      }
      count_id <- count_id + 1
      counts_list[[count_id]] <- tibble(
        outcome_type = outcome_type,
        region = region,
        outcome_col = outcome_col,
        sex_group = sex
      ) %>%
        bind_cols(counts_wide)
      
      # Prepare binary outcome
      y_bin <- try(to_binary(d_sex[[outcome_col]], outcome_type = outcome_type), silent = TRUE)
      if (inherits(y_bin, "try-error")) {
        for (exposure in exposures) {
          row_id <- row_id + 1
          reg_rows[[row_id]] <- tibble(
            outcome_type = outcome_type,
            region = region,
            outcome_col = outcome_col,
            sex_group = sex,
            exposure = exposure,
            OR_95CI = NA_character_,
            p_value = NA_real_,
            N_model = NA_integer_
          )
        }
        next
      }
      
      # Fit models for each exposure
      for (exposure in exposures) {
        if (!(exposure %in% names(d_sex))) {
          row_id <- row_id + 1
          reg_rows[[row_id]] <- tibble(
            outcome_type = outcome_type,
            region = region,
            outcome_col = outcome_col,
            sex_group = sex,
            exposure = exposure,
            OR_95CI = NA_character_,
            p_value = NA_real_,
            N_model = NA_integer_
          )
          next
        }
        fit_res <- fit_logit(d_sex, y_bin, exposure)
        OR <- fit_res$OR
        lcl <- fit_res$lcl
        ucl <- fit_res$ucl
        p  <- fit_res$p
        n_model <- fit_res$n
        
        OR_str <- if (is.na(OR)) NA_character_ else {
          paste0(
            sprintf("%.3f", OR),
            " (", sprintf("%.3f", lcl), ", ", sprintf("%.3f", ucl), ")"
          )
        }
        p_str <- if (is.na(p)) NA_real_ else as.numeric(sprintf("%.3f", p))
        
        row_id <- row_id + 1
        reg_rows[[row_id]] <- tibble(
          outcome_type = outcome_type,
          region = region,
          outcome_col = outcome_col,
          sex_group = sex,
          exposure = exposure,
          OR_95CI = OR_str,
          p_value = p_str,
          N_model = n_model
        )
      }
    }
  }
}

counts_df <- bind_rows(counts_list) %>%
  arrange(outcome_type, region, sex_group)

logit_results_df <- bind_rows(reg_rows) %>%
  arrange(outcome_type, region, sex_group, exposure)

# Merge counts into regression rows so counts and logistic results align by region/outcome/sex
final_results <- logit_results_df %>%
  left_join(counts_df, by = c("outcome_type", "region", "outcome_col", "sex_group")) %>%
  relocate(outcome_type, region, outcome_col, sex_group, exposure)

final_results<- final_results %>%
  mutate("Outlier/Normal" = factor(paste(Count_Outlier, 
                                              "/", 
                                              Normal, 
                                              ")", 
                                              sep = "")))

# head(counts_df)
# head(logit_results_df)
# head(final_results)

export(final_results, 'missingess_outlier_batch_2_df.csv')

```


Find height threshold that predicts missingness and outliers in males - RCS

RCS plots for missingness and voxel outlier height and weight regressions
```{r}
# Packages
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(rms)

# DATA PREP -------------------------------------------------------------------
dfM <- BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>%
  filter(Sex == "F") %>%
  select(Outlier_flag_spine, Height_first_second_imaging) %>%
  mutate(
    y = ifelse(Outlier_flag_spine == "Outlier", 1L, 0L),
    height = as.numeric(Height_first_second_imaging)
  )

# rms requires datadist built on the analysis data
dd <- datadist(dfM)
options(datadist = "dd")

# KNOTS: regular intervals between 5th and 95th percentiles -------------------
# Using specified quantiles as knot locations (including boundary knots)
height_knots <- as.numeric(quantile(dfM$height, c(.05, .25, .50, .75, .95), na.rm = TRUE))

# FIT: Logistic model with RCS via rms::lrm -----------------------------------
fit <- lrm(y ~ rcs(height, parms = height_knots), data = dfM, x = TRUE, y = TRUE)

# Model summaries
fit
print(summary(fit))
print(anova(fit))

# PREDICTION: OR curve with 95% CI using rms::Predict -------------------------
# ref.zero = TRUE centers predictions at the reference values from datadist - yields odds ratios relative to that median height -> OR relative to median height

h_min <- 37 #Height: median - 3*IQR: F= 137 , M = 150. Weight: minimum (impossible 3IQR): F= 37 , M = 46.
h_max <- 169 #Height: median + 3*IQR: F = 191 , M = 204. Weight: maximum (3IQR too far from max, unlike height) + 3*IQR: F= 169 , M = 167.

pred_full <- Predict(fit,
                     height = seq(h_min, h_max, length.out = 10000),
                     ref.zero = FALSE,
                     fun = exp)

pred_df <- as.data.frame(pred_full)

pred_df_M <- pred_df %>%
  mutate(
    OR    = exp(yhat),
    CI_lo = exp(lower),
    CI_hi = exp(upper)
  )
pred_df_M$Sex='M'

pred_df_F <- pred_df %>%
  mutate(
    OR    = exp(yhat),
    CI_lo = exp(lower),
    CI_hi = exp(upper)
  )
pred_df_F$Sex='F'

plot_df = rbind(pred_df_M, pred_df_F)

#Plot

# PLOT ------------------------------------------------------------------------
plot_df %>% ggplot(aes(x = height, y = OR)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = CI_lo, ymax = CI_hi, fill = Sex), alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(color = Sex), size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    x = "Weight (kg)",
    #y = "Odds (95% CI) of missing \n spine BMFF data")+
    y = "Odds (95% CI) of spine \n voxel outliers")+
  theme_bw()+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 49, linetype = "dotted", color = "#0075B2")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 65, linetype = "dotted", color = "#0075B2")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 81, linetype = "dashed", color = "#0075B2")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 97, linetype = "dotted", color = "#0075B2")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 113, linetype = "dotted", color = "#0075B2")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 129, linetype = "dotted", color = "#0075B2")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 167, linetype = "dotted", color = "#0075B2")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 37, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkred")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 50, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkred")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 66, linetype = "dashed", color = "darkred")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 82, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkred")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 98, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkred")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 114, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkred")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 169, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkred")+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("M" = "#0075B2",
                                "F" = "darkred"), 
                     labels = c("M" = "Male",
                                "F" = "Female"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("M" = "#0075B2",
                                "F" = "darkred"), 
                     labels = c("M" = "Male",
                                "F" = "Female"))+
    theme(
    axis.title  = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", lineheight = 0.8),
    legend.key.height = unit(2, "lines"))
    #scale_y_break(c(10, 20), scales=2)

# install.packages("ggtext") # if needed
library(ggtext)

# Numeric heights
male_heights_num   <- c(150, 159, 168, 177, 186, 195, 204)
female_heights_num <- c(137, 146, 155, 164, 173, 182, 191)

# Labels (text you want to show for each numeric height)
male_labels <- c(
  "150 (median - 3×IQR)", "159 (median - 2×IQR)", "168 (median - IQR)",
  "177 (median)", "186 (median + IQR)", "195 (median + 2×IQR)", "204 (median + 3×IQR)"
)
female_labels <- c(
  "137 (median - 3×IQR)", "146 (median - 2×IQR)", "155 (median - IQR)",
  "164 (median)", "173 (median + IQR)", "182 (median + 2×IQR)", "191 (median + 3×IQR)"
)

# Build breaks and HTML-colored labels
all_heights <- c(male_heights_num, female_heights_num)
all_labels  <- c(male_labels,      female_labels)
all_colors  <- c(rep("#0075B2", length(male_heights_num)),
                 rep("darkred",  length(female_heights_num)))

# Map numeric breaks -> colored HTML labels
breaks_vec <- sort(unique(all_heights))
label_map <- setNames(
  paste0("<span style='color:", all_colors, "'>", all_labels, "</span>"),
  as.character(all_heights)
)
labels_vec <- label_map[as.character(breaks_vec)]

p = plot_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = height, y = OR)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = CI_lo, ymax = CI_hi, fill = Sex), alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(color = Sex), size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    x = "Height (cm)",
    y = "Odds (95% CI) of missing \n femoral head BMFF data"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  # Vertical lines
  geom_vline(xintercept = male_heights_num,   linetype = "dotted", color = "#0075B2") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 177,                linetype = "dashed", color = "#0075B2") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = female_heights_num, linetype = "dotted", color = "darkred") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 164,                linetype = "dashed", color = "darkred") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("M" = "#0075B2", "F" = "darkred"),
    labels = c("M" = "Male", "F" = "Female")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("M" = "#0075B2", "F" = "darkred"),
    labels = c("M" = "Male", "F" = "Female")
  ) +
  # Colored, angled tick labels at the specified numeric heights
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = breaks_vec, labels = labels_vec) +
  theme(
    axis.title   = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x  = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 30, face = "bold",
                                            angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold", lineheight = 0.8),
    legend.key.height = unit(2, "lines")
  )

ggsave(filename = "Height_FH_missingness_plot.png", plot = p, device = "png", width = 30, height = 20)

dfM %>% ggplot(aes(x=Weight_first_second_imaging))+
  geom_density()
```

Height regressions
```{r}
library(rms)

#Missing data

# DATA PREP -------------------------------------------------------------------
dfM <- BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>%
  filter(Sex == "M") %>%
  select(BMD_missingness_spine, Weight_first_second_imaging) %>%
  mutate(
    y = ifelse(BMD_missingness_spine == "Missing", 1L, 0L),
    height = as.numeric(Weight_first_second_imaging)
  )

# rms requires datadist built on the analysis data
dd <- datadist(dfM)
options(datadist = "dd")

# KNOTS: regular intervals between 5th and 95th percentiles -------------------
# Using specified quantiles as knot locations (including boundary knots)
height_knots <- as.numeric(quantile(dfM$height, c(.05, .25, .50, .75, .95), na.rm = TRUE))

# FIT: Logistic model with RCS via rms::lrm -----------------------------------
fit <- lrm(y ~ rcs(height, parms = height_knots), data = dfM, x = TRUE, y = TRUE)
print(summary(fit)) #Extract OR (95% CI) from here
print(anova(fit)) #Extract p-value for the exposure (height in this case) and the p-value for non-linearity ('Nonlinear') from here

Z=-0.89998/0.19393
p_value = 2*pnorm(abs(Z), lower.tail=F)
p_value

# IQR and median of height
h_med <- median(dfM$height, na.rm = TRUE)
iqr_h <- IQR(dfM$height, na.rm = TRUE)

#Run >3IQR-maxmimum manually
thr  <- h_med + 3 * iqr_h
wmax <- max(dfM$height, na.rm = TRUE)

or_from_med_plus_3iqr <- Predict(fit, height = c(h_med, wmax), ref.zero = TRUE, fun = exp)
or_from_med_plus_3iqr
SE=(log(or_from_med_plus_3iqr$upper)-log(or_from_med_plus_3iqr$lower))/(2*1.96)
yhat = or_from_med_plus_3iqr$yhat
Z=log(yhat)/SE
p_value = 2*pnorm(abs(Z), lower.tail=F)
p_value

# A) OR for a -1 IQR increase from the median: median -> median - xIQR
# Using Predict (ref.zero centers at median, so this is just the OR at h_med + IQR)
or_from_med_minus_iqr <- Predict(fit, height = h_med - iqr_h, ref.zero = TRUE, fun = exp) #Same as: Predict(fit, height = c(h_med, h_med - iqr_h), ref.zero = TRUE, fun = exp)
or_from_med_minus_iqr 
SE=(log(or_from_med_minus_iqr$upper)-log(or_from_med_minus_iqr$lower))/(2*1.96)
yhat = or_from_med_minus_iqr$yhat
Z=log(yhat)/SE
p_value = 2*pnorm(abs(Z), lower.tail=F)

or_from_med_minus_2iqr

yhat = or_from_med_minus_2iqr$yhat
Z=log(yhat)/SE

or_from_med_minus_3iqr 
SE=(log(or_from_med_minus_3iqr$upper)-log(or_from_med_minus_3iqr$lower))/(2*1.96)
yhat = or_from_med_minus_3iqr$yhat
Z=log(yhat)/SE
p_value = 2*pnorm(abs(Z), lower.tail=F)

# B) OR for a -1 IQR increase from the median: median -> median + xIQR

or_from_med_plus_iqr 
SE=(log(or_from_med_plus_iqr$upper)-log(or_from_med_plus_iqr$lower))/(2*1.96)
yhat = or_from_med_plus_iqr$yhat
Z=log(yhat)/SE
p_value = 2*pnorm(abs(Z), lower.tail=F)

or_from_med_plus_2iqr 
SE=(log(or_from_med_plus_2iqr$upper)-log(or_from_med_plus_2iqr$lower))/(2*1.96)
yhat = or_from_med_plus_2iqr$yhat
Z=log(yhat)/SE

yhat = or_from_med_plus_3iqr$yhat
Z=log(yhat)/SE
p_value = 2*pnorm(abs(Z), lower.tail=F)

or_from_med_minus_3iqr 

# B) OR for a -1 IQR increase from the median: median -> median + xIQR

or_from_med_plus_iqr 
SE=(log(or_from_med_plus_iqr$upper)-log(or_from_med_plus_iqr$lower))/(2*1.96)
yhat = or_from_med_plus_iqr$yhat
Z=log(yhat)/SE
p_value = 2*pnorm(abs(Z), lower.tail=F)
```

```{r}
library(rms)

#Missing data

# DATA PREP -------------------------------------------------------------------
dfM <- BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>%
  filter(Sex == "F") %>%
  select(BMD_missingness_femoral_head, Weight_first_second_imaging) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(

#Voxel outliers

# DATA PREP -------------------------------------------------------------------

  filter(Sex == "F") %>%

  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(

# KNOTS: regular intervals between 5th and 95th percentiles -------------------

# FIT: Logistic model with RCS via rms::lrm -----------------------------------
fit <- lrm(y ~ rcs(weight, parms = weight_knots), data = dfM, x = TRUE, y = TRUE)
print(summary(fit))
print(anova(fit))

# IQR and median of weight
h_med <- median(dfM$weight, na.rm = TRUE)
iqr_h <- IQR(dfM$weight, na.rm = TRUE)

# A) OR for a -1 IQR increase from the median: median -> median - xIQR
# Using Predict (ref.zero centers at median, so this is just the OR at h_med + IQR)

or_from_med_minus_2iqr <- Predict(fit, weight = h_med - 2*iqr_h, ref.zero = TRUE, fun = exp)
or_from_med_minus_2iqr 

or_from_med_minus_3iqr <- Predict(fit, weight = h_med - 3*iqr_h, ref.zero = TRUE, fun = exp)
or_from_med_minus_3iqr 

# B) OR for a +1 IQR increase from the median: median -> median + xIQR
# Using Predict (ref.zero centers at median, so this is just the OR at h_med + IQR)
or_from_med_plus_iqr <- Predict(fit, weight = h_med + iqr_h, ref.zero = TRUE, fun = exp)
or_from_med_plus_iqr 

or_from_med_plus_2iqr <- Predict(fit, weight = h_med + 2*iqr_h, ref.zero = TRUE, fun = exp)
or_from_med_plus_2iqr 

or_from_med_plus_3iqr <- Predict(fit, weight = h_med + 3*iqr_h, ref.zero = TRUE, fun = exp)
or_from_med_plus_3iqr 

#Run >3IQR-maxmimum manually
thr  <- h_med + 3 * iqr_h
wmax <- max(dfM$weight, na.rm = TRUE)

or_from_med_plus_3iqr <- Predict(fit, weight = c(h_med, wmax), ref.zero = TRUE, fun = exp)
or_from_med_plus_3iqr

```


Forloop height and weight missingness/outlier IQR-stratified rcs regressions
```{r}
#Count number of missing/outliers for the whole data frame and for each IQR strata (separately in males and females)

# R code to count Missing/Complete and Outlier/Normal by skeletal region and sex,
# overall and within IQR-stratified height and weight ranges.

# Inputs you may need to adjust:
df <- BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df        # your data frame
height_col <- "Height_first_second_imaging"                  # replace with your height column name
weight_col <- "Weight_first_second_imaging"                  # replace with your weight column name

regions <- c("spine", "femoral_head", "total_hip", "diaphysis")
bmd_prefix <- "BMD_missingness_"
out_prefix <- "Outlier_flag_"
sex_levels <- c("M", "F")

# Helper to ensure a count vector has all desired levels (including zeros)
ensure_levels <- function(x, levels_needed) {
  x <- factor(x, levels = levels_needed)
  tab <- table(x, useNA = "no")
  # Coerce to named integer vector with all levels
  out <- setNames(integer(length(levels_needed)), levels_needed)
  out[names(tab)] <- as.integer(tab)
  out
}

# Build IQR-based bins around the median
# For height: (-Inf, m-3IQR], (m-3IQR, m-2IQR], (m-2IQR, m-1IQR], (m-1IQR, m+1IQR],
#              (m+1IQR, m+2IQR], (m+2IQR, m+3IQR]
# For weight: same plus (m+3IQR, Inf]
make_iqr_bins <- function(x, add_upper_inf = FALSE) {
  m <- suppressWarnings(stats::median(x, na.rm = TRUE))
  iqr <- suppressWarnings(stats::IQR(x, na.rm = TRUE, type = 7))
  # Handle degenerate case where IQR is 0 or NA
  if (is.na(iqr) || iqr == 0) {
    bins <- factor(rep("All", length(x)), levels = "All")
    return(list(bins = bins, labels = "All"))
  }
  cuts <- c(m - 3 * iqr, m - 2 * iqr, m - 1 * iqr, m + 1 * iqr, m + 2 * iqr, m + 3 * iqr)
  if (add_upper_inf) {
    breaks <- c(-Inf, cuts, Inf)
    labels <- c("<= m-3*IQR",
                "(m-3*IQR, m-2*IQR]",
                "(m-2*IQR, m-1*IQR]",
                "(m-1*IQR, m+1*IQR]",
                "(m+1*IQR, m+2*IQR]",
                "(m+2*IQR, m+3*IQR]",
                "(m+3*IQR, max]")
  } else {
    breaks <- c(-Inf, cuts)  # last bin ends at m+3*IQR
    labels <- c("<= m-3*IQR",
                "(m-3*IQR, m-2*IQR]",
                "(m-2*IQR, m-1*IQR]",
                "(m-1*IQR, m+1*IQR]",
                "(m+1*IQR, m+2*IQR]",
                "(m+2*IQR, m+3*IQR]")
  }
  bins <- cut(x, breaks = breaks, labels = labels, right = TRUE, include.lowest = TRUE)
  list(bins = bins, labels = labels)
}

# Prepare bins for height and weight once
h_bin_obj <- make_iqr_bins(df[[height_col]], add_upper_inf = FALSE)
w_bin_obj <- make_iqr_bins(df[[weight_col]], add_upper_inf = TRUE)

height_bins <- h_bin_obj$bins
weight_bins <- w_bin_obj$bins

# Output collector
results <- list()

# Desired levels for each flag
bmd_levels <- c("Missing", "Complete")
out_levels <- c("Outlier", "Normal")

row_id <- 1L

for (region in regions) {
  bmd_col <- paste0(bmd_prefix, region)
  out_col <- paste0(out_prefix, region)

  # Skip region if columns don't exist
  if (!(bmd_col %in% names(df))) {
    warning(sprintf("Column %s not found; skipping region %s for BMD_missingness.", bmd_col, region))
  }
  if (!(out_col %in% names(df))) {
    warning(sprintf("Column %s not found; skipping region %s for Outlier_flag.", out_col, region))
  }

  for (sex_val in sex_levels) {
    df_sex <- df[df$Sex == sex_val & !is.na(df$Sex), , drop = FALSE]
    h_bins_sex <- height_bins[df$Sex == sex_val & !is.na(df$Sex)]
    w_bins_sex <- weight_bins[df$Sex == sex_val & !is.na(df$Sex)]

    # Overall (no stratification)
    if (bmd_col %in% names(df_sex)) {
      cnt <- ensure_levels(df_sex[[bmd_col]], bmd_levels)
      for (k in seq_along(cnt)) {
        results[[row_id]] <- data.frame(
          measure = "BMD_missingness",
          region = region,
          category = names(cnt)[k],
          Sex = sex_val,
          stratum_type = "overall",
          stratum_label = "overall",
          n = unname(cnt[k]),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
        row_id <- row_id + 1L
      }
    }
    if (out_col %in% names(df_sex)) {
      cnt <- ensure_levels(df_sex[[out_col]], out_levels)
      for (k in seq_along(cnt)) {
        results[[row_id]] <- data.frame(
          measure = "Outlier_flag",
          region = region,
          category = names(cnt)[k],
          Sex = sex_val,
          stratum_type = "overall",
          stratum_label = "overall",
          n = unname(cnt[k]),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
        row_id <- row_id + 1L
      }
    }

    # Height-stratified
    if (length(unique(na.omit(h_bins_sex))) == 1L && unique(na.omit(h_bins_sex)) == "All") {
      # Degenerate case: one bin
      height_levels <- "All"
    } else {
      height_levels <- levels(height_bins)
    }

    for (h_lab in height_levels) {
      idx <- which(h_bins_sex == h_lab & !is.na(h_bins_sex))
      if (length(idx) == 0) {
        # Still record zeros for completeness
        if (bmd_col %in% names(df_sex)) {
          for (cat in bmd_levels) {
            results[[row_id]] <- data.frame(
              measure = "BMD_missingness",
              region = region,
              category = cat,
              Sex = sex_val,
              stratum_type = "height",
              stratum_label = h_lab,
              n = 0L,
              stringsAsFactors = FALSE
            )
            row_id <- row_id + 1L
          }
        }
        if (out_col %in% names(df_sex)) {
          for (cat in out_levels) {
            results[[row_id]] <- data.frame(
              measure = "Outlier_flag",
              region = region,
              category = cat,
              Sex = sex_val,
              stratum_type = "height",
              stratum_label = h_lab,
              n = 0L,
              stringsAsFactors = FALSE
            )
            row_id <- row_id + 1L
          }
        }
        next
      }
      sub_bmd <- if (bmd_col %in% names(df_sex)) df_sex[[bmd_col]][idx] else NULL
      sub_out <- if (out_col %in% names(df_sex)) df_sex[[out_col]][idx] else NULL

      if (!is.null(sub_bmd)) {
        cnt <- ensure_levels(sub_bmd, bmd_levels)
        for (k in seq_along(cnt)) {
          results[[row_id]] <- data.frame(
            measure = "BMD_missingness",
            region = region,
            category = names(cnt)[k],
            Sex = sex_val,
            stratum_type = "height",
            stratum_label = h_lab,
            n = unname(cnt[k]),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
          row_id <- row_id + 1L
        }
      }
      if (!is.null(sub_out)) {
        cnt <- ensure_levels(sub_out, out_levels)
        for (k in seq_along(cnt)) {
          results[[row_id]] <- data.frame(
            measure = "Outlier_flag",
            region = region,
            category = names(cnt)[k],
            Sex = sex_val,
            stratum_type = "height",
            stratum_label = h_lab,
            n = unname(cnt[k]),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
          row_id <- row_id + 1L
        }
      }
    }

    # Weight-stratified
    if (length(unique(na.omit(w_bins_sex))) == 1L && unique(na.omit(w_bins_sex)) == "All") {
      weight_levels <- "All"
    } else {
      weight_levels <- levels(weight_bins)
    }

    for (w_lab in weight_levels) {
      idx <- which(w_bins_sex == w_lab & !is.na(w_bins_sex))
      if (length(idx) == 0) {
        if (bmd_col %in% names(df_sex)) {
          for (cat in bmd_levels) {
            results[[row_id]] <- data.frame(
              measure = "BMD_missingness",
              region = region,
              category = cat,
              Sex = sex_val,
              stratum_type = "weight",
              stratum_label = w_lab,
              n = 0L,
              stringsAsFactors = FALSE
            )
            row_id <- row_id + 1L
          }
        }
        if (out_col %in% names(df_sex)) {
          for (cat in out_levels) {
            results[[row_id]] <- data.frame(
              measure = "Outlier_flag",
              region = region,
              category = cat,
              Sex = sex_val,
              stratum_type = "weight",
              stratum_label = w_lab,
              n = 0L,
              stringsAsFactors = FALSE
            )
            row_id <- row_id + 1L
          }
        }
        next
      }
      sub_bmd <- if (bmd_col %in% names(df_sex)) df_sex[[bmd_col]][idx] else NULL
      sub_out <- if (out_col %in% names(df_sex)) df_sex[[out_col]][idx] else NULL

      if (!is.null(sub_bmd)) {
        cnt <- ensure_levels(sub_bmd, bmd_levels)
        for (k in seq_along(cnt)) {
          results[[row_id]] <- data.frame(
            measure = "BMD_missingness",
            region = region,
            category = names(cnt)[k],
            Sex = sex_val,
            stratum_type = "weight",
            stratum_label = w_lab,
            n = unname(cnt[k]),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
          row_id <- row_id + 1L
        }
      }
      if (!is.null(sub_out)) {
        cnt <- ensure_levels(sub_out, out_levels)
        for (k in seq_along(cnt)) {
          results[[row_id]] <- data.frame(
            measure = "Outlier_flag",
            region = region,
            category = names(cnt)[k],
            Sex = sex_val,
            stratum_type = "weight",
            stratum_label = w_lab,
            n = unname(cnt[k]),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
          row_id <- row_id + 1L
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

counts_df <- do.call(rbind, results)
row.names(counts_df) <- NULL

# counts_df contains rows like:
# measure: "BMD_missingness" or "Outlier_flag"
# region: skeletal region
# category: "Missing"/"Complete" or "Outlier"/"Normal"
# Sex: "M" or "F"
# stratum_type: "overall", "height", or "weight"
# stratum_label: label of the bin (or "overall")
# n: count

counts_df

#Positive control 
h_med <- median(BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df$Height_first_second_imaging , na.rm = TRUE)
iqr_h <- IQR(BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df$Height_first_second_imaging, na.rm = TRUE)

BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% subset(Sex=='F') %>% filter(Height_first_second_imaging>=h_med-3*iqr_h&Height_first_second_imaging<h_med-2*iqr_h) %>% count(BMD_missingness_spine)
BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% subset(Sex=='F') %>% filter(Height_first_second_imaging>=h_med-2*iqr_h&Height_first_second_imaging<h_med-1*iqr_h) %>% count(BMD_missingness_spine)
BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% subset(Sex=='F') %>% filter(Height_first_second_imaging>=h_med-1*iqr_h&Height_first_second_imaging<=h_med) %>% count(BMD_missingness_spine)
BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% subset(Sex=='F') %>% filter(Height_first_second_imaging>=h_med&Height_first_second_imaging<=h_med+1*iqr_h) %>% count(BMD_missingness_spine)
BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% subset(Sex=='F') %>% filter(Height_first_second_imaging>h_med+1*iqr_h&Height_first_second_imaging<=h_med+2*iqr_h) %>% count(BMD_missingness_spine)
BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% subset(Sex=='F') %>% filter(Height_first_second_imaging>h_med+2*iqr_h&Height_first_second_imaging<=h_med+3*iqr_h) %>% count(BMD_missingness_spine)

# Packages
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(rms)

# Helper: safely register datadist in the global environment so rms::Predict can find it
.set_dd_global <- function(df, name = "dd_rms_tmp") {
  old_opt <- getOption("datadist", default = NULL)
  old_obj <- if (exists(name, envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)) {
    get(name, envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)
  } else NULL

  assign(name, datadist(df), envir = .GlobalEnv)
  options(datadist = name)

  function() {
    if (is.null(old_opt)) options(datadist = NULL) else options(datadist = old_opt)
    if (exists(name, envir = .GlobalEnv, inherits = FALSE)) rm(list = name, envir = .GlobalEnv)
    if (!is.null(old_obj)) assign(name, old_obj, envir = .GlobalEnv)
  }
}

# Extract model-level p-values from anova.lrm robustly
.get_model_pvals <- function(a, varname = "expo") {
  rn <- rownames(a)
  p_overall <- tryCatch({
    if (varname %in% rn) a[varname, "P"] else {
      idx <- grep(paste0("^", varname, "(\\s|$)"), rn)
      if (length(idx)) a[idx[1], "P"] else NA_real_
    }
  }, error = function(e) NA_real_)

  p_nl <- tryCatch({
    # rms typically uses a separate "Nonlinear" row
    if ("Nonlinear" %in% rn) a["Nonlinear", "P"] else {
      idx <- grep("Nonlinear", rn, ignore.case = TRUE)
      if (length(idx)) a[idx[1], "P"] else NA_real_
    }
  }, error = function(e) NA_real_)

  list(p_overall_model = as.numeric(p_overall),
       p_nonlinear_model = as.numeric(p_nl))
}

# Fit one model and extract rows matching your manual code exactly
fit_one <- function(dat, outcome_var, positive_value, exposure_var,
                    site, sex_label) {
  # Build analysis data
  df <- dat %>%
    select(all_of(c(outcome_var, exposure_var))) %>%
    drop_na() %>%
    mutate(
      y    = as.integer(.data[[outcome_var]] == positive_value),
      expo = as.numeric(.data[[exposure_var]])
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(expo))

  n <- nrow(df)
  if (n < 30 || length(unique(df$expo)) < 5 || length(unique(df$y)) < 2) {
    # Return NA rows for all contrasts to keep table complete
    contrasts <- c("median-3*IQR","median-2*IQR","median-1*IQR",
                   "median+1*IQR","median+2*IQR","median+3*IQR")
    return(tibble(
      site = site,
      sex = sex_label,
      outcome_type = ifelse(grepl("Outlier", outcome_var), "Outlier", "Missing"),
      exposure_name = ifelse(grepl("Height", exposure_var), "Height", "Weight"),
      contrast = factor(contrasts, levels = contrasts),
      OR = NA_real_, LCL = NA_real_, UCL = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_,
      p_overall_model = NA_real_, p_nonlinear_model = NA_real_,
      n = n,
      median = if (n) median(df$expo) else NA_real_,
      IQR = if (n) IQR(df$expo) else NA_real_,
      outcome = outcome_var,
      exposure = exposure_var,
      note = "Insufficient data/unique expo or y"
    ))
  }

  # Register datadist so rms can find limits
  dd_cleanup <- .set_dd_global(df)
  on.exit(dd_cleanup(), add = TRUE)

  # Knots at 5/25/50/75/95 within subset (as in your code)
  knots <- as.numeric(quantile(df$expo, c(.05, .25, .50, .75, .95), na.rm = TRUE))
  knots <- sort(unique(knots))

  # Fit model
  fit <- lrm(y ~ rcs(expo, parms = knots), data = df, x = TRUE, y = TRUE)

  # Model-level p-values from anova (overall and Nonlinear)
  a <- anova(fit)
  pvals <- .get_model_pvals(a, varname = "expo")

  # Median and IQR of exposure
  x_med <- median(df$expo, na.rm = TRUE)
  x_iqr <- IQR(df$expo, na.rm = TRUE)

  # Ensure dd Low/High cover evaluation points
  ks <- c(-3, -2, -1, 1, 2, 3)
  x_points <- x_med + ks * x_iqr
  dd_obj <- get(getOption("datadist"), envir = .GlobalEnv)
  dd_obj$limits["Low",  "expo"] <- min(x_points, dd_obj$limits["Low",  "expo"])
  dd_obj$limits["High", "expo"] <- max(x_points, dd_obj$limits["High", "expo"])
  assign(getOption("datadist"), dd_obj, envir = .GlobalEnv)

  # Function to compute OR, CI, and p-value using your CI-based method
  get_row <- function(k, label) {
    pr <- Predict(fit, expo = x_med + k * x_iqr, ref.zero = TRUE, fun = exp)
    pr_df <- as.data.frame(pr)[1, ]  # single row
    # Ensure positive and compute p as you do
    OR  <- as.numeric(pr_df$yhat)
    LCL <- as.numeric(pr_df$lower)
    UCL <- as.numeric(pr_df$upper)
    # Guard against any numerical glitches
    eps <- .Machine$double.eps
    OR  <- max(OR,  eps)
    LCL <- max(LCL, eps)
    UCL <- max(UCL, eps)

    SE <- (log(UCL) - log(LCL)) / (2 * 1.96)
    # Protect against zero SE (degenerate CI)
    if (!is.finite(SE) || SE <= 0) {
      p_val <- NA_real_
    } else {
      Z <- log(OR) / SE
      p_val <- 2 * pnorm(abs(Z), lower.tail = FALSE)
    }

    tibble(
      contrast = label,
      OR = OR, LCL = LCL, UCL = UCL,
      p_value = p_val
    )
  }

  rows <- bind_rows(
    get_row(-3, "median-3*IQR"),
    get_row(-2, "median-2*IQR"),
    get_row(-1, "median-1*IQR"),
    get_row( 1, "median+1*IQR"),
    get_row( 2, "median+2*IQR"),
    get_row( 3, "median+3*IQR")
  )

  rows %>%
    mutate(
      site = site,
      sex = sex_label,
      outcome_type = ifelse(grepl("Outlier", outcome_var), "Outlier", "Missing"),
      exposure_name = ifelse(grepl("Height", exposure_var), "Height", "Weight"),
      n = n,
      p_overall_model = pvals$p_overall_model,
      p_nonlinear_model = pvals$p_nonlinear_model,
      median = x_med,
      IQR = x_iqr,
      outcome = outcome_var,
      exposure = exposure_var,
      note = NA_character_
    ) %>%
    relocate(site, sex, outcome_type, exposure_name, contrast,
             n, OR, LCL, UCL, p_value, p_overall_model, p_nonlinear_model,
             median, IQR, outcome, exposure, note)
}

# Main loop across sites, sexes, outcomes, exposures
sites <- c("spine", "femoral_head", "total_hip", "diaphysis")
sexes <- c("M", "F")
missing_var <- function(site) paste0("BMD_missingness_", site)
outlier_var <- function(site) paste0("Outlier_flag_", site)
exposures <- c(Height = "Height_first_second_imaging",
               Weight = "Weight_first_second_imaging")

res_list <- list()
i <- 1L

for (site in sites) {
  for (sx in sexes) {
    dat_sx <- BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% filter(.data$Sex == sx)

    # Height vs Missingness
    res_list[[i]] <- fit_one(dat_sx, missing_var(site), "Missing",
                             exposures[["Height"]], site, sx); i <- i + 1L
    # Height vs Outlier
    res_list[[i]] <- fit_one(dat_sx, outlier_var(site), "Outlier",
                             exposures[["Height"]], site, sx); i <- i + 1L
    # Weight vs Missingness
    res_list[[i]] <- fit_one(dat_sx, missing_var(site), "Missing",
                             exposures[["Weight"]], site, sx); i <- i + 1L
    # Weight vs Outlier
    res_list[[i]] <- fit_one(dat_sx, outlier_var(site), "Outlier",
                             exposures[["Weight"]], site, sx); i <- i + 1L
  }
}

results_multi <- bind_rows(res_list) %>%
  mutate(
    contrast = factor(contrast,
                      levels = c("median-3*IQR","median-2*IQR","median-1*IQR",
                                 "median+1*IQR","median+2*IQR","median+3*IQR"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(site, exposure_name, outcome_type, sex, contrast)

results_multi

results_multi <- results_multi %>%
  mutate(
    OR_CI = paste0(round(OR, 3),
                     " (",
                     round(LCL, 3),
                     ", ",
                     round(UCL, 3),
                     ")"))

export(results_multi, 'results_multi.csv')

BMFF_outlier_inpsection_df %>% ggplot(aes(x=Height_first_second_imaging))

```


Look for outliers in the raw BMFF data
```{r}
Spine_BMFF_raw = rbind(spine_BMFF_31748, spine_BMFF_18920)
Spine_BMFF_raw = na.omit(Spine_BMFF_raw)

  filter(!eid %in% ukb_withdraw$eid)

Femoral_head_BMFF_raw = rbind(head_BMFF_29939, head_BMFF_17522)
Femoral_head_BMFF_raw = na.omit(Femoral_head_BMFF_raw)
Femoral_head_BMFF_raw = Femoral_head_BMFF_raw %>%
  filter(!eid %in% ukb_withdraw$eid)

Total_hip_BMFF_raw = rbind(totalhip_BMFF_29186, TP_BMFF_18065)
Total_hip_BMFF_raw = na.omit(Total_hip_BMFF_raw)
Total_hip_BMFF_raw = Total_hip_BMFF_raw %>%
  filter(!eid %in% ukb_withdraw$eid)

Diaphysis_BMFF_raw = rbind(diaphysis_BMFF_29358, diaphysis_BMFF_17160)

Diaphysis_BMFF_raw = Diaphysis_BMFF_raw %>%
  filter(!eid %in% ukb_withdraw$eid)

dfs <- list(Spine_BMFF_raw[,c(1,4,8)], Femoral_head_BMFF_raw[,c(1,4,8)], Total_hip_BMFF_raw[,c(1,4,8)], Diaphysis_BMFF_raw[,c(1,4,8)])

# Merging all data frames by 'eid'
PCA_raw_df <- reduce(dfs, function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "eid"))
colnames(PCA_raw_df) = c("eid", "Spine_BMFF", "Spine_voxels", "Femoral_head_BMFF", "Femoral_head_voxels", "Total_hip_BMFF", "Total_hip_voxels", "Diaphysis_BMFF", "Diaphysis_voxels")

BMFF_raw_PCA = prcomp(PCA_raw_df [,c(2,4,6,8)], scale = TRUE)
BMFF_raw_PCA_df = data.frame(BMFF_raw_PCA$x)
BMFF_raw_PCA_df = cbind(PCA_raw_df, BMFF_raw_PCA_df)

BMFF_raw_PCA_df%>% ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2))+
  geom_point()+
  labs(x="PC1 (59.6%)", y="PC2 (21.5%)")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(face="bold"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(face="bold"))+
  theme(legend.text = element_text(face = "bold"))+
  theme(legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"))+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"))


BMFF_raw_PCA_df%>% ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, col=Spine_BMFF))+
  geom_point()+
```
