```{r}
#Forest plot for in-text figure

#Model 1 only:

Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df <- data.frame(
  Index = c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8), 
  Predictor = c("Spine BMFF", "Femoral head BMFF", "Total hip BMFF", "Diaphysis BMFF", "Spine:femoral BMFF ratio", "Multi_site 1", "PC1", "PC2"),
  OR = c(1.567, 0.769, 0.735, 0.824, 1.763, 0.686, 1.194, 1.922),
  LL = c(1.498, 0.736, 0.701, 0.789, 1.676, 0.652, 1.137, 1.825),
  UL = c(1.638, 0.805, 0.770, 0.862, 1.855, 0.721, 1.255, 2.023),
  p = c(2.424966e-86, 3.554800e-30, 8.145209e-38, 1.536827e-17, 1.794642e-106, 51.895979e-48, 2.323071e-12, 1.928509e-136)
)


Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df$Predictor <- factor(
  Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df$Predictor,
  levels = c("Spine BMFF", "Femoral head BMFF", "Total hip BMFF", "Diaphysis BMFF", "Spine:femoral BMFF ratio", "Multi_site 1", "PC1", "PC2")
)

ggplot(Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df, aes(y = Index, x = OR, col = Predictor)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = -log10(p))) +  
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = LL, xmax = UL), height = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, color = "darkred", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  xlab("Odds Ratio (95% CI)") + 
  ylab(" ") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")) +
  theme(legend.text  = element_text(face = "bold")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Spine BMFF" = "steelblue", "Femoral head BMFF" = '#3b3b3b', "Total hip BMFF" = 'red', "Diaphysis BMFF" = 'purple', "Spine:femoral BMFF ratio" = '#9B870C', "Multi_site 1" = '#ff62b2' ,  "PC1" = '#090088', "PC2" = "darkorange"),
                     labels = c("Spine BMFF" = "Spine BMFF : 1.567 (1.498, 1.638)", "Femoral head BMFF" = "Femoral head BMFF : 0.769 (0.736, 0.805)", "Total hip BMFF" = "Total hip BMFF : 0.735 (0.701, 0.770)", "Diaphysis BMFF" = "Diaphysis BMFF : 0.824 (0.789, 0.862)", "Spine:femoral BMFF ratio" = "Spine:femoral BMFF ratio : 1.763 (1.676, 1.855)", "Multi_site 1" = "Multi_site 1 : 0.686 (0.652, 0.721)", "PC1" = "PC1 : 1.194 (1.137, 1.255)", "PC2" = "PC2 : 1.922 (1.825, 2.023)"))+
  scale_y_reverse()

#All models:
Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df <- data.frame(
  Index = c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8), 
  Predictor = c("Spine BMFF","Spine BMFF","Spine BMFF", "Femoral head BMFF","Femoral head BMFF","Femoral head BMFF", "Total hip BMFF","Total hip BMFF","Total hip BMFF", "Diaphysis BMFF","Diaphysis BMFF","Diaphysis BMFF", "Spine:femoral BMFF ratio","Spine:femoral BMFF ratio","Spine:femoral BMFF ratio", "Multi_site 1","Multi_site 1","Multi_site 1", "PC1","PC1","PC1", "PC2","PC2","PC2"),
  Model = c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3"),
  OR = c(1.567, 1.609, 1.438,  0.769, 0.778, 0.775,  0.735, 0.748, 0.764,  0.824, 0.863, 0.884,  1.763, 1.792, 1.590,  0.686, 0.681, 0.714,  1.194, 1.183, 1.184,  1.922, 1.929, 1.720),
  LL = c(1.498, 1.538, 1.372,  0.736, 0.743, 0.739,  0.701, 0.713, 0.728,  0.789, 0.824, 0.843,  1.676, 1.703, 1.508,  0.652, 0.646, 0.676,  1.137, 1.123, 1.122,  1.825, 1.833, 1.631),
  UL = c(1.638, 1.684, 1.507,  0.805, 0.815, 0.812,  0.770, 0.785, 0.803,  0.862, 0.904, 0.927,  1.855, 1.886, 1.676,  0.721, 0.718, 0.755,  1.255, 1.247, 1.249,  2.023, 2.032, 1.815),
  p = c(2.424966e-86, 8.044218e-95, 9.509144e-52, 3.554800e-30, 5.620645e-26, 7.513845e-26, 8.145209e-38, 2.940804e-32, 8.129195e-27, 1.536827e-17, 4.576119e-10, 3.850806e-07, 1.794642e-106, 1.733622e-111, 3.517606e-66, 51.895979e-48, 2.470417e-46, 2.174831e-33, 2.323071e-12, 3.313000e-10, 6.090894e-10, 1.928509e-136, 3.842780e-138, 4.406644e-88)
)

df <- Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df

# Ensure order of predictors and models
df$Predictor <- factor(
  df$Predictor,
  levels = c(
    "Spine BMFF",
    "Femoral head BMFF",
    "Total hip BMFF",
    "Diaphysis BMFF",
    "Spine:femoral BMFF ratio",
    "Multi_site 1",
    "PC1",
    "PC2"
  )
)

df$Model <- factor(df$Model, levels = c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3"))

# Combined factor: Predictor + Model, Model 1 (top), then 2, then 3
df <- df %>%
  mutate(Predictor_Model = interaction(Predictor, Model, sep = " - ", lex.order = TRUE))

df$Predictor_Model <- factor(
  df$Predictor_Model,
  levels = rev(levels(df$Predictor_Model))
)

Multi_site_T2D_plot = ggplot(df, aes(x = OR, y = Predictor_Model, color = Predictor)) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = 1,
    color = "darkred",
    linetype = "dashed",
    size = 0.5,
    alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = LL, xmax = UL), height = 0) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = Model, size = -log10(p))) +
  xlab("Odds Ratio (95% CI)") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    # Remove y-axis text, ticks, and title
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Spine BMFF"               = "steelblue",
    "Femoral head BMFF"        = "#3b3b3b",
    "Total hip BMFF"           = "red",
    "Diaphysis BMFF"           = "purple",
    "Spine:femoral BMFF ratio" = "#9B870C",
    "Multi_site 1"             = "#ff62b2",
    "PC1"                      = "blue",
    "PC2"                      = "darkorange"
  )) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Model 1" = 15, "Model 2" = 16, "Model 3" = 17))+
  scale_size_continuous(
    name   = "-log10(p)",
    range  = c(2, 8),          
    breaks = c(10, 50, 100, 140)       
  )

Multi_site_T2D_plot

ggsave(filename = "Multi_site_T2D_plot.png", plot = Multi_site_T2D_plot, device = "png", width = 20, height = 10)

```


BMD data processing
```{r}
#BMD
BMD_imaging_df = DXA_bone_BCP[,c('eid', '23234-2.0', '23234-3.0', '23236-2.0', '23236-3.0', '23299-2.0', '23299-3.0', '23290-2.0', '23290-3.0', '23295-2.0', '23295-3.0')]
colnames(BMD_imaging_df) = c('eid', 'Spine_BMD_first_imaging', 'Spine_BMD_second_imaging', 'Total_BMD_first_imaging', 'Total_BMD_second_imaging', 'Femur_neck_BMD_first_imaging', 'Femur_neck_BMD_second_imaging', 'Femur_shaft_BMD_first_imaging', 'Femur_shaft_BMD_second_imaging', 'Femur_troch_BMD_first_imaging', 'Femur_troch_BMD_second_imaging')

#Spine
Spine_BMD_imaging_df <- BMD_imaging_df %>%
     mutate(Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging = ifelse(!is.na(Spine_BMD_first_imaging), Spine_BMD_first_imaging, Spine_BMD_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(Spine_BMD_first_imaging) & !is.na(Spine_BMD_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Spine_BMD_first_imaging)))

Spine_BMD_imaging_df = Spine_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1:3,12)]

#Clean data frame from extreme outliers
  Q1 <- quantile(Spine_BMD_imaging_df$Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(Spine_BMD_imaging_df$Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)
  IQR_value <- IQR(Spine_BMD_imaging_df$Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  # Define the range
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 3 * IQR_value
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 3 * IQR_value

  # Filter the data frame
  Spine_BMD_imaging_df <- subset(
    Spine_BMD_imaging_df,
    Spine_BMD_imaging_df$Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging > lower_bound & Spine_BMD_imaging_df$Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging < upper_bound)

export(Spine_BMD_imaging_df, 'Spine_BMD_imaging_df.csv')

#Total
Total_BMD_imaging_df <- BMD_imaging_df %>%
     mutate(Total_BMD_first_second_imaging = ifelse(!is.na(Total_BMD_first_imaging), Total_BMD_first_imaging, Total_BMD_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(Total_BMD_first_imaging) & !is.na(Total_BMD_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Total_BMD_first_imaging)))

Total_BMD_imaging_df = Total_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4,5,12)]

#Clean data frame from extreme outliers
  Q1 <- quantile(Total_BMD_imaging_df$Total_BMD_first_second_imaging, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(Total_BMD_imaging_df$Total_BMD_first_second_imaging, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)
  IQR_value <- IQR(Total_BMD_imaging_df$Total_BMD_first_second_imaging, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  # Define the range
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 3 * IQR_value
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 3 * IQR_value

  # Filter the data frame
  Total_BMD_imaging_df <- subset(
    Total_BMD_imaging_df,
    Total_BMD_imaging_df$Total_BMD_first_second_imaging > lower_bound & Total_BMD_imaging_df$Total_BMD_first_second_imaging < upper_bound)

export(Total_BMD_imaging_df, 'Total_BMD_imaging_df.csv')

#Femur neck
Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df <- BMD_imaging_df %>%
     mutate(Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging = ifelse(!is.na(Femur_neck_BMD_first_imaging), Femur_neck_BMD_first_imaging, Femur_neck_BMD_second_imaging)) %>% filter((is.na(Femur_neck_BMD_first_imaging) & !is.na(Femur_neck_BMD_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Femur_neck_BMD_first_imaging)))

Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df = Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,6,7,12)]

#Clean data frame from extreme outliers
  Q1 <- quantile(Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)
  IQR_value <- IQR(Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  # Define the range
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 3 * IQR_value
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 3 * IQR_value

  # Filter the data frame
  Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df <- subset(
    Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df,
    Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging > lower_bound & Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging < upper_bound)

export(Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df, 'Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df.csv')

#Femur shaft
Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df <- BMD_imaging_df %>%
     mutate(Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging = ifelse(!is.na(Femur_shaft_BMD_first_imaging), Femur_shaft_BMD_first_imaging, Femur_shaft_BMD_second_imaging)) %>% filter((is.na(Femur_shaft_BMD_first_imaging) & !is.na(Femur_shaft_BMD_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Femur_shaft_BMD_first_imaging)))

Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df = Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,8,9,12)]

#Clean data frame from extreme outliers
  Q1 <- quantile(Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)
  IQR_value <- IQR(Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  # Define the range
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 3 * IQR_value
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 3 * IQR_value

  # Filter the data frame
  Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df <- subset(
    Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df,
    Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging > lower_bound & Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging < upper_bound)

export(Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df, 'Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df.csv')

#Femur troch
Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df <- BMD_imaging_df %>%
     mutate(Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging = ifelse(!is.na(Femur_troch_BMD_first_imaging), Femur_troch_BMD_first_imaging, Femur_troch_BMD_second_imaging)) %>% filter((is.na(Femur_troch_BMD_first_imaging) & !is.na(Femur_troch_BMD_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Femur_troch_BMD_first_imaging)))

Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df = Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,10:12)]

#Clean data frame from extreme outliers
  Q1 <- quantile(Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)
  IQR_value <- IQR(Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  # Define the range
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 3 * IQR_value
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 3 * IQR_value

  # Filter the data frame
  Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df <- subset(
    Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df,
    Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging > lower_bound & Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df$Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging < upper_bound)

export(Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df, 'Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df.csv')

#Count number of missing BMD values corresponding to BMFF at each skeletal site
Spine_BMD_NA_count = merge(Spine_BMFF_final_df, Spine_BMD_imaging_df, by='eid', all=T)
Spine_BMD_NA_count = Spine_BMD_NA_count %>% filter(!is.na(Mean.fat))
count(is.na(Spine_BMD_NA_count$Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging))

Femoral_head_BMD_NA_count = merge(Femoral_head_BMFF_final_df, Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df, by='eid', all=T)
Femoral_head_BMD_NA_count = Femoral_head_BMD_NA_count %>% filter(!is.na(Mean.fat))
count(is.na(Femoral_head_BMD_NA_count$Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging))

Total_hip_BMD_NA_count = merge(Total_hip_BMFF_final_df, Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df, by='eid', all=T)
Total_hip_BMD_NA_count = Total_hip_BMD_NA_count %>% filter(!is.na(Mean.fat))
count(is.na(Total_hip_BMD_NA_count$Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging))

Diaphysis_BMD_NA_count = merge(Diaphysis_BMFF_final_df, Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df, by='eid', all=T)
Diaphysis_BMD_NA_count = Diaphysis_BMD_NA_count %>% filter(!is.na(Mean.fat))
count(is.na(Diaphysis_BMD_NA_count$Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging))
```


MRI BC and anthropometry data processing
```{r}
#MRI covariates
covariates_file_path <- "//cmvm.datastore.ed.ac.uk/cmvm/scs/groups/OPTIMAT/Sam_Sjostrom/ukb677631.csv"

# Define the selected columns
selected_columns_covariates <- c("eid", "22407-2.0", "22407-3.0", "22408-2.0", "22408-3.0", "24353-2.0", "24353-3.0", "24354-2.0", "24354-3.0", "23355-2.0", "23355-3.0", "23356-2.0", "23356-3.0", "22405-2.0", "22405-3.0", "22403-2.0", "22403-3.0", "22406-2.0", "22406-3.0", "22404-2.0", "22404-3.0", "40061-2.0", "40061-3.0", "21090-2.0", "21090-3.0")

# Read the CSV file using fread
Model_3_covariates_df <- fread(covariates_file_path, select = selected_columns_covariates)
export(Model_3_covariates_df, "Model_3_covariates_df.csv")


#Anthropometry
covariates_file_path <- "//cmvm.datastore.ed.ac.uk/cmvm/scs/groups/OPTIMAT/Sam_Sjostrom/ukb675209.csv"

selected_columns_covariates <- c("eid", "21001-2.0", "21001-3.0", "12144-2.0", "12144-3.0", "12143-2.0", "12143-3.0", "48-2.0", "48-3.0", "49-2.0", "49-3.0")

# Read the CSV file using fread
Anthropometrics_df <- fread(covariates_file_path, select = selected_columns_covariates)
Anthropometrics_df$WHR_imaging = Anthropometrics_df$`48-2.0`/Anthropometrics_df$`49-2.0`
Anthropometrics_df$WHR_second_imaging = Anthropometrics_df$`48-3.0`/Anthropometrics_df$`49-3.0`

colnames(Anthropometrics_df) = c('eid', 'BMI_first_imaging', 'BMI_second_imaging', 'Height_first_imaging', 'Height_second_imaging', 'Weight_first_imaging', 'Weight_second_imaging', 'WC_first_imaging', 'WC_second_imaging', 'HC_first_imaging', 'HC_second_imaging', 'WHR_first_imaging', 'WHR_second_imaging')

#Merge dataframes with relevant covariates and re-name columns
export(Anthropometrics_df, "Anthropometrics_df.csv")


Model_3_covariates_df = merge(Anthropometrics_df, Model_3_covariates_df, by='eid')
colnames(Model_3_covariates_df)[c(14:37)] = c("VAT_first_imaging", "VAT_second_imaging", "ASAT_first_imaging", "ASAT_second_imaging", "ATMFI_first_imaging_(left)", "ATMFI_second_imaging_(left)", "ATMFI_first_imaging_(right)", "ATMFI_second_imaging_(right)", "PTMFI_first_imaging_(left)", "PTMFI_second_imaging_(left)", "PTMFI_first_imaging_(right)", "PTMFI_second_imaging_(right)","ATFFMV_first_imaging_(left)", "ATFFMV_second_imaging_(left)", "ATFFMV_first_imaging_(right)", "ATFFMV_second_imaging_(right)", "PTFFMV_first_imaging_(left)", "PTFFMV_second_imaging_(left)", "PTFFMV_first_imaging_(right)", "PTFFMV_second_imaging_(right)", "Liver_PDFF_first_imaging", "Liver_PDFF_second_imaging",  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_imaging", "Pancreas_PDFF_second_imaging")

export(Model_3_covariates_df, "Model_3_covariates_df.csv")

#Import age the different imaging visits
covariates_file_path <- "//cmvm.datastore.ed.ac.uk/cmvm/scs/groups/OPTIMAT/Sam_Sjostrom/ukb675209.csv"

# Define the selected columns
selected_columns_covariates <- c("eid", "21003-2.0", "21003-3.0")

# Read the CSV file using fread
Age_imaging_df <- fread(covariates_file_path, select = selected_columns_covariates)
export(Age_imaging_df, "Age_imaging_df.csv")

#Wrangle and QC each variable separately

#BMI--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df <- Model_3_covariates_df %>%
     mutate(BMI_first_second_imaging = ifelse(!is.na(BMI_first_imaging), BMI_first_imaging, BMI_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(BMI_first_imaging) & !is.na(BMI_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(BMI_first_imaging)))

BMI_imaging_df = Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df[,c(1,38)]

#Clean data frame from extreme outliers
  Q1 <- quantile(BMI_imaging_df$BMI_first_second_imaging, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(BMI_imaging_df$BMI_first_second_imaging, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)
  IQR_value <- IQR(BMI_imaging_df$BMI_first_second_imaging, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  # Define the range
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 3 * IQR_value
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 3 * IQR_value

  # Filter the data frame
  BMI_imaging_df <- subset(
    BMI_imaging_df,
    BMI_imaging_df$BMI_first_second_imaging > lower_bound & BMI_imaging_df$BMI_first_second_imaging < upper_bound)
  
export(BMI_imaging_df, "BMI_imaging_df.csv")

#WHR-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df <- Model_3_covariates_df %>%
     mutate(WHR_first_second_imaging = ifelse(!is.na(WHR_first_imaging), WHR_first_imaging, WHR_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(WHR_first_imaging) & !is.na(WHR_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(WHR_first_imaging)))

WHR_imaging_df = Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df[,c(1,38)]

#Clean data frame from extreme outliers
  Q1 <- quantile(WHR_imaging_df$WHR_first_second_imaging, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(WHR_imaging_df$WHR_first_second_imaging, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)
  IQR_value <- IQR(WHR_imaging_df$WHR_first_second_imaging, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  # Define the range
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 3 * IQR_value
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 3 * IQR_value

  # Filter the data frame
  WHR_imaging_df <- subset(
    WHR_imaging_df,
    WHR_imaging_df$WHR_first_second_imaging > lower_bound & WHR_imaging_df$WHR_first_second_imaging < upper_bound)
  
export(WHR_imaging_df, "WHR_imaging_df.csv")

#Height (for normalisation)---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df <- Model_3_covariates_df %>%
     mutate(combined = ifelse(!is.na(Height_first_imaging), Height_first_imaging, Height_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(Height_first_imaging) & !is.na(Height_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Height_first_imaging)))

Height_imaging_df = Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df[,c(1,49)]
colnames(Height_imaging_df)[2] = "Height_first_second_imaging"
Height_imaging_df$Height_m = Height_imaging_df$Height_first_second_imaging/100

export(Height_imaging_df, "Height_imaging_df.csv")

#VAT--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df <- Model_3_covariates_df %>%
     mutate(combined = ifelse(!is.na(VAT_first_imaging), VAT_first_imaging, VAT_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(VAT_first_imaging) & !is.na(VAT_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(VAT_first_imaging)))

VAT_imaging_df = Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df[,c(1,49)]
colnames(VAT_imaging_df)[2] = "VAT_first_second_imaging"
VAT_imaging_df = merge(VAT_imaging_df, Height_imaging_df[,c(1,3)], by='eid')
VAT_imaging_df$VATi = VAT_imaging_df$VAT_first_second_imaging/VAT_imaging_df$Height_m^2
VAT_imaging_df = VAT_imaging_df[,c(1,4)]
colnames(VAT_imaging_df)[2] = "VATi_first_second_imaging"

#Clean data frame from extreme outliers
  Q1 <- quantile(VAT_imaging_df$VATi_first_second_imaging, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(VAT_imaging_df$VATi_first_second_imaging, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)
  IQR_value <- IQR(VAT_imaging_df$VATi_first_second_imaging, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  # Define the range
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 3 * IQR_value
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 3 * IQR_value

  # Filter the data frame
  VAT_imaging_df <- subset(
    VAT_imaging_df,
    VAT_imaging_df$VATi_first_second_imaging > lower_bound & VAT_imaging_df$VATi_first_second_imaging < upper_bound)
  
export(VAT_imaging_df, "VATi_imaging_df.csv")

#ASAT-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df <- Model_3_covariates_df %>%
     mutate(combined = ifelse(!is.na(ASAT_first_imaging), ASAT_first_imaging, ASAT_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(ASAT_first_imaging) & !is.na(ASAT_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(ASAT_first_imaging)))

ASAT_imaging_df = Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df[,c(1,49)]
colnames(ASAT_imaging_df)[2] = "ASAT_first_second_imaging"
ASAT_imaging_df = merge(ASAT_imaging_df, Height_imaging_df[,c(1,3)], by='eid')
ASAT_imaging_df$ASATi = ASAT_imaging_df$ASAT_first_second_imaging/ASAT_imaging_df$Height_m^2
ASAT_imaging_df = ASAT_imaging_df[,c(1,4)]
colnames(ASAT_imaging_df)[2] = "ASATi_first_second_imaging"

#Clean data frame from extreme outliers
  Q1 <- quantile(ASAT_imaging_df$ASATi_first_second_imaging, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(ASAT_imaging_df$ASATi_first_second_imaging, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)
  IQR_value <- IQR(ASAT_imaging_df$ASATi_first_second_imaging, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  # Define the range
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 3 * IQR_value
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 3 * IQR_value

  # Filter the data frame
  ASAT_imaging_df <- subset(
    ASAT_imaging_df,
    ASAT_imaging_df$ASATi_first_second_imaging > lower_bound & ASAT_imaging_df$ASATi_first_second_imaging < upper_bound)
  
export(ASAT_imaging_df, "ASATi_imaging_df.csv")

#TTMFI------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Model_3_covariates_df$TTMFI_first_imaging = (Model_3_covariates_df$`ATMFI_first_imaging_(left)`+Model_3_covariates_df$`ATMFI_first_imaging_(right)`+Model_3_covariates_df$`PTMFI_first_imaging_(right)`+Model_3_covariates_df$`PTMFI_first_imaging_(left)`)/4

Model_3_covariates_df$TTMFI_second_imaging = (Model_3_covariates_df$`ATMFI_second_imaging_(left)`+Model_3_covariates_df$`ATMFI_second_imaging_(right)`+Model_3_covariates_df$`PTMFI_second_imaging_(right)`+Model_3_covariates_df$`PTMFI_second_imaging_(left)`)/4

Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df <- Model_3_covariates_df %>%
     mutate(combined = ifelse(!is.na(TTMFI_first_imaging), TTMFI_first_imaging, TTMFI_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(TTMFI_first_imaging) & !is.na(TTMFI_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(TTMFI_first_imaging)))

TTMFI_imaging_df = Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df[,c(1,49)]
colnames(TTMFI_imaging_df)[2] = "TTMFI_first_second_imaging"

#Clean data frame from extreme outliers
  Q1 <- quantile(TTMFI_imaging_df$TTMFI_first_second_imaging, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(TTMFI_imaging_df$TTMFI_first_second_imaging, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)
  IQR_value <- IQR(TTMFI_imaging_df$TTMFI_first_second_imaging, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  # Define the range
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 3 * IQR_value
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 3 * IQR_value

  # Filter the data frame
  TTMFI_imaging_df <- subset(
    TTMFI_imaging_df,
    TTMFI_imaging_df$TTMFI_first_second_imaging > lower_bound & TTMFI_imaging_df$TTMFI_first_second_imaging < upper_bound)
  
export(TTMFI_imaging_df, "TTMFI_imaging_df.csv")

#TTFFMVi----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Model_3_covariates_df$TTFFMVi_first_imaging = (Model_3_covariates_df$`ATFFMV_first_imaging_(left)`+Model_3_covariates_df$`ATFFMV_first_imaging_(right)`+Model_3_covariates_df$`PTFFMV_first_imaging_(right)`+Model_3_covariates_df$`PTFFMV_first_imaging_(left)`)/Model_3_covariates_df$Height_m_first_imaging^2

Model_3_covariates_df$TTFFMVi_second_imaging = (Model_3_covariates_df$`ATFFMV_second_imaging_(left)`+Model_3_covariates_df$`ATFFMV_second_imaging_(right)`+Model_3_covariates_df$`PTFFMV_second_imaging_(right)`+Model_3_covariates_df$`PTFFMV_second_imaging_(left)`)/Model_3_covariates_df$Height_m_second_imaging^2

Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df <- Model_3_covariates_df %>%
     mutate(combined = ifelse(!is.na(TTFFMVi_first_imaging), TTFFMVi_first_imaging, TTFFMVi_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(TTFFMVi_first_imaging) & !is.na(TTFFMVi_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(TTFFMVi_first_imaging)))

TTFFMVi_imaging_df = Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df[,c(1,49)]
colnames(TTFFMVi_imaging_df)[2] = "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging"

#Clean data frame from extreme outliers
  Q1 <- quantile(TTFFMVi_imaging_df$TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(TTFFMVi_imaging_df$TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)
  IQR_value <- IQR(TTFFMVi_imaging_df$TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  # Define the range
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 3 * IQR_value
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 3 * IQR_value

  # Filter the data frame
  TTFFMVi_imaging_df <- subset(
    TTFFMVi_imaging_df,
    TTFFMVi_imaging_df$TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging > lower_bound & TTFFMVi_imaging_df$TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging < upper_bound)
  
export(TTFFMVi_imaging_df, "TTFFMVi_imaging_df.csv")

#Liver_PDFF-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df <- Model_3_covariates_df %>%
     mutate(combined = ifelse(!is.na(Liver_PDFF_first_imaging), Liver_PDFF_first_imaging, Liver_PDFF_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(Liver_PDFF_first_imaging) & !is.na(Liver_PDFF_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Liver_PDFF_first_imaging)))

Liver_PDFF_imaging_df = Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df[,c(1,49)]
colnames(Liver_PDFF_imaging_df)[2] = "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging"
  
export(Liver_PDFF_imaging_df, "Liver_PDFF_imaging_df.csv")

#Pancreas_PDFF----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df <- Model_3_covariates_df %>%
     mutate(combined = ifelse(!is.na(Pancreas_PDFF_first_imaging), Pancreas_PDFF_first_imaging, Pancreas_PDFF_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(Pancreas_PDFF_first_imaging) & !is.na(Pancreas_PDFF_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Pancreas_PDFF_first_imaging)))

Pancreas_PDFF_imaging_df = Model_3_covariates_FINAL_df[,c(1,49)]
colnames(Pancreas_PDFF_imaging_df)[2] = "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging"

export(Pancreas_PDFF_imaging_df, "Pancreas_PDFF_imaging_df.csv")

#Create an MRI covariate df
data_frames <- list(
  BMI_imaging_df,
  WHR_imaging_df,
  VAT_imaging_df,
  ASAT_imaging_df,
  TTMFI_imaging_df,
  TTFFMVi_imaging_df,
  Liver_PDFF_imaging_df,
  Pancreas_PDFF_imaging_df
)

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
MRI_model_3_covariate_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)
export(MRI_model_3_covariate_df, "MRI_model_3_covariate_df.csv")
#75,738 - cleaned

#Visualise BC (adiposity) PCs vs each BC variable in model 3
BC_PCA_df = MRI_model_3_covariate_df[,1:6]
BC_PCA_df = na.omit(BC_PCA_df)
BC_PCA = prcomp(BC_PCA_df[,2:6], scale = TRUE)
BC_PCA = data.frame(BC_PCA$x)
BC_PCA_df = cbind(BC_PCA_df, BC_PCA)

#Show percentage contribution to PC1 and PC2 on bar plot
fviz_eig(BC_PCA)
summary(BC_PCA)

BC_PCA_df$rt_BMI = RankNorm(BC_PCA_df$BMI_first_second_imaging)
BC_PCA_df$rt_WHR = RankNorm(BC_PCA_df$WHR_first_second_imaging)
BC_PCA_df$rt_VATi = RankNorm(BC_PCA_df$VATi_first_second_imaging)
BC_PCA_df$rt_ASATi = RankNorm(BC_PCA_df$ASATi_first_second_imaging)
BC_PCA_df$rt_TTMFI = RankNorm(BC_PCA_df$TTMFI_first_second_imaging)
BC_PCA_df$`rt_VATi:ASATi_ratio` = RankNorm(BC_PCA_df$VATi_first_second_imaging/BC_PCA_df$ASATi_first_second_imaging)
BC_PCA_df$rt_PC1 = RankNorm(BC_PCA_df$PC1)
BC_PCA_df$rt_PC2 = RankNorm(BC_PCA_df$PC2)
BC_PCA_df$rt_PC3 = RankNorm(BC_PCA_df$PC3)
BC_PCA_df$rt_PC4 = RankNorm(BC_PCA_df$PC4)
BC_PCA_df$rt_PC5 = RankNorm(BC_PCA_df$PC5)

#Cor
BC_PCA_corr_df = cor(BC_PCA_df[12:22])

# Create the corrplot using R-squared values for coloring
corrplot(BC_PCA_corr_df, 
         method = 'color', 
         type = 'upper',
         sig.level = c(0.00001, 0.0001, 0.001), 
         pch.cex = 0.9,
         insig = 'label_sig', 
         pch.col = 'black', 
         tl.srt = 45, 
         addCoef.col = 'grey20',
         diag = FALSE,
         tl.col = 'black'
         )

```

DXA BC data processing
```{r}
DXA_model_3_df = DXA_bone_BCP[,c(1,100,101,104,105,124,125,158,159,182,183,192,193,202,203)]
colnames(DXA_model_3_df) = c("eid", "Spine_BMD_first_imaging", "Spine_BMD_second_imaging", "Total_BMD_first_imaging", "Total_BMD_second_imaging",  "Android_fat_first_imaging", "Android_fat_second_imaging", "Gynoid_fat_first_imaging", "Gynoid_fat_second_imaging", "Legs_fat_first_imaging", "Legs_fat_second_imaging", "Total_fat_first_imaging", "Total_fat_second_imaging", "Trunk_fat_first_imaging", "Trunk_fat_second_imaging")

#Android_fat------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DXA_model_3_FINAL_df <- DXA_model_3_df %>%
     mutate(combined = ifelse(!is.na(Android_fat_first_imaging), Android_fat_first_imaging, Android_fat_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(Android_fat_first_imaging) & !is.na(Android_fat_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Android_fat_first_imaging)))

Android_fat_imaging_df = DXA_model_3_FINAL_df[,c(1,16)]
colnames(Android_fat_imaging_df)[2] = "Android_fat_first_second_imaging"

#Gynoid_fat------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DXA_model_3_FINAL_df <- DXA_model_3_df %>%
     mutate(combined = ifelse(!is.na(Gynoid_fat_first_imaging), Gynoid_fat_first_imaging, Gynoid_fat_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(Gynoid_fat_first_imaging) & !is.na(Gynoid_fat_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Gynoid_fat_first_imaging)))

Gynoid_fat_imaging_df = DXA_model_3_FINAL_df[,c(1,16)]
colnames(Gynoid_fat_imaging_df)[2] = "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging"

#Legs_fat------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DXA_model_3_FINAL_df <- DXA_model_3_df %>%
     mutate(combined = ifelse(!is.na(Legs_fat_first_imaging), Legs_fat_first_imaging, Legs_fat_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(Legs_fat_first_imaging) & !is.na(Legs_fat_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Legs_fat_first_imaging)))

Legs_fat_imaging_df = DXA_model_3_FINAL_df[,c(1,16)]
colnames(Legs_fat_imaging_df)[2] = "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging"

#Total_fat------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DXA_model_3_FINAL_df <- DXA_model_3_df %>%
     mutate(combined = ifelse(!is.na(Total_fat_first_imaging), Total_fat_first_imaging, Total_fat_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(Total_fat_first_imaging) & !is.na(Total_fat_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Total_fat_first_imaging)))

Total_fat_imaging_df = DXA_model_3_FINAL_df[,c(1,16)]
colnames(Total_fat_imaging_df)[2] = "Total_fat_first_second_imaging"

#Trunk_fat------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DXA_model_3_FINAL_df <- DXA_model_3_df %>%
     mutate(combined = ifelse(!is.na(Trunk_fat_first_imaging), Trunk_fat_first_imaging, Trunk_fat_second_imaging)) %>%
     filter((is.na(Trunk_fat_first_imaging) & !is.na(Trunk_fat_second_imaging)) | (!is.na(Trunk_fat_first_imaging)))

Trunk_fat_imaging_df = DXA_model_3_FINAL_df[,c(1,16)]
colnames(Trunk_fat_imaging_df)[2] = "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging"

#Create a DXA covariate df
data_frames <- list(
  Android_fat_imaging_df,
  Gynoid_fat_imaging_df,
  Legs_fat_imaging_df,
  Total_fat_imaging_df,
  Trunk_fat_imaging_df
)

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
DXA_model_3_covariate_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)
export(DXA_model_3_covariate_df, "DXA_model_3_covariate_df.csv")

#Clean from extreme outliers - no extreme outliers exist, hence keep as is
  Q1 <- quantile(DXA_model_3_covariate_df$Android_fat_first_second_imaging, 0.25, na.rm=TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(DXA_model_3_covariate_df$Android_fat_first_second_imaging, 0.75, na.rm=TRUE)
  IQR_value <- IQR(DXA_model_3_covariate_df$Android_fat_first_second_imaging, na.rm=TRUE)
  
  # Define the range
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 3 * IQR_value
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 3 * IQR_value

  # Filter the data frame
  DXA_model_3_cleaned_covariate_df <- subset(
    DXA_model_3_covariate_df,
    DXA_model_3_covariate_df$Android_fat_first_second_imaging > lower_bound & DXA_model_3_covariate_df$Android_fat_first_second_imaging < upper_bound)

```


BMD missing values MAR testing
```{r}
#Run with multi-site measurements and total BMD
BMFF_PCA_df_covariates = merge(BMFF_PCA_df[,-c(19:23)], Cohort_characteristics_df[,c(1,13:15,29:33,39)], by='eid') #Skip this for non-T2D cohort
BMFF_PCA_df_covariates = merge(BMFF_PCA_df[,c(1,15,25,27,31,32)], Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,3:6,14)], by='eid')
BMFF_PCA_df_covariates = merge(BMFF_PCA_df_covariates, Total_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid', all=T)
BMFF_PCA_df_covariates = BMFF_PCA_df_covariates[!is.na(BMFF_PCA_df_covariates$rt_PC2),]

#PC1, PC2, spine:femoral ratio and multi-site 1
result <- mcar_test(BMFF_PCA_df_covariates[,c(27:29,36,26)]) #p=0 ; T2D cohort
result <- mcar_test(BMFF_PCA_df_covariates[,c(1:10,12)]) #p=0

#Categorise missingness
BMFF_PCA_df_covariates$BMD_missingness = ifelse(is.na(BMFF_PCA_df_covariates$`Total_BMD_first_second_imaging.y`), "Missing", "Complete")
count(BMFF_PCA_df_covariates$BMD_missingness)

#Outcome variables: BMI_first_second_imaging, Age_first_second_imaging and rt_multi-site measurements

# Perform ANOVA
anova_result <- BMFF_PCA_df_covariates %>%  aov(rt_PC2 ~ BMD_missingness, data=.)
anova_result <- BMFF_PCA_df_covariates %>%  aov(RankNorm(Age_first_second_imaging) ~ BMD_missingness, data=.)
summary(anova_result) #PC1: p=0.301, PC2: p=1.59e-07, spine:femoral: p=2.86e-13, multi-site 1: p=0.839, age: p<2e-16, BMI: p=0.0042 ; T2D cohort
summary(anova_result) #PC1: p=0.261, PC2: p=1.34e-12, spine:femoral: p=7.16e-15, multi-site 1: p=0.796, age: p<2e-16, BMI: p=0.0053

#Perform Chi-squared for sex: p=0.347
contingency_table <- table(BMFF_PCA_df_covariates$Sex, BMFF_PCA_df_covariates$BMD_missingness)

# Perform the chi-squared test
chi_squared_test <- chisq.test(contingency_table)
chi_squared_test

#Spine
Spine_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,-c(14)], T2D_df[,c(1,3)], by='eid') #Skip this for non-T2D cohort
Spine_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, #(Spine_BMFF_df_covariates)
                                 Spine_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid', all=T)
Spine_BMFF_df_covariates= Spine_BMFF_df_covariates[!is.na(Spine_BMFF_df_covariates$rt_BMFF),]

result <- mcar_test(Spine_BMFF_df_covariates[,c(3:6,25)]) #p=0

#Categorise missingness
Spine_BMFF_df_covariates$BMD_missingness = ifelse(is.na(Spine_BMFF_df_covariates$`Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging.y`), "Missing", "Complete")
count(Spine_BMFF_df_covariates$BMD_missingness)

#Outcome variables: BMI_first_second_imaging, Age_first_second_imaging and rt_BMFF 

# Perform ANOVA - BMFF, Age and BMI
anova_result <- Spine_BMFF_df_covariates %>%  aov(RankNorm(BMI_first_second_imaging) ~ BMD_missingness, data=.)
summary(anova_result) #Age: p<2e-16, BMI: p=1.68e-05, rt_BMFF: p=7.25e-10
summary(anova_result) #Age: p<2e-16, BMI: p=1.68e-05, rt_BMFF: p=3.47e-11

#Perform Chi-squared for sex: p=0.473
contingency_table <- table(Spine_BMFF_df_covariates$Sex, Spine_BMFF_df_covariates$BMD_missingness)

# Perform the chi-squared test
chi_squared_test <- chisq.test(contingency_table)
chi_squared_test

#Femoral head
Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[,-c(14)], T2D_df[,c(1,3)], by='eid') #Skip this for non-T2D cohort
Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df, Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid', all=T)
Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates= Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates[!is.na(Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates$rt_BMFF),]

result <- mcar_test(Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates[,c(3:6,25)]) #p=0

Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates$BMD_missingness = ifelse(is.na(Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates$`Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging.y`), "Missing", "Complete")
count(Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates$BMD_missingness)

# Outcome variables: BMI_first_second_imaging, Age_first_second_imaging and rt_BMFF 

# Perform ANOVA - BMFF, Age and BMI
anova_result <- Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates %>% aov(RankNorm(Age_first_second_imaging) ~ BMD_missingness, data = .)
summary(anova_result) # Age: p<2e-16, BMI: p=0.0012, rt_BMFF: p=0.816
summary(anova_result) # Age: p<2e-16, BMI: p=0.0022, rt_BMFF: p=0.840

# Perform Chi-squared for sex: p=0.022
contingency_table <- table(Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates$Sex, Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates$BMD_missingness)

# Perform the chi-squared test
chi_squared_test <- chisq.test(contingency_table)
chi_squared_test

#Total hip
Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df[,-c(14)], T2D_df[,c(1,3)], by='eid') #Skip this for non-T2D cohort
Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df, Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid', all=T)
Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates= Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates[!is.na(Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates$rt_BMFF),]

result <- mcar_test(Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates[,c(3:6,25)]) #p=0

Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates$BMD_missingness = ifelse(is.na(Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates$`Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging.y`), "Missing", "Complete")
count(Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates$BMD_missingness)

# Outcome variables: BMI_first_second_imaging, Age_first_second_imaging and rt_BMFF 

# Perform ANOVA - BMFF, Age and BMI
anova_result <- Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates %>% aov(RankNorm(Age_first_second_imaging) ~ BMD_missingness, data = .)
summary(anova_result) # Age: p<2e-16, BMI: p=6.72e-04 rt_BMFF: p=0.855
summary(anova_result) # Age: p<2e-16, BMI: p=6.18e-04 rt_BMFF: p=0.662

# Perform Chi-squared for sex: p=0.0122
contingency_table <- table(Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates$Sex, Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates$BMD_missingness)

# Perform the chi-squared test
chi_squared_test <- chisq.test(contingency_table)
chi_squared_test

#Dipahysis
Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df[,-c(14)], T2D_df[,c(1,3)], by='eid') #Skip this for non-T2D cohort
Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df, Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid', all=T)
Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates= Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates[!is.na(Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates$rt_BMFF),]

result <- mcar_test(Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates[,c(3:6,25)]) #p=0

Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates$BMD_missingness = ifelse(is.na(Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates$`Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging.y`), "Missing", "Complete")
count(Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates$BMD_missingness)

# Outcome variables: BMI_first_second_imaging, Age_first_second_imaging and rt_BMFF 

# Perform ANOVA - BMFF, Age and BMI
anova_result <- Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates %>% aov(RankNorm(Age_first_second_imaging) ~ BMD_missingness, data = .)
summary(anova_result) # Age: p<2e-16, BMI: p=3.10e-05, rt_BMFF: p=0.121
summary(anova_result) # Age: p<2e-16, BMI: p=2.18e-05, rt_BMFF: p=0.089

# Perform Chi-squared for sex: p=1.93e-04
contingency_table <- table(Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates$Sex, Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates$BMD_missingness)

# Perform the chi-squared test
chi_squared_test <- chisq.test(contingency_table)
chi_squared_test

```


BMD regressions
```{r}
#Spine

Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df = Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df %>% filter(!is.na(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df$rt_BMFF))

#Femoral head
colnames(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df)[14] = "Imp_Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging"
Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df = merge(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df, Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid', all=T)
Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df = Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df %>% filter(!is.na(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df$rt_BMFF))

#Total hip
colnames(Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df)[14] = "Imp_Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging"
Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df = merge(Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df, Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid', all=T)
Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df = Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df %>% filter(!is.na(Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df$rt_BMFF))

#Diaphysis
colnames(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df)[14] = "Imp_Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging"
Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df = merge(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df, Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid', all=T)
Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df = Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df %>% filter(!is.na(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df$rt_BMFF))

#LMs and diagnostics
BMFF_lm = Spine_BMFF_df_covariates %>% lm(`Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging.x`~rt_BMFF*Sex+Age_first_second_imaging+BMI_first_second_imaging, data=.)
summary(BMFF_lm)
confint(BMFF_lm)
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(BMFF_lm)
plot(BMFF_lm, 4)

#Linearity
Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df %>% ggplot(aes(y=Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging, x=rt_BMFF))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm, col = "#0075B2", se=FALSE)+
  geom_smooth(method=loess, col = "darkred", se=FALSE)+
  theme_bw()+
    labs(y = "Spine BMD (g/cm²)", x = "Spine BMFF (normalised)")+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 2.5)),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))
  

#Forloop the lms

# List of data frames and their respective outcome variables
data_frames <- list(
  Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df = c("Imp_Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging", "Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging"),
  Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df = c("Imp_Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging", "Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging"),
  Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df = c("Imp_Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging", "Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging"),
  Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df = c("Imp_Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging", "Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging")
)

# Initialize an empty data frame to store results
results <- data.frame(
  Location = character(),
  Outcome = character(),
  Beta = numeric(),
  CI_lower = numeric(),
  CI_upper = numeric(),
  p_value = numeric(),
  R_squared = numeric(),
  Participant_Count = integer(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Function to perform regression and store results
perform_regression <- function(df, outcome, group_label) {
  # Count participants excluding NA
  participant_count <- sum(!is.na(df[[outcome]]))
  
  lm_model <- lm(as.formula(paste(outcome, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging")), data = df)
  summary_model <- summary(lm_model)
  beta <- summary_model$coefficients["rt_BMFF", "Estimate"]
  ci <- confint(lm_model)["rt_BMFF", ]
  p_value <- summary_model$coefficients["rt_BMFF", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  r_squared <- summary_model$r.squared
  
  result <- data.frame(
    Location = group_label,
    Outcome = outcome,
    Beta = beta,
    CI_lower = ci[1],
    CI_upper = ci[2],
    p_value = p_value,
    R_squared = r_squared,
    Participant_Count = participant_count
  )
  
  return(result)
}

# Loop over each data frame and outcome variable
for (df_name in names(data_frames)) {
  outcomes <- data_frames[[df_name]]
  df <- get(df_name)
  
  for (outcome in outcomes) {
    # Perform regression for both sexes
    results <- rbind(results, perform_regression(df, outcome, paste(df_name, "Both", sep = "_")))
    
    # Perform regression for females
    df_female <- subset(df, Sex == 'F')
    results <- rbind(results, perform_regression(df_female, outcome, paste(df_name, "F", sep = "_")))
    
    # Perform regression for males
    df_male <- subset(df, Sex == 'M')
    results <- rbind(results, perform_regression(df_male, outcome, paste(df_name, "M", sep = "_")))
  }
}

# View the results
print(results)

results = arrange(results, results$Location)

export(results, 'BMD_BMFF_lms.xlsx')

#lm plots
Spine_BMD_BMFF_plot = Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df %>% ggplot(aes(y=Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging, x=rt_BMFF, fill=Sex))+
  ggtitle("Spine BMD vs spine BMFF")+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm, col = "black")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("F" = "darkred", "M" = "#0075B2"),
  labels = c("Female :\nβ = -0.027 (-0.028, -0.025)\nR² = 0.255\np<2e-16", "Male :\nβ = -0.024 (-0.026, -0.022)\nR² = 0.173\np<2e-16"))+
  theme_bw()+
  geom_point(shape = 21, alpha = 0.5)+
  labs(y = "Spine BMD (g/cm²)", x = "Spine BMFF (normalised)")+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 27, face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 27, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 2.5)),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 27, face = "bold"),
```

Osteoporosis regressions
```{r}
OP_Spine_BMFF_df = merge(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, PheWAS_final_table[,c('eid', '743.11')])
OP_Spine_BMFF_df = OP_Spine_BMFF_df %>% filter(!is.na(OP_Spine_BMFF_df$`743.11`))
OP_Femoral_head_BMFF_df = merge(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df, PheWAS_final_table[,c('eid', '743.11')])
OP_Total_hip_BMFF_df = merge(Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df, PheWAS_final_table[,c('eid', '743.11')])
OP_Diaphysis_BMFF_df = merge(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df, PheWAS_final_table[,c('eid', '743.11')])

BMFF_OP_glm = OP_Diaphysis_BMFF_df %>% glm(`743.11`~rt_BMFF*Sex+BMI_first_second_imaging+Age_first_second_imaging, family=binomial, data=.)
summary(BMFF_OP_glm)$coefficients
OR_BMFF_OP = exp(cbind(OR = coef(BMFF_OP_glm), confint(BMFF_OP_glm)))[-1, , drop=F]
OR_BMFF_OP

#Prevalence rates of OP
OP_Spine_BMFF_df %>% 
  summarise(
    cases_count = sum(`743.11`, na.rm = TRUE),
    control_count = sum(`743.11` == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

#Diagnostics
BMFF_OP_glm <- OP_Total_hip_BMFF_df %>%
  glm(`743.11` ~ rt_BMFF * Sex + BMI_first_second_imaging + Age_first_second_imaging, 
      family = binomial, data = .)
summary(BMFF_OP_glm)

plot(BMFF_OP_glm, 4)
vif(BMFF_OP_glm)

#Correlogram

# Initialize a matrix for Adjusted R-squared values
adj_R_squared_matrix <- matrix(NA, nrow = 3, ncol = 3)
colnames(adj_R_squared_matrix) <- rownames(adj_R_squared_matrix) <- c("Spine BMFF", "Age", "BMI")

# Fill the matrix with Adjusted R-squared values
variables <- colnames(OP_Spine_BMFF_df[, c(3,4,6)])
for (i in seq_along(variables)) {
  for (j in seq_along(variables)) {
    if (i != j) {
      model <- lm(OP_Spine_BMFF_df[[variables[i]]] ~ OP_Spine_BMFF_df[[variables[j]]])
      adj_R_squared_matrix[i, j] <- summary(model)$adj.r.squared
    } else {
      adj_R_squared_matrix[i, j] <- 1
    }
  }
}

# Create the corrplot using the Adjusted R-squared matrix
corrplot(adj_R_squared_matrix, 
         method = 'color', 
         type = 'upper',
         addCoef.col = "black", # Add labels with Adjusted R-squared values
         number.cex = 1.2,      # Size of the text
         tl.srt = 45, 
         tl.col = "black")

#All continuous exposures
probabilities <- predict(BMFF_OP_glm, type = "response")

mydata <- OP_Spine_BMFF_df[,c(3,4,6,29)] %>%
  dplyr::select_if(is.numeric) 
predictors <- colnames(mydata)
# Bind the logit and tidying the data for plot
mydata <- mydata %>%
  mutate(logit = log(probabilities/(1-probabilities))) %>%
  gather(key = "predictors", value = "predictor.value", -logit)

ggplot(mydata, aes(logit, predictor.value))+
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se=FALSE) + 
  theme_bw() + 
  facet_wrap(~predictors, scales = "free_y")

OP_Spine_BMFF_df <- OP_Spine_BMFF_df %>%
  mutate(logit = log(probabilities/(1-probabilities)))

# Calculate the logit for the numeric predictors only - WITHOUT the intercept
coefficients <- coef(BMFF_OP_glm)[-1]

OP_Spine_BMFF_df$logit_no_intercept <- with(OP_Spine_BMFF_df,
  coefficients['rt_BMFF'] * rt_BMFF +
  coefficients['BMI_first_second_imaging'] * BMI_first_second_imaging +
  coefficients['Age_first_second_imaging'] * Age_first_second_imaging 
)

# Plot - linear and LOESS without intercept
ggplot(OP_Spine_BMFF_df, aes(y = rt_BMFF, x = logit_no_intercept)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.05) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, col='darkred') +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, col='#0075B2') +
  labs(y = "Spine BMFF (normalised)", x = "logit") +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 2.5)),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

# Plot - linear and LOESS with intercept
ggplot(OP_Spine_BMFF_df, aes(y = rt_BMFF, x = logit)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.05) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, col='darkred') +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, col='#0075B2') +
  labs(y = "Spine BMFF (normalised)", x = "logit") +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 2.5)),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

#Forest plot
BMFF_OP_df <- data.frame(
  Index = c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8), ## This provides an order to the data
  Skeletal_region = c("Spine BMFF", "Spine BMFF", "Femoral head BMFF", "Femoral head BMFF",  "Total hip BMFF", "Total hip BMFF",  "Diaphysis BMFF", "Diaphysis BMFF"),
  Sex = c("Female", "Male", "Female", "Male", "Female", "Male", "Female", "Male"),
  p = c(2.624e-22, 1.422e-03, 1.179e-22, 0.272, 7.087e-32, 2.847e-03, 1.253e-22, 1.653e-03),
  OR = c(1.475, 1.313, 1.544, 1.105, 1.596, 1.319, 1.477, 1.349),
  LL = c(1.395, 1.109, 1.416, 0.927, 1.477, 1.100, 1.366, 1.121),
  UL = c(1.570, 1.550, 1.684, 1.324, 1.726, 1.582, 1.598, 1.627)
)

BMFF_OP_df$Skeletal_region <- factor(BMFF_OP_df$Skeletal_region, levels=c("Spine BMFF", "Femoral head BMFF", "Total hip BMFF", "Diaphysis BMFF"))
BMFF_OP_df$Sex <- factor(BMFF_OP_df$Sex, levels=c('Female', 'Male'))

OP_BMFF_forest_plot = ggplot(BMFF_OP_df, aes(y = Index, x = OR, shape=Skeletal_region, col=Sex)) +
  ggtitle("Osteoporosis vs BMFF") +
  geom_point(aes(col=Sex, size=-log10(p))) +  
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = LL, xmax = UL), height = 0.25) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", cex = 1, alpha = 0.5) +
  xlab("Odds Ratio (95% CI)") + 
  ylab(" ") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, face="bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20, face="bold")) +
  theme(legend.title=element_text(size = 20, face="bold")) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold")) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=24, face="bold.italic", hjust = 0.5)) +  # Center the title
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank()) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Female" = "darkred", "Male" = "#0075B2")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Spine BMFF" = 15, "Femoral head BMFF" = 16, "Total hip BMFF" = 17, "Diaphysis BMFF" = 18)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = seq(2.5, length(unique(BMFF_OP_df$Index)) - 0.5, by = 2), color = "gray", linetype = "dashed", cex = 0.5) +
  guides(shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5))) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

OP_BMFF_forest_plot

ggsave(filename = "OP_BMFF_forest_plot.png", plot = OP_BMFF_forest_plot, device = "png", width = 20, height = 12)
  
```

```{r}
Spine_BMFF_df = merge(Spine_BMFF_final_df, Age_sex_imaging_df, by='eid')
count(Spine_BMFF_df$Sex)

#Merge with Wei's PheWAS df to get the continuous age measure and replace the NAs with ages from current df
Spine_BMFF_df = merge(Spine_BMFF_df, Spine_BMFF_PheWAS_df[,c(1,12)], by='eid', all=T)
Spine_BMFF_df <- Spine_BMFF_df %>%
  mutate(Age_imaging = ifelse(is.na(Age_imaging), Age_first_second_imaging, Age_imaging))

#Plot BMFF vs age in males and females separately
Spine_sex <- na.omit(Spine_BMFF_df) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Age_imaging, y = `Mean.fat`, fill = Sex)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", col = "black") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Age at imaging (years)", y = "Spine BMFF (%)") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = " ", 
                    values = c("F" = "darkred", "M" = "#0075B2"),
                    labels = c("Females (n=25,975)", "Males (n=24,233)")) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold"))

Spine_sex

ggsave(plot=Spine_sex, "Spine_sex.png", device = "png", width = 17, height = 12)

#Merge with 'composite' HRT data frame
Spine_BMFF_HRT_df = merge(Spine_BMFF_df, Medications_specified_list[,c(1,31)], by='eid')
Spine_BMFF_HRT_df = merge(Spine_BMFF_HRT_df, ukb675209_medications_T2D_HT_weightloss_OP_HRT_HC[,c(1,16:18)], by='eid')
Spine_BMFF_HRT_df <- Spine_BMFF_HRT_df %>%
  mutate(HRT_ever_medication = ifelse(HRT_ever == 'Yes' | 
                                      `anti-HRT-0.0` == 'anti-HRT' | 
                                      `anti-HRT-1.0` == 'anti-HRT' | 
                                      `anti-HRT-2.0` == 'anti-HRT', 
                                      'Yes', 'No'))

Spine_BMFF_female_HRT_df = subset(Spine_BMFF_HRT_df, Sex=='F')
count(Spine_BMFF_female_HRT_df$HRT_ever) #10864
count(Spine_BMFF_female_HRT_df$HRT_ever_medication) #10864

#Find participants taking HRT during the time of imaging, i.e. those who stopped taking HRT AFTER imaging (age as time-scale varaible)
Spine_BMFF_HRT_df <- Spine_BMFF_HRT_df %>%
  mutate(HRT_during_imaging = ifelse(
    Age_stopped_HRT_2 >= Age_first_second_imaging | Age_stopped_HRT_3 >= Age_first_second_imaging,
    "Yes",
    "No"
  ))

#Find participants who took HRT BEFORE the time of imaging, i.e. those who stopped taking HRT BEFORE imaging (age as time-scale varaible)
Spine_BMFF_HRT_df <- Spine_BMFF_HRT_df %>%
  mutate(HRT_before_imaging = ifelse(
    Age_stopped_HRT_0 < Age_first_second_imaging | Age_stopped_HRT_1 < Age_first_second_imaging | Age_stopped_HRT_2 < Age_first_second_imaging | Age_stopped_HRT_3 < Age_first_second_imaging,
    "Yes",
    "No"
  ))

#Convert all NAs to No
Spine_BMFF_HRT_df <- Spine_BMFF_HRT_df %>%
  mutate(HRT_during_imaging = ifelse(is.na(HRT_during_imaging), "No", HRT_during_imaging))

Spine_BMFF_HRT_df <- Spine_BMFF_HRT_df %>%
  mutate(HRT_ever = ifelse(is.na(HRT_ever), "No", HRT_ever))

count(Spine_BMFF_HRT_df$HRT_during_imaging) #454 taking HRT DURING imaging
count(Spine_BMFF_HRT_df$HRT_ever) #10,876

Spine_female_HRT_df = subset(Spine_BMFF_HRT_df, Spine_BMFF_HRT_df$Sex=='F')
count(Spine_female_HRT_df$HRT_during_imaging) #454
count(Spine_female_HRT_df$HRT_ever) #10,864

#Merge with anthropometrics, BMD and body composition 

Spine_BMFF_HRT_BC_df = merge(Spine_BMFF_HRT_df, Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,6,7,14,20:24)], by='eid')

Spine_female_HRT_BC_df = subset(Spine_BMFF_HRT_BC_df, Spine_BMFF_HRT_BC_df$Sex=='F')
Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$rt_BMFF = RankNorm(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Mean.fat)

#Spine BMFF ~ HRT during

#Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging<50
#Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>=50 & Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging<60
#Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>=60 & Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging<70
#Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>=70 & Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging<80
#Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80

#Count
Spine_female_HRT_BC_df %>%
  filter(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80) %>%
  summarise(
    unmedicated_count = sum(HRT_during_imaging == 'No'),
    HRT_count = sum(HRT_during_imaging == 'Yes')
  )

Spine_female_HRT_BC_df %>%
  filter(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80) %>%
  summarise(
    unmedicated_count = sum(HRT_ever == 'No'),
    HRT_count = sum(HRT_ever == 'Yes')
  )

#Calculate Median-IQR 
Spine_female_HRT_BC_df %>%
  filter(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80&HRT_during_imaging == 'No') %>%
  summarise(
    median_value = median(`Mean.fat`, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_value = IQR(`Mean.fat`, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(output = paste0(median_value, "±", IQR_value))

Spine_female_HRT_BC_df %>%
  filter(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80&HRT_during_imaging == 'Yes') %>%
  summarise(
    median_value = median(`Mean.fat`, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_value = IQR(`Mean.fat`, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(output = paste0(median_value, "±", IQR_value))

Spine_female_HRT_BC_df %>%
  filter(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80&HRT_ever == 'No') %>%
  summarise(
    median_value = median(`Mean.fat`, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_value = IQR(`Mean.fat`, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(output = paste0(median_value, "±", IQR_value))

Spine_female_HRT_BC_df %>%
  filter(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80&HRT_ever == 'Yes') %>%
  summarise(
    median_value = median(`Mean.fat`, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_value = IQR(`Mean.fat`, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(output = paste0(median_value, "±", IQR_value))


#Unadjusted
Spine_female_HRT_during_aov <- subset(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df, Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80) %>%  aov(rt_BMFF ~ HRT_during_imaging, data = .)
summary(Spine_female_HRT_during_aov)

Spine_female_HRT_during_aov <- subset(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df, Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80) %>%  aov(rt_BMFF ~ HRT_ever, data = .)
summary(Spine_female_HRT_during_aov)

#BMI
Spine_female_HRT_during_aov <- subset(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df, Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80) %>%  aov(rt_BMFF ~ HRT_during_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging, data = .)
summary(Spine_female_HRT_during_aov)

Spine_female_HRT_during_aov <- subset(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df, Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80) %>%  aov(rt_BMFF ~ HRT_ever + BMI_first_second_imaging, data = .)
summary(Spine_female_HRT_during_aov)

#BMI + BMD
Spine_female_HRT_during_aov <- subset(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df, Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80) %>%  aov(rt_BMFF ~ HRT_during_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging , data = .)
summary(Spine_female_HRT_during_aov)

Spine_female_HRT_during_aov <- subset(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df, Age_first_second_imaging>=50&Age_first_second_imaging<60) %>%  aov(rt_BMFF ~ HRT_ever + BMI_first_second_imaging + Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging , data = .)
summary(Spine_female_HRT_during_aov)

#BMD + BC-PCs
Spine_female_HRT_during_aov <- subset(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df, Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80) %>%  aov(rt_BMFF ~ HRT_during_imaging + Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging + PC1 + PC2 + PC3 + PC4 + PC5, data = .)
summary(Spine_female_HRT_during_aov)

Spine_female_HRT_during_aov <- subset(Spine_female_HRT_BC_df, Spine_female_HRT_BC_df$Age_imaging>80) %>%  aov(rt_BMFF ~ HRT_ever + Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging + PC1 + PC2 + PC3 + PC4 + PC5, data = .)
summary(Spine_female_HRT_during_aov)

        legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
```
