Anthropometry and BC MV-lms

Spine BMFF
```{r}
Spine_BMFF_final_df$rt_BMFF = RankNorm(Spine_BMFF_final_df$Mean.fat)

#Merge all of the outcome variables with Spine BMFF into one data frame
data_frames <- list(
  Spine_BMFF_final_df[,c(1,4,9)],
  Age_sex_imaging_df,
  BMI_imaging_df,
  WHR_imaging_df,
  VAT_imaging_df,
  ASAT_imaging_df,
  TTMFI_imaging_df,
  TTFFMVi_imaging_df,
  Liver_PDFF_imaging_df,
  Pancreas_PDFF_imaging_df,
  Spine_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)],
  Total_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)],
  Android_fat_imaging_df, #DXA body composition variable - not necessary for the analyses
  Gynoid_fat_imaging_df, #DXA body composition variable - not necessary for the analyses
  Legs_fat_imaging_df, #DXA body composition variable - not necessary for the analyses
  Total_fat_imaging_df, #DXA body composition variable - not necessary for the analyses
  Trunk_fat_imaging_df #DXA body composition variable - not necessary for the analyses
)

#Or use simplified code below, both produce the same sample sized data frame (50,208)
data_frames <- list(
  Spine_BMFF_final_df[,c(1,4,9)],
  Age_sex_imaging_df,
  MRI_model_3_covariate_df,
  Spine_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)],
  Total_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], #Add Total BMD and impute alongside other covariates for sensitivity analysis (06/10/2025)
  DXA_model_3_covariate_df
)


# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Spine_BMFF_regressions_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)

#Remove NAs from BMFF column only - and from sex and age columns
Spine_BMFF_regressions_df <- Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Spine_BMFF_regressions_df$rt_BMFF), ]
Spine_BMFF_regressions_df <- Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Spine_BMFF_regressions_df$Sex), ]
Spine_BMFF_regressions_df <- Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Spine_BMFF_regressions_df$Age_first_second_imaging), ]

#Check the quantity of missing outcome variables

total_sample_size <- 50208

# List of column names to check for missing values
columns_to_check <- c(
  "BMI_first_second_imaging",
  "WHR_first_second_imaging",
  "VATi_first_second_imaging",
  "ASATi_first_second_imaging",
  "TTMFI_first_second_imaging",
  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging",
  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging",
  "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging",
  "Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging",
  "Total_BMD_first_second_imaging",
  "Android_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Total_fat_first_second_imaging"
)

# For loop to count missing values and calculate percentage
for (column in columns_to_check) {
  missing_count <- sum(is.na(Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[[column]]))
  missing_percentage <- (missing_count / total_sample_size) * 100
  cat(column, ": ", missing_count, " missing values (", round(missing_percentage, 2), "%)\n")
}

#BMI_first_second_imaging :  1216  missing values ( 2.42 %)
#WHR_first_second_imaging :  1048  missing values ( 2.09 %)
#VATi_first_second_imaging :  119  missing values ( 0.24 %)
#ASATi_first_second_imaging :  217  missing values ( 0.43 %)
#TTMFI_first_second_imaging :  932  missing values ( 1.86 %)
#TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging :  785  missing values ( 1.56 %)
#Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging :  21459  missing values ( 42.74 %)
#Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging :  10641  missing values ( 21.19 %)
#Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging :  7465  missing values ( 14.87 %)
#Total_BMD_first_second_imaging :  7460  missing values ( 14.86 %)
#Android_fat_first_second_imaging :  7457  missing values ( 14.85 %)
#Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging :  7457  missing values ( 14.85 %)
#Legs_fat_first_second_imaging :  7457  missing values ( 14.85 %)
#Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging :  7457  missing values ( 14.85 %)
#Total_fat_first_second_imaging :  7457  missing values ( 14.85 %)

# Display the pattern of missing data
vis_miss(Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,6:11],cluster = TRUE)

#Impute missing values <10% and Spine BMD and Total BMD
variables_to_impute <- c("BMI_first_second_imaging", "WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging", "Total_BMD_first_second_imaging")

# Perform multiple imputation
imputed_data <- mice(Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[variables_to_impute], m = 5, method = 'pmm', maxit = 50, seed = 123)

# To check the imputed data, you can use:
summary(imputed_data)

# If you want to complete the data with imputed values, use:
completed_data <- complete(imputed_data, action = "long")
completed_data = completed_data[-c(9,10)]

# Replace original NA values with imputed values
Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df = Spine_BMFF_regressions_df
Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[variables_to_impute] <- completed_data

#Density plots
plot_list <- list()

# Loop over each variable and create a density plot
for (var in variables_to_impute) {
  plot <- ggplot() +
    geom_density(aes_string(x = paste0("Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df$", var)), color = "blue") +
    geom_density(aes_string(x = paste0("Spine_BMFF_regressions_df$", var)), color = "red") +
    xlab(var) +
    ylab("Density") +
    theme_bw() +
    ggtitle(paste("Density Plot for", var))
  
  # Add the plot to the list
  plot_list[[var]] <- plot
}

# Print each plot
for (var in variables_to_impute) {
  print(plot_list[[var]])
}

#Run BMI separately, as this is part of the covariate list for the other regressions

#Model 1 
Spine_model_1_regressions = Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df %>% lm(BMI_first_second_imaging~rt_BMFF*Sex+Age_first_second_imaging, data=.)
summary(Spine_model_1_regressions)
summary(Spine_model_1_regressions)$coefficients
confint(Spine_model_1_regressions)
count(!is.na(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df$BMI_first_second_imaging))

Spine_model_1_regressions_F = subset(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex=='F') %>% lm(BMI_first_second_imaging~rt_BMFF+Age_first_second_imaging, data=.)
summary(Spine_model_1_regressions_F)
summary(Spine_model_1_regressions_F)$coefficients
confint(Spine_model_1_regressions_F)
Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df %>%
  filter(Sex == 'F') %>%
  summarize(Count = sum(!is.na(BMI_first_second_imaging)))

Spine_model_1_regressions_M = subset(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex=='M') %>% lm(BMI_first_second_imaging~rt_BMFF+Age_first_second_imaging, data=.)
summary(Spine_model_1_regressions_M)
summary(Spine_model_1_regressions_M)$coefficients
confint(Spine_model_1_regressions_M)
Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df %>%
  filter(Sex == 'M') %>%
  summarize(Count = sum(!is.na(BMI_first_second_imaging)))

#Model 2 
Spine_model_1_regressions = Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df %>% lm(BMI_first_second_imaging~rt_BMFF*Sex+Age_first_second_imaging+Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging, data=.)
summary(Spine_model_1_regressions)
summary(Spine_model_1_regressions)$coefficients
confint(Spine_model_1_regressions)

Spine_model_1_regressions_F = subset(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex=='F') %>% lm(BMI_first_second_imaging~rt_BMFF+Age_first_second_imaging+Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging, data=.)
summary(Spine_model_1_regressions_F)
summary(Spine_model_1_regressions_F)$coefficients
confint(Spine_model_1_regressions_F)

Spine_model_1_regressions_M = subset(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex=='M') %>% lm(BMI_first_second_imaging~rt_BMFF+Age_first_second_imaging+Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging, data=.)
summary(Spine_model_1_regressions_M)
summary(Spine_model_1_regressions_M)$coefficients
confint(Spine_model_1_regressions_M)

#For-loop multivariate lms

#Model 1
outcome_vars <- c("WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", 
                  "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", 
                  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging", "Android_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging", "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging")

# Initialize an empty list to store results
results_list <- list()

# Function to extract summary statistics
extract_results <- function(model, data_subset, outcome_var) {
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  conf_int <- confint(model)
  r_squared <- summary(model)$r.squared
  n_participants <- sum(!is.na(data_subset[[outcome_var]]))  # Count non-NA participants for the outcome variable
  data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary),
    Estimate = coef_summary[, "Estimate"],
    `95% CI Lower` = conf_int[, 1],
    `95% CI Upper` = conf_int[, 2],
    `R-squared` = r_squared,
    `p-value` = coef_summary[, "Pr(>|t|)"],
    `N Participants` = n_participants  # Add participant count
  )
}

# Loop over each outcome variable
for (var in outcome_vars) {
  # All sexes
  data_all <- Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df
  model_all <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF*Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging")), data = data_all)
  results_all <- extract_results(model_all, data_all, var)
  results_all$Group <- "All"
  results_all$Outcome <- var
  
  # Females
  data_female <- subset(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == 'F')
  model_female <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging")), data = data_female)
  results_female <- extract_results(model_female, data_female, var)
  results_female$Group <- "Female"
  results_female$Outcome <- var
  
  # Males
  data_male <- subset(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == 'M')
  model_male <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging")), data = data_male)
  results_male <- extract_results(model_male, data_male, var)
  results_male$Group <- "Male"
  results_male$Outcome <- var
  
  # Combine all results
  results_list[[var]] <- rbind(results_all, results_female, results_male)
}

# Combine all results into a single data frame
final_results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)

final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate(
    Beta_CI = paste0(
      round(Estimate, 3), " (",
      round(`X95..CI.Lower`, 3), ", ",
      round(`X95..CI.Upper`, 3), ")"
    )
  )


Spine_model_1_final_df = final_results[,c(1,9,8,7,10,5,6)]
Spine_model_1_final_df = subset(Spine_model_1_final_df, Spine_model_1_final_df$Variable == "rt_BMFF")
Spine_model_1_final_df$Outcome <- gsub("_first_second_imaging", "", Spine_model_1_final_df$Outcome)
Spine_model_1_final_df$`Adj.model` = "Model 1"
Spine_BMI_model_1_df = data.frame(
  Variable = c("rt_BMFF", "rt_BMFF", "rt_BMFF"),
  Outcome = c("BMI", "BMI", "BMI"),
  Group = c("All", "Female", "Male"),
  N.Participants = c(50208, 25975, 24233),
  Beta_CI = c("-0.054 (-0.114, -0.0003)", "-0.100 (-0.163, -0.371)", "0.206 (0.153, 0.258)" ),
  `R.squared` = c(0.014, 0.001, 0.006),
  `p.value` = c(0.039, 0.0018, 1.31E-14),
  `Adj.model` = c("Model 1", "Model 1", "Model 1")
)

Spine_model_1_final_df = rbind(Spine_BMI_model_1_df, Spine_model_1_final_df)
Spine_model_1_final_df$p.value <- ifelse(
  Spine_model_1_final_df$p.value == 0,
  "<2e-16",
  Spine_model_1_final_df$p.value
)

export(Spine_model_1_final_df, "Spine_model_1_final_df.csv")

# Model 2

outcome_vars <- c("WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", 
                  "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", 
                  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging", "Android_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging", "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging")

# Initialize an empty list to store results
results_list <- list()

# Function to extract summary statistics
extract_results <- function(model, data_subset) {
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  conf_int <- confint(model)
  r_squared <- summary(model)$r.squared
  n_participants <- nrow(data_subset)  # Count the number of participants
  data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary),
    Estimate = coef_summary[, "Estimate"],
    `95% CI Lower` = conf_int[, 1],
    `95% CI Upper` = conf_int[, 2],
    `R-squared` = r_squared,
    `p-value` = coef_summary[, "Pr(>|t|)"],
    `N Participants` = n_participants  # Add participant count
  )
}

# Loop over each outcome variable
for (var in outcome_vars) {
  # All sexes
  data_all <- Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df
  model_all <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF*Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging")), data = data_all)
  results_all <- extract_results(model_all, data_all)
  results_all$Group <- "All"
  results_all$Outcome <- var
  
  # Females
  data_female <- subset(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == 'F')
  model_female <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging")), data = data_female)
  results_female <- extract_results(model_female, data_female)
  results_female$Group <- "Female"
  results_female$Outcome <- var
  
  # Males
  data_male <- subset(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == 'M')
  model_male <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging")), data = data_male)
  results_male <- extract_results(model_male, data_male)
  results_male$Group <- "Male"
  results_male$Outcome <- var
  
  # Combine all results
  results_list[[var]] <- rbind(results_all, results_female, results_male)
}

# Combine all results into a single data frame
final_results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)

final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate(
    Beta_CI = paste0(
      round(Estimate, 3), " (",
      round(`95% CI Lower`, 3), ", ",
      round(`95% CI Upper`, 3), ")"
    )
  )

# View the final results
print(final_results)


Spine_model_2_final_df = final_results[,c(1,8,7,9,5,6)]
Spine_model_2_final_df = subset(Spine_model_2_final_df, Spine_model_2_final_df$Variable == "rt_BMFF")
Spine_model_2_final_df$Outcome <- gsub("_first_second_imaging", "", Spine_model_2_final_df$Outcome)
Spine_model_2_final_df$`Adj.model` = "Model 2"
Spine_BMI_model_2_df = data.frame(
  Variable = c("rt_BMFF", "rt_BMFF", "rt_BMFF"),
  Outcome = c("BMI", "BMI", "BMI"),
  Group = c("All", "Female", "Male"),
  Beta_CI = c("0.344 (0.293, 0.395)", "0.311 (0.254, 0.367)", "0.398 (0.349, 0.446)"),
  `R.squared` = c(0.197, 0.241, 0.163),
  `p.value` = c("<2e-16", "<2e-16", "<2e-16"),
  `Adj.model` = c("Model 2", "Model 2", "Model 2")
)

Spine_model_2_final_df = rbind(Spine_BMI_model_2_df, Spine_model_2_final_df)
Spine_model_2_final_df$p.value <- ifelse(
  Spine_model_2_final_df$p.value == 0,
  "<2e-16",
  Spine_model_2_final_df$p.value
)

#Combine model 1 and 2 data frames into one data frame
Spine_linear_regressions_df = rbind(Spine_model_1_final_df[,2:7], Spine_model_2_final_df[,2:7])
Spine_linear_regressions_df$Primary.exposure = "Spine BMFF"
Spine_linear_regressions_df <- Spine_linear_regressions_df %>%
  select(Primary.exposure, everything())

colnames(Spine_linear_regressions_df) = c('Primary exposure', 'Outcome', 'Sex', 'Beta (95% CI)', 'R²', 'P', 'Adjustment model')
Spine_linear_regressions_df$Sex <- ifelse(
  Spine_linear_regressions_df$Sex == 'All',
  "Both",
  Spine_linear_regressions_df$Sex
)

export(Spine_linear_regressions_df, 'Spine_linear_regressions_df.csv')
export(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, 'Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df.csv')

#MV-lm diagnostics

#Linearity of the data. The relationship between the predictor (x) and the outcome (y) is assumed to be linear.
#Normality of residuals. The residual errors are assumed to be normally distributed.
#Homogeneity of residuals variance. The residuals are assumed to have a constant variance (homoscedasticity)
#Independence of residuals error terms.

#Example
Spine_model_1_regressions = Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df %>% lm(rt_BMFF~BMI_first_second_imaging*Sex+Age_first_second_imaging+Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging, data=.)
plot(Spine_model_1_regressions)

#Multi-collinearity 
Spine_model_1_regressions_corr_df = Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(3,4,6,14)]
Spine_model_1_regressions_corr = cor(Spine_model_1_regressions_corr_df)

# Calculate the R-squared values
R_squared <- Spine_model_1_regressions_corr^2

# Get p-values for the correlation tests
Spine_model_1_regressions_p_corr <- corr.test(Spine_model_1_regressions_corr_df)$p

# Create the corrplot using R-squared values for coloring
corrplot(R_squared, 
         p.mat = Spine_model_1_regressions_corr, 
         method = 'color', 
         type = 'upper',
         sig.level = c(0.00001, 0.0001, 0.001), 
         pch.cex = 0.9,
         insig = 'label_sig', 
         pch.col = 'grey20', 
         tl.srt = 45, 
         tl.col = "black")

#Collider bias
Spine_model_1_regressions <- lm(BMI_first_second_imaging ~ rt_BMFF * Sex + Age_first_second_imaging, data = Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df)
Spine_model_2_regressions <- lm(BMI_first_second_imaging ~ rt_BMFF * Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging, data = Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df)

# Extract coefficients and confidence intervals
Spine_model_1_coef <- coef(summary(Spine_model_1_regressions))["rt_BMFF", "Estimate"]
Spine_model_1_ci <- confint(Spine_model_1_regressions)["rt_BMFF", ]

Spine_model_2_coef <- coef(summary(Spine_model_2_regressions))["rt_BMFF", "Estimate"]
Spine_model_2_ci <- confint(Spine_model_2_regressions)["rt_BMFF", ]

# Calculate the difference in coefficients
coef_diff <- Spine_model_2_coef - Spine_model_1_coef

# Calculate the standard errors
se1 <- coef(summary(Spine_model_1_regressions))["rt_BMFF", "Std. Error"]
se2 <- coef(summary(Spine_model_2_regressions))["rt_BMFF", "Std. Error"]

# Calculate standard error of the difference
se_diff <- sqrt(se1^2 + se2^2)

# Calculate 95% CI for the difference
ci_diff <- coef_diff + c(-1, 1) * qnorm(0.975) * se_diff

# Output results
list(
  Coefficient_Difference = coef_diff,
  CI_Lower = ci_diff[1],
  CI_Upper = ci_diff[2]
)

#0.4028 (0.3273, 0.4782)

#Get collider bias estimates of greater internal validaity by performing boot-strapping and/or k-fold cross validation

#Bootstrapping

# Load necessary package
library(boot)

# Define a function to compute the difference in coefficients
bootstrap_diff <- function(data, indices) {
  # Resample the data
  resampled_data <- data[indices, ]
  
  # Fit the models on the resampled data
  model_1 <- lm(BMI_first_second_imaging ~ rt_BMFF * Sex + Age_first_second_imaging, data = resampled_data)
  model_2 <- lm(BMI_first_second_imaging ~ rt_BMFF * Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging, data = resampled_data)
  
  # Extract the coefficients for rt_BMFF
  coef_1 <- coef(model_1)["rt_BMFF"]
  coef_2 <- coef(model_2)["rt_BMFF"]
  
  # Calculate the difference
  return(coef_2 - coef_1)
}

# Perform bootstrap
set.seed(123)  # For reproducibility
bootstrap_results <- boot(data = Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, statistic = bootstrap_diff, R = 1000)

# View results
bootstrap_results

# Calculate the mean and confidence intervals
mean_diff <- mean(bootstrap_results$t)
ci_diff <- boot.ci(bootstrap_results, type = "perc")

mean_diff #0.4027
ci_diff #0.3788,  0.4269
#0.4027 (0.3788, 0.4269)

#K-fold cross-validation

library(caret)

set.seed(123) # For reproducibility
k <- 10 # k-value
folds <- createFolds(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df$BMI_first_second_imaging, k = k, list = TRUE)

coef_differences <- numeric(k)
ci_differences <- matrix(0, ncol = 2, nrow = k)

for (i in 1:k) {
  # Split the data
  train_indices <- folds[[i]]
  test_indices <- setdiff(1:nrow(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df), train_indices)
  train_data <- Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[train_indices, ]
  test_data <- Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[test_indices, ]

  # Fit the models on the training data
  model1 <- lm(BMI_first_second_imaging ~ rt_BMFF * Sex + Age_first_second_imaging, data = train_data)
  model2 <- lm(BMI_first_second_imaging ~ rt_BMFF * Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging, data = train_data)

  # Extract coefficients for rt_BMFF
  coef1 <- coef(summary(model1))["rt_BMFF", "Estimate"]
  coef2 <- coef(summary(model2))["rt_BMFF", "Estimate"]

  # Calculate the difference in coefficients
  coef_diff <- coef2 - coef1
  coef_differences[i] <- coef_diff

  # Calculate standard errors
  se1 <- coef(summary(model1))["rt_BMFF", "Std. Error"]
  se2 <- coef(summary(model2))["rt_BMFF", "Std. Error"]

  # Calculate standard error of the difference
  se_diff <- sqrt(se1^2 + se2^2)

  # Calculate 95% CI for the difference
  ci_diff <- coef_diff + c(-1, 1) * qnorm(0.975) * se_diff
  ci_differences[i, ] <- ci_diff
}

# Calculate mean and 95% CI for the coefficient differences
mean_coef_diff <- mean(coef_differences)
mean_ci_lower <- mean(ci_differences[, 1])
mean_ci_upper <- mean(ci_differences[, 2])

cat("Mean Coefficient Difference:", mean_coef_diff, "\n")
cat("95% CI for Coefficient Difference:", mean_ci_lower, "-", mean_ci_upper, "\n")

#0.40246 (0.16375, 0.64116)

```

Spine BMFF: per-SD lms
```{r}
outcome_vars <- c("WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", 
                  "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", 
                  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging", "Android_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging", "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging")

# Initialize an empty list to store results
results_list <- list()

extract_results <- function(model, data_subset, outcome_var) {
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  conf_int <- confint(model)
  r_squared <- summary(model)$r.squared
  n_participants <- sum(!is.na(data_subset[[outcome_var]]))  # Count non-NA participants for the outcome variable
  data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary),
    Estimate = coef_summary[, "Estimate"],
    `95% CI Lower` = conf_int[, 1],
    `95% CI Upper` = conf_int[, 2],
    `R-squared` = r_squared,
    `p-value` = coef_summary[, "Pr(>|t|)"],
    `N Participants` = n_participants  # Add participant count
  )
}

# Loop over each outcome variable
for (var in outcome_vars) {
  for (sex in c("Both", "F", "M")) {
    # Filter data based on sex
    if (sex == "Both") {
      data_subset <- Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df
      formula <- as.formula(paste(paste0(var, "_ranknorm"), "~ rt_Spine_BMFF_std*Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging"))
    } else {
      data_subset <- subset(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == sex)
      formula <- as.formula(paste(paste0(var, "_ranknorm"), "~ rt_Spine_BMFF_std + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging"))
    }
    
    # Remove missing values for the specific outcome variable
    data_subset <- data_subset[!is.na(data_subset[[var]]), ]
    
    # Rank-normalize the outcome variable
    data_subset[[paste0(var, "_ranknorm")]] <- RankNorm(data_subset[[var]])
    
    # Standardize rt_Spine_BMFF
    data_subset$rt_Spine_BMFF_std <- scale(data_subset$rt_Spine_BMFF)

    model <- lm(formula, data = data_subset)
    results <- extract_results(model, data_subset, var)
    results$Group <- ifelse(sex == "Both", "All", sex)
    results$Outcome <- var
    
    # Combine results
    results_list[[paste(var, sex, sep = "_")]] <- results
  }
}

# Combine all results into a single data frame
final_results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)

final_results <- final_results %>%
  filter(Variable == "rt_Spine_BMFF_std")
final_results$Model = "Model 1"

# Model 1 only
Spine_BMFF_SD_lms = final_results

# Rbind with model 2
Spine_BMFF_SD_lms = rbind(final_results, Spine_BMFF_SD_lms)

colnames(Spine_BMFF_SD_lms)[c(3:7)] = c("LL", "UL", "R_squared", "p", "n") 

Spine_BMFF_SD_lms <- Spine_BMFF_SD_lms %>%
  mutate(
    Beta_CI = paste0(
      round(Estimate, 3), " (",
      round(LL, 3), ", ",
      round(UL, 3), ")"
    )
  )

export(Spine_BMFF_SD_lms, "Spine_BMFF_SD_lms.xlsx")

```

Femoral head BMFF
```{r}
Femoral_head_BMFF_final_df$rt_BMFF = RankNorm(Femoral_head_BMFF_final_df$Mean.fat)

# Merge all of the outcome variables with Femoral_head_BMFF into one data frame
data_frames <- list(
  Femoral_head_BMFF_final_df[,c(1,4,9)],
  Age_sex_imaging_df,
  BMI_imaging_df,
  WHR_imaging_df,
  VAT_imaging_df,
  ASAT_imaging_df,
  TTMFI_imaging_df,
  TTFFMVi_imaging_df,
  Liver_PDFF_imaging_df,
  Pancreas_PDFF_imaging_df,
  Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)],
  Android_fat_imaging_df,
  Gynoid_fat_imaging_df,
  Legs_fat_imaging_df,
  Total_fat_imaging_df,
  Trunk_fat_imaging_df
)

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)

# Remove NAs from BMFF column only - and from sex and age columns
Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df <- Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df$rt_BMFF), ]
Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df <- Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df$Sex), ]
Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df <- Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df$Age_first_second_imaging), ]

# Check the quantity of missing outcome variables

total_sample_size <- 47029

# List of column names to check for missing values
columns_to_check <- c(
  "BMI_first_second_imaging",
  "WHR_first_second_imaging",
  "VATi_first_second_imaging",
  "ASATi_first_second_imaging",
  "TTMFI_first_second_imaging",
  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging",
  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging",
  "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging",
  "Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging",
  "Android_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Total_fat_first_second_imaging"
)

# For loop to count missing values and calculate percentage
for (column in columns_to_check) {
  missing_count <- sum(is.na(Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[[column]]))
  missing_percentage <- (missing_count / total_sample_size) * 100
  cat(column, ": ", missing_count, " missing values (", round(missing_percentage, 2), "%)\n")
}


#BMI_first_second_imaging :  1126  missing values ( 2.24 %)
#WHR_first_second_imaging :  979  missing values ( 1.95 %)
#VATi_first_second_imaging :  76  missing values ( 0.15 %)
#ASATi_first_second_imaging :  175  missing values ( 0.35 %)
#TTMFI_first_second_imaging :  751  missing values ( 1.5 %)
#TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging :  613  missing values ( 1.22 %)
#Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging :  20038  missing values ( 39.91 %)
#Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging :  9834  missing values ( 19.59 %)
#Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging :  6907  missing values ( 13.76 %)
#Android_fat_first_second_imaging :  6939  missing values ( 13.82 %)
#Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging :  6939  missing values ( 13.82 %)
#Legs_fat_first_second_imaging :  6939  missing values ( 13.82 %)
#Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging :  6939  missing values ( 13.82 %)
#Total_fat_first_second_imaging :  6939  missing values ( 13.82 %)

# Display the pattern of missing data
vis_miss(Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[,6:11], cluster = TRUE)

# Impute missing values <10% and Spine BMD
variables_to_impute <- c("BMI_first_second_imaging", "WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging")

# Perform multiple imputation
imputed_data <- mice(Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[variables_to_impute], m = 5, method = 'pmm', maxit = 50, seed = 123)

# To check the imputed data, you can use:
summary(imputed_data)

# If you want to complete the data with imputed values, use:
completed_data <- complete(imputed_data, action = "long")
completed_data = completed_data[-c(1,2)]

# Replace original NA values with imputed values
Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df = Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df
Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[variables_to_impute] <- completed_data

#Density plots
plot_list <- list()

# Loop over each variable and create a density plot
for (var in variables_to_impute) {
  plot <- ggplot() +
    geom_density(aes_string(x = paste0("Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df$", var)), color = "blue") +
    geom_density(aes_string(x = paste0("Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df$", var)), color = "red") +
    xlab(var) +
    ylab("Density") +
    theme_bw() +
    ggtitle(paste("Density Plot for", var))
  
  # Add the plot to the list
  plot_list[[var]] <- plot
}

# Print each plot
for (var in variables_to_impute) {
  print(plot_list[[var]])
}

# Run BMI separately, as this is part of the covariate list for the other regressions

# Model 1

# For-loop multivariate lms

# Model 1
outcome_vars <- c("WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", 
                  "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", 
                  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging", "Android_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging", "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging")

# Initialize an empty list to store results
results_list <- list()

extract_results <- function(model, data_subset, outcome_var) {
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  conf_int <- confint(model)
  r_squared <- summary(model)$r.squared
  n_participants <- sum(!is.na(data_subset[[outcome_var]]))  # Count non-NA participants for the outcome variable
  data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary),
    Estimate = coef_summary[, "Estimate"],
    `95% CI Lower` = conf_int[, 1],
    `95% CI Upper` = conf_int[, 2],
    `R-squared` = r_squared,
    `p-value` = coef_summary[, "Pr(>|t|)"],
    `N Participants` = n_participants  # Add participant count
  )
}

# Loop over each outcome variable
for (var in outcome_vars) {
  # All sexes
  data_all <- Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df
  model_all <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF*Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging")), data = data_all)
  results_all <- extract_results(model_all, data_all, var)
  results_all$Group <- "All"
  results_all$Outcome <- var
  
  # Females
  data_female <- subset(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == 'F')
  model_female <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging")), data = data_female)
  results_female <- extract_results(model_female, data_female, var)
  results_female$Group <- "Female"
  results_female$Outcome <- var
  
  # Males
  data_male <- subset(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == 'M')
  model_male <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging")), data = data_male)
  results_male <- extract_results(model_male, data_male, var)
  results_male$Group <- "Male"
  results_male$Outcome <- var
  
  # Combine all results
  results_list[[var]] <- rbind(results_all, results_female, results_male)
}

# Combine all results into a single data frame
final_results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)

final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate(
    Beta_CI = paste0(
      round(Estimate, 3), " (",
      round(`X95..CI.Lower`, 3), ", ",
      round(`X95..CI.Upper`, 3), ")"
    )
  )

Femoral_head_model_1_final_df = final_results[,c(1,9,8,7,10,5,6)]
Femoral_head_model_1_final_df = subset(Femoral_head_model_1_final_df, Femoral_head_model_1_final_df$Variable == "rt_BMFF")
Femoral_head_model_1_final_df$Outcome <- gsub("_first_second_imaging", "", Femoral_head_model_1_final_df$Outcome)
Femoral_head_model_1_final_df$`Adj.model` = "Model 1"
Femoral_head_BMI_model_1_df = data.frame(
  Variable = c("rt_BMFF", "rt_BMFF", "rt_BMFF"),
  Outcome = c("BMI", "BMI", "BMI"),
  Group = c("All", "Female", "Male"),
  N.Participants = c(47209, 25211, 21818),
  Beta_CI = c("-0.033 (-0.035, -0.031)", "-0.033 (-0.035, -0.030)", "-0.049 (-0.053, -0.046)" ),
  `R.squared` = c(0.219, 0.127, 0.041),
  `p.value` = c("<2e-16", "<2e-16", "<2e-16"),
  `Adj.model` = c("Model 1", "Model 1", "Model 1")
)

Femoral_head_model_1_final_df = rbind(Femoral_head_BMI_model_1_df, Femoral_head_model_1_final_df)
Femoral_head_model_1_final_df$p.value <- ifelse(

# Model 2

outcome_vars <- c("WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", 
                  "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", 
                  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging", "Android_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging", "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging")

# Initialize an empty list to store results
results_list <- list()

extract_results <- function(model, data_subset, outcome_var) {
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  conf_int <- confint(model)
  r_squared <- summary(model)$r.squared
  n_participants <- sum(!is.na(data_subset[[outcome_var]]))  # Count non-NA participants for the outcome variable
  data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary),
    Estimate = coef_summary[, "Estimate"],
    `95% CI Lower` = conf_int[, 1],
    `95% CI Upper` = conf_int[, 2],
    `R-squared` = r_squared,
    `p-value` = coef_summary[, "Pr(>|t|)"],
    `N Participants` = n_participants  # Add participant count
  )
}

# Loop over each outcome variable
for (var in outcome_vars) {
  # All sexes
  data_all <- Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df
  model_all <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF*Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging")), data = data_all)
  results_all <- extract_results(model_all, data_all, var)
  results_all$Group <- "All"
  results_all$Outcome <- var
  
  # Females
  data_female <- subset(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == 'F')
  model_female <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging")), data = data_female)
  results_female <- extract_results(model_female, data_female, var)
  results_female$Group <- "Female"
  results_female$Outcome <- var
  
  # Males
  data_male <- subset(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == 'M')
  model_male <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging")), data = data_male)
  results_male <- extract_results(model_male, data_male, var)
  results_male$Group <- "Male"
  results_male$Outcome <- var
  
  # Combine all results
  results_list[[var]] <- rbind(results_all, results_female, results_male)
}

# Combine all results into a single data frame
final_results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)

final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate(
    Beta_CI = paste0(
      round(Estimate, 3), " (",
      round(`X95..CI.Lower`, 3), ", ",
      round(`X95..CI.Upper`, 3), ")"
    )
  )

Femoral_head_model_2_final_df = final_results[,c(1,9,8,7,10,5,6)]
Femoral_head_model_2_final_df = subset(Femoral_head_model_2_final_df, Femoral_head_model_2_final_df$Variable == "rt_BMFF")
Femoral_head_model_2_final_df$Outcome <- gsub("_first_second_imaging", "", Femoral_head_model_2_final_df$Outcome)
Femoral_head_model_2_final_df$`Adj.model` = "Model 2"
Femoral_head_BMI_model_2_df = data.frame(
  Variable = c("rt_BMFF", "rt_BMFF", "rt_BMFF"),
  Outcome = c("BMI", "BMI", "BMI"),
  Group = c("All", "Female", "Male"),
  N.Participants = c(47209, 25211, 21818),
  Beta_CI = c("-0.017 (-0.020, -0.015)", "-0.018 (-0.020, -0.016)", "-0.034 (-0.038, -0.031)" ),
  `R.squared` = c(0.172, 0.189, 0.099),
  `p.value` = c("<2e-16", "<2e-16", "<2e-16"),
  `Adj.model` = c("Model 2", "Model 2", "Model 2")
)

Femoral_head_model_2_final_df = rbind(Femoral_head_BMI_model_2_df, Femoral_head_model_2_final_df)
Femoral_head_model_2_final_df$p.value <- ifelse(
  Femoral_head_model_2_final_df$p.value == 0,
  "<2e-16",
  Femoral_head_model_2_final_df$p.value
)

#Combine model 1 and 2 data frames into one data frame
Femoral_head_linear_regressions_df = rbind(Femoral_head_model_1_final_df[,2:8], Femoral_head_model_2_final_df[,2:8])
Femoral_head_linear_regressions_df$Primary.exposure = "Femoral head BMFF"
Femoral_head_linear_regressions_df <- Femoral_head_linear_regressions_df %>%
  select(Primary.exposure, everything())

colnames(Femoral_head_linear_regressions_df) = c('Primary exposure', 'Outcome', 'Sex', 'n', 'Beta (95% CI)', 'R²', 'P', 'Adjustment model')
Femoral_head_linear_regressions_df$Sex <- ifelse(
  Femoral_head_linear_regressions_df$Sex == 'All',
  "Both",
  Femoral_head_linear_regressions_df$Sex
)

export(Femoral_head_linear_regressions_df, 'Femoral_head_linear_regressions_df.csv')
export(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df, 'Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df.csv')

```

Femoral head: per-SD lms
```{r}
outcome_vars <- c("WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", 
                  "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", 
                  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging", "Android_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging", "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging")

# Initialize an empty list to store results
results_list <- list()

extract_results <- function(model, data_subset, outcome_var) {
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  conf_int <- confint(model)
  r_squared <- summary(model)$r.squared
  n_participants <- sum(!is.na(data_subset[[outcome_var]]))  # Count non-NA participants for the outcome variable
  data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary),
    Estimate = coef_summary[, "Estimate"],
    `95% CI Lower` = conf_int[, 1],
    `95% CI Upper` = conf_int[, 2],
    `R-squared` = r_squared,
    `p-value` = coef_summary[, "Pr(>|t|)"],
    `N Participants` = n_participants  # Add participant count
  )
}

# Loop over each outcome variable
for (var in outcome_vars) {
  for (sex in c("Both", "F", "M")) {
    # Filter data based on sex
    if (sex == "Both") {
      data_subset <- Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df
      formula <- as.formula(paste(paste0(var, "_ranknorm"), "~ rt_Femoral_head_BMFF_std*Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging "))
    } else {
      data_subset <- subset(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == sex)
      formula <- as.formula(paste(paste0(var, "_ranknorm"), "~ rt_Femoral_head_BMFF_std + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging"))
    }
    
    # Remove missing values for the specific outcome variable
    data_subset <- data_subset[!is.na(data_subset[[var]]), ]
    
    # Rank-normalize the outcome variable
    data_subset[[paste0(var, "_ranknorm")]] <- RankNorm(data_subset[[var]])
    
    # Standardize rt_Femoral_head_BMFF
    data_subset$rt_Femoral_head_BMFF_std <- scale(data_subset$rt_Femoral_head_BMFF)

    model <- lm(formula, data = data_subset)
    results <- extract_results(model, data_subset, var)
    results$Group <- ifelse(sex == "Both", "All", sex)
    results$Outcome <- var
    
    # Combine results
    results_list[[paste(var, sex, sep = "_")]] <- results
  }
}

# Combine all results into a single data frame
final_results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)

final_results <- final_results %>%
  filter(Variable == "rt_Femoral_head_BMFF_std")
final_results$Model = "Model 1"

# Model 1 only
Femoral_head_BMFF_SD_lms = final_results

# Rbind with model 2
Femoral_head_BMFF_SD_lms = rbind(final_results, Femoral_head_BMFF_SD_lms)

colnames(Femoral_head_BMFF_SD_lms)[c(3:7)] = c("LL", "UL", "R_squared", "p", "n") 

Femoral_head_BMFF_SD_lms <- Femoral_head_BMFF_SD_lms %>%
  mutate(
    Beta_CI = paste0(
      round(Estimate, 3), " (",
      round(LL, 3), ", ",
      round(UL, 3), ")"
    )
  )

export(Femoral_head_BMFF_SD_lms, "Femoral_head_BMFF_SD_lms.xlsx")

```


Total hip
```{r}
Total_hip_BMFF_final_df$rt_BMFF = RankNorm(Total_hip_BMFF_final_df$Mean.fat)

# Merge all of the outcome variables with Total_hip_BMFF into one data frame
data_frames <- list(
  Total_hip_BMFF_final_df[,c(1,4,9)],
  Age_sex_imaging_df,
  BMI_imaging_df,
  WHR_imaging_df,
  VAT_imaging_df,
  ASAT_imaging_df,
  TTMFI_imaging_df,
  TTFFMVi_imaging_df,
  Liver_PDFF_imaging_df,
  Pancreas_PDFF_imaging_df,
  Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)],
  Android_fat_imaging_df,
  Gynoid_fat_imaging_df,
  Legs_fat_imaging_df,
  Total_fat_imaging_df,
  Trunk_fat_imaging_df
)

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)

# Remove NAs from BMFF column only - and from sex and age columns
Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df <- Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df$rt_BMFF), ]
Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df <- Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df$Sex), ]
Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df <- Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df$Age_first_second_imaging), ]

total_sample_size <- 46939

# List of column names to check for missing values
columns_to_check <- c(
  "BMI_first_second_imaging",
  "WHR_first_second_imaging",
  "VATi_first_second_imaging",
  "ASATi_first_second_imaging",
  "TTMFI_first_second_imaging",
  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging",
  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging",
  "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging",
  "Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging",
  "Android_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Total_fat_first_second_imaging"
)

# For loop to count missing values and calculate percentage
for (column in columns_to_check) {
  missing_count <- sum(is.na(Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df[[column]]))
  missing_percentage <- (missing_count / total_sample_size) * 100
  cat(column, ": ", missing_count, " missing values (", round(missing_percentage, 2), "%)\n")
}

#BMI_first_second_imaging :  1160  missing values ( 2.31 %)
#WHR_first_second_imaging :  1012  missing values ( 2.02 %)
#VATi_first_second_imaging :  85  missing values ( 0.17 %)
#ASATi_first_second_imaging :  180  missing values ( 0.36 %)
#TTMFI_first_second_imaging :  684  missing values ( 1.36 %)
#TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging :  550  missing values ( 1.1 %)
#Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging :  20211  missing values ( 40.25 %)
#Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging :  9717  missing values ( 19.35 %)
#Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging :  6793  missing values ( 13.53 %)
#Android_fat_first_second_imaging :  6822  missing values ( 13.59 %)
#Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging :  6822  missing values ( 13.59 %)
#Legs_fat_first_second_imaging :  6822  missing values ( 13.59 %)
#Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging :  6822  missing values ( 13.59 %)
#Total_fat_first_second_imaging :  6822  missing values ( 13.59 %)


# Display the pattern of missing data
vis_miss(Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df[,6:11], cluster = TRUE)

# Impute missing values <10% and Spine BMD
variables_to_impute <- c("BMI_first_second_imaging", "WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging")

# Perform multiple imputation
imputed_data <- mice(Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df[variables_to_impute], m = 5, method = 'pmm', maxit = 50, seed = 123)

# To check the imputed data, you can use:
summary(imputed_data)

# If you want to complete the data with imputed values, use:
completed_data <- complete(imputed_data, action = "long")
completed_data = completed_data[-c(1,2)]

# Replace original NA values with imputed values
Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df = Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df
Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df[variables_to_impute] <- completed_data

#Density plots
plot_list <- list()

# Loop over each variable and create a density plot
for (var in variables_to_impute) {
  plot <- ggplot() +
    geom_density(aes_string(x = paste0("Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df$", var)), color = "blue") +
    geom_density(aes_string(x = paste0("Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df$", var)), color = "red") +
    xlab(var) +
    ylab("Density") +
    theme_bw() +
    ggtitle(paste("Density Plot for", var))
  
  # Add the plot to the list
  plot_list[[var]] <- plot
}

# Print each plot
for (var in variables_to_impute) {
  print(plot_list[[var]])
}


# Run BMI separately, as this is part of the covariate list for the other regressions

# Model 1

                  "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging",

extract_results <- function(model, data_subset, outcome_var) {
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  conf_int <- confint(model)

  n_participants <- sum(!is.na(data_subset[[outcome_var]]))  # Count non-NA participants for the outcome variable
  data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary),

  results_male$Group <- "Male"

}

  Beta_CI = c("-0.048 (-0.051, -0.046)", "-0.048 (-0.051, -0.046)", "-0.036 (-0.040, -0.032)" ),
  `R.squared` = c(0.254, 0.245, 0.104),
  `p.value` = c("<2e-16", "<2e-16", "<2e-16"),
  `Adj.model` = c("Model 2", "Model 2", "Model 2")
)

Total_hip_model_2_final_df = rbind(Total_hip_BMI_model_2_df, Total_hip_model_2_final_df)
Total_hip_model_2_final_df$p.value <- ifelse(
  Total_hip_model_2_final_df$p.value == 0,
  "<2e-16",
  Total_hip_model_2_final_df$p.value
)


#Combine model 1 and 2 data frames into one data frame
Total_hip_linear_regressions_df = rbind(Total_hip_model_1_final_df[,2:8], Total_hip_model_2_final_df[,2:8])
Total_hip_linear_regressions_df$Primary.exposure = "Total hip BMFF"
Total_hip_linear_regressions_df <- Total_hip_linear_regressions_df %>%
  select(Primary.exposure, everything())

colnames(Total_hip_linear_regressions_df) = c('Primary exposure', 'Outcome', 'Sex', 'n', 'Beta (95% CI)', 'R²', 'P', 'Adjustment model')
Total_hip_linear_regressions_df$Sex <- ifelse(
  Total_hip_linear_regressions_df$Sex == 'All',
  "Both",
  Total_hip_linear_regressions_df$Sex
)

export(Total_hip_linear_regressions_df, 'Total_hip_linear_regressions_df.csv')
export(Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df, 'Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df.csv')

```


Total hip: per-SD lms
```{r}
outcome_vars <- c("WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", 
                  "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", 
                  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging", "Android_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging", "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging")

# Initialize an empty list to store results
results_list <- list()

extract_results <- function(model, data_subset, outcome_var) {
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  conf_int <- confint(model)
  r_squared <- summary(model)$r.squared
  n_participants <- sum(!is.na(data_subset[[outcome_var]]))  # Count non-NA participants for the outcome variable
  data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary),
    Estimate = coef_summary[, "Estimate"],
    `95% CI Lower` = conf_int[, 1],
    `95% CI Upper` = conf_int[, 2],
    `R-squared` = r_squared,
    `p-value` = coef_summary[, "Pr(>|t|)"],
    `N Participants` = n_participants  # Add participant count
  )
}

# Loop over each outcome variable
for (var in outcome_vars) {
  for (sex in c("Both", "F", "M")) {
    # Filter data based on sex
    if (sex == "Both") {
      data_subset <- Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df
      formula <- as.formula(paste(paste0(var, "_ranknorm"), "~ rt_Total_hip_BMFF_std*Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging"))
    } else {
      data_subset <- subset(Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == sex)
      formula <- as.formula(paste(paste0(var, "_ranknorm"), "~ rt_Total_hip_BMFF_std + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging"))
    }
    
    # Remove missing values for the specific outcome variable
    data_subset <- data_subset[!is.na(data_subset[[var]]), ]
    
    # Rank-normalize the outcome variable
    data_subset[[paste0(var, "_ranknorm")]] <- RankNorm(data_subset[[var]])
    
    # Standardize rt_Total_hip_BMFF
    data_subset$rt_Total_hip_BMFF_std <- scale(data_subset$rt_Total_hip_BMFF)

    model <- lm(formula, data = data_subset)
    results <- extract_results(model, data_subset, var)
    results$Group <- ifelse(sex == "Both", "All", sex)
    results$Outcome <- var
    
    # Combine results
    results_list[[paste(var, sex, sep = "_")]] <- results
  }
}

# Combine all results into a single data frame
final_results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)

final_results <- final_results %>%
  filter(Variable == "rt_Total_hip_BMFF_std")
final_results$Model = "Model 1"

# Model 1 only
Total_hip_BMFF_SD_lms = final_results

# Rbind with model 2
Total_hip_BMFF_SD_lms = rbind(final_results, Total_hip_BMFF_SD_lms)

colnames(Total_hip_BMFF_SD_lms)[c(3:7)] = c("LL", "UL", "R_squared", "p", "n") 

Total_hip_BMFF_SD_lms <- Total_hip_BMFF_SD_lms %>%
  mutate(
    Beta_CI = paste0(
      round(Estimate, 3), " (",
      round(LL, 3), ", ",
      round(UL, 3), ")"
    )
  )

export(Total_hip_BMFF_SD_lms, "Total_hip_BMFF_SD_lms.xlsx")

```


Diaphysis
```{r}
Diaphysis_BMFF_final_df$rt_BMFF = RankNorm(Diaphysis_BMFF_final_df$Mean.fat)

# Merge all of the outcome variables with Diaphysis_BMFF into one data frame
data_frames <- list(
  Diaphysis_BMFF_final_df[,c(1,4,9)],
  Age_sex_imaging_df,
  BMI_imaging_df,
  WHR_imaging_df,
  VAT_imaging_df,
  ASAT_imaging_df,
  TTMFI_imaging_df,
  TTFFMVi_imaging_df,
  Liver_PDFF_imaging_df,
  Pancreas_PDFF_imaging_df,
  Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)],
  Android_fat_imaging_df,
  Gynoid_fat_imaging_df,
  Legs_fat_imaging_df,
  Total_fat_imaging_df,
  Trunk_fat_imaging_df
)

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)

# Remove NAs from BMFF column only - and from sex and age columns
Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df <- Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df$rt_BMFF), ]
Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df <- Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df$Sex), ]
Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df <- Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df$Age_first_second_imaging), ]

total_sample_size <- 45717

# List of column names to check for missing values
columns_to_check <- c(
  "BMI_first_second_imaging",
  "WHR_first_second_imaging",
  "VATi_first_second_imaging",
  "ASATi_first_second_imaging",
  "TTMFI_first_second_imaging",
  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging",
  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging",
  "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging",
  "Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging",
  "Android_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging",
  "Total_fat_first_second_imaging"
)

# For loop to count missing values and calculate percentage
for (column in columns_to_check) {
  missing_count <- sum(is.na(Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df[[column]]))
  missing_percentage <- (missing_count / total_sample_size) * 100
  cat(column, ": ", missing_count, " missing values (", round(missing_percentage, 2), "%)\n")
}

#BMI_first_second_imaging :  1130  missing values ( 2.25 %)
#WHR_first_second_imaging :  976  missing values ( 1.94 %)
#VATi_first_second_imaging :  87  missing values ( 0.17 %)
#ASATi_first_second_imaging :  183  missing values ( 0.36 %)
#TTMFI_first_second_imaging :  706  missing values ( 1.41 %)
#TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging :  583  missing values ( 1.16 %)
#Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging :  19441  missing values ( 38.72 %)
#Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging :  9392  missing values ( 18.71 %)
#Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging :  6664  missing values ( 13.27 %)
#Android_fat_first_second_imaging :  6641  missing values ( 13.23 %)
#Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging :  6641  missing values ( 13.23 %)
#Legs_fat_first_second_imaging :  6641  missing values ( 13.23 %)
#Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging :  6641  missing values ( 13.23 %)
#Total_fat_first_second_imaging :  6641  missing values ( 13.23 %)


# Display the pattern of missing data
vis_miss(Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df[,6:11], cluster = TRUE)

# Impute missing values <10% and Spine BMD
variables_to_impute <- c("BMI_first_second_imaging", "WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging")

# Perform multiple imputation
imputed_data <- mice(Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df[variables_to_impute], m = 5, method = 'pmm', maxit = 50, seed = 123)

# To check the imputed data, you can use:
summary(imputed_data)

# If you want to complete the data with imputed values, use:
completed_data <- complete(imputed_data, action = "long")
completed_data = completed_data[-c(1,2)]

# Replace original NA values with imputed values
Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df = Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df
Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df[variables_to_impute] <- completed_data

#Density plots
plot_list <- list()

# Loop over each variable and create a density plot
for (var in variables_to_impute) {
  plot <- ggplot() +
    geom_density(aes_string(x = paste0("Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df$", var)), color = "blue") +
    geom_density(aes_string(x = paste0("Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df$", var)), color = "red") +
    xlab(var) +
    ylab("Density") +
    theme_bw() +
    ggtitle(paste("Density Plot for", var))
  
  # Add the plot to the list
  plot_list[[var]] <- plot
}

# Print each plot
for (var in variables_to_impute) {
  print(plot_list[[var]])
}

# Model 1

# For-loop multivariate lms

# Model 1
outcome_vars <- c("WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", 
                  "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", 
                  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging", "Android_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging", "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging")

# Initialize an empty list to store results
results_list <- list()

extract_results <- function(model, data_subset, outcome_var) {
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  conf_int <- confint(model)
  r_squared <- summary(model)$r.squared
  n_participants <- sum(!is.na(data_subset[[outcome_var]]))  # Count non-NA participants for the outcome variable
  data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary),
    Estimate = coef_summary[, "Estimate"],
    `95% CI Lower` = conf_int[, 1],
    `95% CI Upper` = conf_int[, 2],
    `R-squared` = r_squared,
    `p-value` = coef_summary[, "Pr(>|t|)"],
    `N Participants` = n_participants  # Add participant count
  )
}

# Loop over each outcome variable
for (var in outcome_vars) {
  # All sexes
  data_all <- Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df
  model_all <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF*Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging")), data = data_all)
  results_all <- extract_results(model_all, data_all, var)
  results_all$Group <- "All"
  results_all$Outcome <- var
  
  # Females
  data_female <- subset(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == 'F')
  model_female <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging")), data = data_female)
  results_female <- extract_results(model_female, data_female, var)
  results_female$Group <- "Female"
  results_female$Outcome <- var
  
  # Males
  data_male <- subset(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == 'M')
  model_male <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging")), data = data_male)
  results_male <- extract_results(model_male, data_male, var)
  results_male$Group <- "Male"
  results_male$Outcome <- var
  
  # Combine all results
  results_list[[var]] <- rbind(results_all, results_female, results_male)
}

# Combine all results into a single data frame
final_results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)

final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate(
    Beta_CI = paste0(
      round(Estimate, 3), " (",
      round(`X95..CI.Lower`, 3), ", ",
      round(`X95..CI.Upper`, 3), ")"
    )
  )

Diaphysis_model_1_final_df = final_results[,c(1,9,8,7,10,5,6)]
Diaphysis_model_1_final_df = subset(Diaphysis_model_1_final_df, Diaphysis_model_1_final_df$Variable == "rt_BMFF")
Diaphysis_model_1_final_df$Outcome <- gsub("_first_second_imaging", "", Diaphysis_model_1_final_df$Outcome)
Diaphysis_model_1_final_df$`Adj.model` = "Model 1"
Diaphysis_BMI_model_1_df = data.frame(
  Variable = c("rt_BMFF", "rt_BMFF", "rt_BMFF"),
  Outcome = c("BMI", "BMI", "BMI"),
  Group = c("All", "Female", "Male"),
  N.Participants = c(45717, 25260, 20457),
  Beta_CI = c("-0.047 (-0.050, -0.044)", "-0.047 (-0.049, -0.045)", "-0.038 (-0.042, -0.034)" ),
  `R.squared` = c(0.148, 0.143, 0.046),
  `p.value` = c("<2e-16", "<2e-16", "<2e-16"),
  `Adj.model` = c("Model 1", "Model 1", "Model 1")
)

Diaphysis_model_1_final_df = rbind(Diaphysis_BMI_model_1_df, Diaphysis_model_1_final_df)
Diaphysis_model_1_final_df$p.value <- ifelse(
  Diaphysis_model_1_final_df$p.value == 0,
  "<2e-16",
  Diaphysis_model_1_final_df$p.value
)



# Model 2

# For-loop multivariate lms
outcome_vars <- c("WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", 
                  "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", 
                  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging", "Android_fat_first_second_imaging",

                  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging")

# Initialize an empty list to store results
results_list <- list()

extract_results <- function(model, data_subset, outcome_var) {
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  conf_int <- confint(model)
  r_squared <- summary(model)$r.squared
  n_participants <- sum(!is.na(data_subset[[outcome_var]]))  # Count non-NA participants for the outcome variable
  data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary),
    Estimate = coef_summary[, "Estimate"],
    `95% CI Lower` = conf_int[, 1],
    `95% CI Upper` = conf_int[, 2],
    `R-squared` = r_squared,
    `p-value` = coef_summary[, "Pr(>|t|)"],
    `N Participants` = n_participants  # Add participant count
  )
}

# Loop over each outcome variable
for (var in outcome_vars) {
  # All sexes
  data_all <- Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df
  model_all <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF*Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging")), data = data_all)
  results_all <- extract_results(model_all, data_all, var)
  results_all$Group <- "All"
  results_all$Outcome <- var
  
  # Females
  data_female <- subset(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == 'F')
  model_female <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging")), data = data_female)
  results_female <- extract_results(model_female, data_female, var)
  results_female$Group <- "Female"
  results_female$Outcome <- var
  
  # Males
  data_male <- subset(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == 'M')
  model_male <- lm(as.formula(paste(var, "~ rt_BMFF + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging")), data = data_male)
  results_male <- extract_results(model_male, data_male, var)
  results_male$Group <- "Male"
  results_male$Outcome <- var
  
  # Combine all results
  results_list[[var]] <- rbind(results_all, results_female, results_male)
}

# Combine all results into a single data frame
final_results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)

  mutate(
    Beta_CI = paste0(
      round(Estimate, 3), " (",
      round(`X95..CI.Lower`, 3), ", ",

    )
  )

Diaphysis_model_2_final_df = final_results[,c(1,9,8,7,10,5,6)]

Diaphysis_model_2_final_df$Outcome <- gsub("_first_second_imaging", "", Diaphysis_model_2_final_df$Outcome)
```

```{r}
outcome_vars <- c("WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging", 
                  "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging", 
                  "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Pancreas_PDFF_first_second_imaging", "Android_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Gynoid_fat_first_second_imaging", "Legs_fat_first_second_imaging", 
                  "Trunk_fat_first_second_imaging")

# Initialize an empty list to store results
results_list <- list()

extract_results <- function(model, data_subset, outcome_var) {
  coef_summary <- summary(model)$coefficients
  conf_int <- confint(model)
  r_squared <- summary(model)$r.squared
  n_participants <- sum(!is.na(data_subset[[outcome_var]]))  # Count non-NA participants for the outcome variable
  data.frame(
    Variable = rownames(coef_summary),
    Estimate = coef_summary[, "Estimate"],
    `95% CI Lower` = conf_int[, 1],
    `95% CI Upper` = conf_int[, 2],
    `R-squared` = r_squared,
    `p-value` = coef_summary[, "Pr(>|t|)"],
    `N Participants` = n_participants  # Add participant count
  )
}

# Loop over each outcome variable
for (var in outcome_vars) {
  for (sex in c("Both", "F", "M")) {
    # Filter data based on sex
    if (sex == "Both") {
      data_subset <- Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df
      formula <- as.formula(paste(paste0(var, "_ranknorm"), "~ rt_Diaphysis_BMFF_std*Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging"))
    } else {
      data_subset <- subset(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df, Sex == sex)
      formula <- as.formula(paste(paste0(var, "_ranknorm"), "~ rt_Diaphysis_BMFF_std + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging"))
    }
    
    # Remove missing values for the specific outcome variable
    data_subset <- data_subset[!is.na(data_subset[[var]]), ]
    
    # Rank-normalize the outcome variable
    data_subset[[paste0(var, "_ranknorm")]] <- RankNorm(data_subset[[var]])
    
    # Standardize rt_Diaphysis_BMFF
    data_subset$rt_Diaphysis_BMFF_std <- scale(data_subset$rt_Diaphysis_BMFF)

    model <- lm(formula, data = data_subset)
    results <- extract_results(model, data_subset, var)
    results$Group <- ifelse(sex == "Both", "All", sex)
    results$Outcome <- var
    
    # Combine results
    results_list[[paste(var, sex, sep = "_")]] <- results
  }
}

# Combine all results into a single data frame
final_results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
final_results <- final_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)

#Rbind with model 2

Diaphysis_BMFF_SD_lms <- Diaphysis_BMFF_SD_lms %>%
  mutate(
    Beta_CI = paste0(
      round(Estimate, 3), " (",
```
