T2D outcome ascertainment

PheCodes
```{r}
#Imaging incidence

Imaging_PheCode_dates_df = merge(Imaging_date, PheCode_dates, by='eid')
Imaging_PheCode_dates_df[] <- lapply(Imaging_PheCode_dates_df, as.Date)
Imaging_PheCode_dates_df$eid = as.numeric(Imaging_PheCode_dates_df$eid)

pre_diff_time = Imaging_PheCode_dates_df[,-1]

time_diff_df <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(pre_diff_time) - 1, nrow = nrow(pre_diff_time)))
colnames(time_diff_df) <- paste0("Time_diff_", 1:(ncol(pre_diff_time)-1))

# Calculate the difference in time between date1 column and every 1852 column of dates
for (i in 2:ncol(pre_diff_time)) {
  time_diff_df[, i-1] <- as.numeric(difftime(pre_diff_time$Imaging_date, pre_diff_time[[i]], units = "days"))
}

# Combine the original data frame with the time differences data frame
result_df <- cbind(pre_diff_time, time_diff_df)

result_df = result_df[,c(1,1854:3705)]
result_df = cbind(Imaging_PheCode_dates_df[,1], result_df)
colnames(result_df)[1] = "eid"
result_df = result_df[,-2]

PheWAS_imaging_df = merge(Imaging_date, PheWAS_final_table, by="eid")
PheWAS_imaging_df = PheWAS_imaging_df[,-2]


merged_result_df <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(PheWAS_imaging_df) + ncol(result_df), nrow = nrow(PheWAS_imaging_df)))

colnames(merged_result_df) <- c(rep(names(PheWAS_imaging_df), each = 1), rep(names(PheWAS_imaging_df), each = 1))

for (i in 1:ncol(merged_result_df)) {
  if (i %% 2 != 0) {
    merged_result_df[, i] <- PheWAS_imaging_df[, (i + 1) %/% 2]
  } else {
    merged_result_df[, i] <- result_df[, i %/% 2]
  }
}

merged_result_df = merged_result_df[,-2]

export(PheWAS_imaging_df, "PheWAS_imaging_df.csv")
export(result_df, "PheWAS_time_diff.csv")

#-------------------------------------------------------------

df1 = PheWAS_imaging_df
df2 = result_df

new_df <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(df1) + ncol(df2), nrow = nrow(df1)))

# Assign alternating columns from df1 and df2 to the new data frame
for (i in 1:ncol(df1)) {
  new_df[, 2*i - 1] <- df1[, i]
  new_df[, 2*i] <- df2[, i]
}

# If df1 and df2 have different number of columns, fill in the remaining columns
if (ncol(df1) < ncol(df2)) {
  for (i in (ncol(df1) + 1):ncol(df2)) {
    new_df[, 2*i - 1] <- rep(NA, nrow(df1))
    new_df[, 2*i] <- df2[, i]
  }
}

# Set column names for the new data frame
colnames(new_df) <- c(sapply(1:ncol(df1), function(i) c(colnames(df1)[i], colnames(df2)[i])))

new_df = new_df[,-2]

export(new_df, "PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined.csv")

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------

df = PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined

for (k in 2:3704) {
  co <- df[, k]
  mt <- df[, k + 1]  # Assuming the adjacent column is the next column
  
  # Find indices where co is TRUE and mt is NA or >= -182 # DATE OF IMAGING AND PHECODE DIAGNOSIS FLIPPED
  idx <- which(co == TRUE & (is.na(mt) | mt >= -182)) # DATE OF IMAGING AND PHECODE DIAGNOSIS FLIPPED
  
  # Update cells in df where the condition is met
  df[idx, k] <- NA
}

Incident_PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined = df

export(Incident_PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined, "Incident_PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined.csv")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Incident_PheWAS_df = Incident_PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined

# Create a sequence of column indices to remove
columns_to_remove <- seq(3, ncol(Incident_PheWAS_df), by = 2)

# Remove the specified columns from the data frame
Incident_PheWAS_df <- Incident_PheWAS_df[, -columns_to_remove]

Incident_PheWAS_df = Incident_PheWAS_df[,-1854]
export(Incident_PheWAS_df, "Incident_PheWAS_df.csv")


#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#Admission incidence
Admission_PheCode_dates_df <- merge(ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[1:2], PheCode_dates, by = 'eid')
Admission_PheCode_dates_df[] <- lapply(Admission_PheCode_dates_df, as.Date)
Admission_PheCode_dates_df$eid <- as.numeric(Admission_PheCode_dates_df$eid)

# Prepare to calculate time differences
pre_diff_time <- Admission_PheCode_dates_df[,-1]

# Initialize time_diff_df
time_diff_df <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(pre_diff_time), nrow = nrow(pre_diff_time)))
colnames(time_diff_df) <- paste0("Time_diff_", 1:ncol(pre_diff_time))

# Calculate the difference in time between the first column and others
for (i in 1:ncol(pre_diff_time)) {
  time_diff_df[, i] <- as.numeric(difftime(pre_diff_time[[1]], pre_diff_time[[i]], units = "days"))
}

# Combine the original data frame with the time differences data frame
result_df <- cbind(Admission_PheCode_dates_df, time_diff_df)
result_df = result_df[,-2]

result_df = result_df[,c(1,1854:3706)]
result_df = cbind(Admission_PheCode_dates_df[,1], result_df)
colnames(result_df)[1] = "eid"
result_df = result_df[,-2]
result_df = result_df[,-1]

PheWAS_admission_df = merge(ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[1:2], PheWAS_final_table, by="eid")
PheWAS_admission_df = PheWAS_admission_df[,-2]

merged_result_df <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(PheWAS_admission_df) + ncol(result_df), nrow = nrow(PheWAS_admission_df)))

colnames(merged_result_df) <- c(rep(names(PheWAS_admission_df), each = 1), rep(names(PheWAS_admission_df), each = 1))

for (i in 1:ncol(merged_result_df)) {
  if (i %% 2 != 0) {
    merged_result_df[, i] <- PheWAS_admission_df[, (i + 1) %/% 2]
  } else {
    merged_result_df[, i] <- result_df[, i %/% 2]
  }
}

merged_result_df = merged_result_df[,-2]

export(PheWAS_admission_df, "PheWAS_admission_df.csv")
export(result_df, "PheWAS_time_diff.csv")

#-------------------------------------------------------------

df1 = PheWAS_admission_df
df2 = result_df

new_df <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(df1) + ncol(df2), nrow = nrow(df1)))

# Assign alternating columns from df1 and df2 to the new data frame
for (i in 1:ncol(df1)) {
  new_df[, 2*i - 1] <- df1[, i]
  new_df[, 2*i] <- df2[, i]
}

# If df1 and df2 have different number of columns, fill in the remaining columns
if (ncol(df1) < ncol(df2)) {
  for (i in (ncol(df1) + 1):ncol(df2)) {
    new_df[, 2*i - 1] <- rep(NA, nrow(df1))
    new_df[, 2*i] <- df2[, i]
  }
}

# Set column names for the new data frame
colnames(new_df) <- c(sapply(1:ncol(df1), function(i) c(colnames(df1)[i], colnames(df2)[i])))

new_df = new_df[,-2]

export(new_df, "PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined.csv")

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------

df = new_df

for (k in 2:3704) {
  co <- df[, k]
  mt <- df[, k + 1]  # Assuming the adjacent column is the next column
  
  # Find indices where co is TRUE and mt is NA or >= -182 # DATE OF ADMISSION AND PHECODE DIAGNOSIS FLIPPED
  idx <- which(co == TRUE & (is.na(mt) | mt >= -182)) # DATE OF ADMISSION AND PHECODE DIAGNOSIS FLIPPED
  
  # Update cells in df where the condition is met
  df[idx, k] <- NA
}

Incident_PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined_admission = df

export(Incident_PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined, "Incident_PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined.csv")

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Incident_PheWAS_admission_df = Incident_PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined_admission

# Create a sequence of column indices to remove
columns_to_remove <- seq(3, ncol(Incident_PheWAS_admission_df), by = 2)

# Remove the specified columns from the data frame
Incident_PheWAS_admission_df <- Incident_PheWAS_admission_df[, -columns_to_remove]

export(Incident_PheWAS_admission_df, "Incident_PheWAS_admission_df.csv")

Prevalent_PheWAS_imaging = merge(Imaging_date, PheWAS_final_table, by='eid')
Incident_admission_PheWAS_imaging = merge(Imaging_date, Incident_PheWAS_admission_df, by='eid')

#Whole cohort
count(Incident_PheWAS_admission_df$`250.2`)
count(PheWAS_final_table$`250.2`)
#32,748 total admission-incident T2D diagnoses 
#44,628 total prevalent cases of T2D

#Imaging cohort
count(Incident_PheWAS_df$`250.2`)
count(Incident_admission_PheWAS_imaging$`250.2`)
count(Prevalent_PheWAS_imaging$`250.2`)
#772 imaging-incident T2D diagnoses
#2,132 admission-incident T2D diagnoses 
#2,575 prevalent cases of T2D

# Merge datasets and convert to Date
Admission_PheCode_dates_df <- merge(ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[1:2], PheCode_dates, by='eid')
Admission_PheCode_dates_df[] <- lapply(Admission_PheCode_dates_df, as.Date)
Admission_PheCode_dates_df$eid <- as.numeric(Admission_PheCode_dates_df$eid)

# Calculate time differences
time_diff_df <- sapply(Admission_PheCode_dates_df[-1], function(x) {
  as.numeric(difftime(Admission_PheCode_dates_df$Admission_date, x, units = "days"))
})

# Convert time differences to TRUE/NA based on condition
time_diff_df <- ifelse(time_diff_df >= -182, TRUE, NA)

# Combine with eid
result_df <- cbind(eid = Admission_PheCode_dates_df$eid, time_diff_df)

# Export result
export(result_df, "PheWAS_time_diff.csv")

# Merge with final table
PheWAS_admission_df <- merge(ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[1:2], PheWAS_final_table, by = "eid")
export(PheWAS_admission_df, "PheWAS_admission_df.csv")

# Combine data frames
new_df <- cbind(PheWAS_admission_df, result_df[,-1])
colnames(new_df) <- c(names(PheWAS_admission_df), paste0("Time_diff_", 1:(ncol(result_df) - 1)))

# Process to adjust based on time condition
for (k in seq(2, ncol(new_df), by = 2)) {
  co <- new_df[, k]
  mt <- new_df[, k + 1]
  idx <- which(co == TRUE & (is.na(mt) | mt >= -182))
  new_df[idx, k] <- NA
}

# Remove unwanted columns
columns_to_remove <- seq(3, ncol(new_df), by = 2)
Incident_PheWAS_admission_df <- new_df[, -columns_to_remove]

# Export final result
export(Incident_PheWAS_admission_df, "Incident_PheWAS_admission_df.csv")

```



Define admission and imaging incident cases usin the following outcome ascertainment from UKB data category 1712:
- PheCode map v1.2 (ICD-10 and 9 derived: data category 2002)
- Primary health care data (data-field 42040; record table 1060)
- T2D diagnosed by physician (data-fields 2443 and 2976) + non-cancer illness disease codes (data-fields 20002 and 20009) + 
- Death registry (data fields 40001 [underlying/primary cause of death: ICD10 coded]; 40002 [contributory/secondary causes of death: ICD10 coded; 40000 [date of death])

T2D diagnosed by physician + non-cancer illness disease codes (T2D = 1223) - 5 incident T2D cases added
```{r}
#Load non-cancer illness data frame
non_cancer_file_path <- "//cmvm.datastore.ed.ac.uk/cmvm/scs/groups/OPTIMAT/Sam_Sjostrom/ukb675209.csv"

# Define the selected columns
selected_columns_non_cancer <- c("eid", "87-0.0", "87-1.0", "87-2.0", "87-3.0", "2976-0.0", "2976-1.0", "2976-2.0", "2976-3.0", "20002-0.0", "20002-1.0", "20002-2.0", "20002-3.0", "2443-0.0", "2443-1.0", "2443-2.0", "2443-3.0")

# Read the CSV file using fread
Non_cancer_illness_df <- fread(non_cancer_file_path, select = selected_columns_non_cancer)

colnames(Non_cancer_illness_df) = c("eid", "Age_non_cancer_illness_0", "Age_non_cancer_illness_1", "Age_non_cancer_illness_2", "Age_non_cancer_illness_3", "Age_diabetes_diagnosed_0", "Age_diabetes_diagnosed_1", "Age_diabetes_diagnosed_2", "Age_diabetes_diagnosed_3", "Non_cancer_illness_0", "Non_cancer_illness_1", "Non_cancer_illness_2", "Non_cancer_illness_3", "Physician_diagnosed_diabetes_0", "Physician_diagnosed_diabetes_1", "Physician_diagnosed_diabetes_2", "Physician_diagnosed_diabetes_3")

non_cancer_file_path <- "//cmvm.datastore.ed.ac.uk/cmvm/scs/groups/OPTIMAT/Sam_Sjostrom/ukb675209.csv"

# Define the selected columns
selected_columns_non_cancer <- c("eid", "20009-0.0", "20009-1.0", "20009-2.0", "20009-3.0")

# Read the CSV file using fread
Non_cancer_illness_age_df <- fread(non_cancer_file_path, select = selected_columns_non_cancer)

colnames(Non_cancer_illness_age_df) = c("eid", "Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_0", "Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_1", "Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_2", "Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_3")

Non_cancer_illness_df = merge(Non_cancer_illness_df, Non_cancer_illness_age_df, by='eid')

export(Non_cancer_illness_df, "Non_cancer_illness_diabetes_df.csv")

Non_cancer_illness_df = Non_cancer_illness_diabetes_df

#Prevalence of T2D - 1,457
Non_cancer_illness_df = Non_cancer_illness_df %>%
  mutate(Prevalent_T2D = ifelse(Non_cancer_illness_0 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_1 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_2 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_3 == 1223, TRUE, NA))
count(Non_cancer_illness_df$Prevalent_T2D)

Non_cancer_illness_df = subset(Non_cancer_illness_df, Non_cancer_illness_df$Prevalent_T2D=='TRUE')

Non_cancer_T2D_prevalence = Non_cancer_illness_df[,c(1,18:22)]

Non_cancer_T2D_prevalence <- Non_cancer_T2D_prevalence %>%
  mutate(new_column = coalesce(Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_0, Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_1, Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_2, Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_3))

Non_cancer_T2D_prevalence = subset(Non_cancer_T2D_prevalence, Non_cancer_T2D_prevalence$new_column>0)


#Incidence - imaging: 2 incident cases
Imaging_date_age_df = merge(Imaging_date, Age_sex_imaging_df, by='eid')
Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes = merge(Imaging_date_age_df, Non_cancer_illness_df[,c(1:5,10:13,19:22)], by='eid')

Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_0 = Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_0 - Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_first_second_imaging
Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_1 = Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_1 - Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_first_second_imaging
Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_2 = Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_2 - Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_first_second_imaging
Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_3 = Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_3 - Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_first_second_imaging

filtered_df <- Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes %>%
  filter(!(coalesce(Age_diff_0 < 0.5, FALSE) | 
           coalesce(Age_diff_1 < 0.5, FALSE) | 
           coalesce(Age_diff_2 < 0.5, FALSE) | 
           coalesce(Age_diff_3 < 0.5, FALSE)))

Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes = subset(filtered_df, filtered_df$Non_cancer_illness_0 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_1 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_2 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_3 == 1223)

Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Incident_T2D = 'TRUE'


#Incidence - admission: 76 incident cases
Assessment_date_age_df = merge(ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[,1:2], ALMi_total_df[,1:2] , by='eid')
Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes = merge(Assessment_date_age_df, Non_cancer_illness_df[,c(1:5,10:13,19:22)], by='eid')

Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_0 = Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_0 - Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_baseline
Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_1 = Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_1 - Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_baseline
Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_2 = Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_2 - Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_baseline
Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_3 = Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_3 - Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_baseline

filtered_df <- Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes %>%
  filter(!(coalesce(Age_diff_0 < 0.5, FALSE) | 
           coalesce(Age_diff_1 < 0.5, FALSE) | 
           coalesce(Age_diff_2 < 0.5, FALSE) | 
           coalesce(Age_diff_3 < 0.5, FALSE)))

Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes = subset(filtered_df, filtered_df$Non_cancer_illness_0 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_1 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_2 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_3 == 1223)

Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Incident_admission_T2D = 'TRUE'

#Create data frame with prevalent, incident-imaging and incident-admission columns
data_frames <- list(Non_cancer_illness_df[,c(1,18)], Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes[,c(1,21)], Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes[,c(1,21)])

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Non_cancer_illnes_T2D_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)
count(Non_cancer_illnes_T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D)
count(Non_cancer_illnes_T2D_df$Incident_T2D)
count(Non_cancer_illnes_T2D_df$Incident_admission_T2D)

export(Non_cancer_illnes_T2D_df , "Non_cancer_illness_T2D_df.csv")

```


Primary care data

Mapping v2 and ctv3 codes to ICD9 and ICD10 codes (excluding the CM-ICD codes as instructed by Lijuan)
```{r}
#Use the PheCode map from here: "C:\Users\Samuel Sjostrom\Downloads\Phecode_map_v1_2_icd9_icd10cm.csv\Phecode_map_v1_2_icd9_icd10cm.csv"
T2D_PheCode_map = subset(Phecode_map_v1_2_icd9_icd10cm, Phecode=='250.2') 

T2D_PheCode_ICD9_map = subset(T2D_PheCode_map, Flag=='9') 
ICD9_list <- T2D_PheCode_ICD9_map$ICD
quoted_ICD9 <- paste0('"', ICD9_list, '"')
comma_separated_ICD9 <- paste(quoted_ICD9, collapse = ", ")
cat(comma_separated_ICD9)
#34 ICD codes: 10 icd9 and 24 icd10
#ICD9: "250.00", "250.02", "250.20", "250.22", "250.30", "250.32", "250.80", "250.82", "250.90", "250.92" - the format with '.' are not found, hence remove them:
# "2500", "2502", "2503", "2508", "2509"

T2D_PheCode_ICD10_map = subset(T2D_PheCode_map, Flag=='10') 
ICD10_list <- T2D_PheCode_ICD10_map$ICD
quoted_ICD10 <- paste0('"', ICD10_list, '"')
comma_separated_ICD10 <- paste(quoted_ICD10, collapse = ", ")
cat(comma_separated_ICD10)
#ICD10: "E11.6", "E11.64", "E11.649", "E11.641", "E11.630", "E11.69", "E11.620", "E11.610", "E11.65", "O24.11", "E11.61", "E11.628", "E11.0", "E11", "E11.621", "E11.8", "E11.63", "E11.9", "E11.01", "E11.00", "E11.62", "E11.622", "E11.638", "E11.618" also remove the '.'

#Use the 'read_v2_icd10', 'read_v2_icd9', 'read_ctv3_icd10' and 'read_ctv3_icd9' data frames from "C:\Users\Samuel Sjostrom\Downloads\primarycare_codings\all_lkps_maps_v4.xlsx"

#Read_v2 codes for icd 9 and 10 separately and then rbind them

#Subset by the ICD10 codes belonging to PheCode 250.2
T2D_read_v2_ICD10 = subset(read_v2_ICD10, icd10_code %in% c("E116", "E1164", "E11649", "E11641", "E11630", "E1169", "E11620", "E11610", "E1165", "O2411", "E1161", "E11628", "E110", "E11", "E11621", "E118", "E1163", "E119", "E1101", "E1100", "E1162", "E11622", "E11638", "E11618"))

T2D_read_v2_ICD10$read_code_version = "v2"

T2D_read_v2_ICD10 = T2D_read_v2_ICD10[!duplicated(T2D_read_v2_ICD10$read_code), ]

T2D_read_v2_ICD9 = subset(read_v2_icd9, icd9_code %in% c("2500", "2502", "2503", "2508", "2509"))

T2D_read_v2_ICD9$read_code_version = "v2"

T2D_read_v2_ICD9 = T2D_read_v2_ICD9[!duplicated(T2D_read_v2_ICD9$read_code), ]

#rbind icd10 and 9 v2 data frames and remove duplicated read v2 codes
colnames(T2D_read_v2_ICD9)[c(2,3)] = c('ICD_code', 'ICD_code_def')
colnames(T2D_read_v2_ICD10)[c(2,3)] = c('ICD_code', 'ICD_code_def')
T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes = rbind(T2D_read_v2_ICD9, T2D_read_v2_ICD10)
T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes = T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes[!duplicated(T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes$read_code), ]

export(T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes, "T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes.csv")

#Read_ctv3 codes for icd 9 and 10 separately and then rbind them

#Subset by the ICD10 codes belonging to PheCode 250.2
T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10 = subset(read_ctv3_ICD10, icd10_code %in% c("E116", "E1164", "E11649", "E11641", "E11630", "E1169", "E11620", "E11610", "E1165", "O2411", "E1161", "E11628", "E110", "E11", "E11621", "E118", "E1163", "E119", "E1101", "E1100", "E1162", "E11622", "E11638", "E11618"))

T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10$read_code_version = "ctv3"

T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10 = T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10[!duplicated(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10$read_code), ]

T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9 = subset(read_ctv3_icd9, icd9_code %in% c("2500", "2502", "2503", "2508", "2509"))

T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9$read_code_version = "ctv3"

T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9 = T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9[!duplicated(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9$read_code), ]

#rbind icd10 and 9 v2 data frames and remove duplicated read v2 codes
colnames(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9)[2] = 'ICD_code'
colnames(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10)[2] = 'ICD_code'
T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes = rbind(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9, T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10)
T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes = T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes[!duplicated(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes$read_code), ]

export(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes, "T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes.csv")

#Create one df with read v2 and ctv3
Read_code_v2_ctv3_df = rbind(T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes[,c(1,2,4)], T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes[,c(1,2,8)])
Read_code_v2_ctv3_df = Read_code_v2_ctv3_df[!duplicated(Read_code_v2_ctv3_df$read_code), ]
Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated = Read_code_v2_ctv3_df
export(Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated, "Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated.csv")
count(Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated$ICD_code) #7 unique ICD codes (4 ICD9 and 3 ICD10 codes)
count(Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated$read_code) #104 unique read codes
```

Extract the read v2 and read ctv 3 codes from the 'gp_clinical' to get participant eids and the event dates
```{r}
#Extract the read codes from the gp_clinical data frame
T2D_gp_clinical_v2 = subset(gp_clinical_df, 
                          read_2 %in% Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated$read_code)

T2D_gp_clinical_ctv3 = subset(gp_clinical_df, 
                          read_3 %in% Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated$read_code)

T2D_gp_clinical_updated = rbind(T2D_gp_clinical_v2, T2D_gp_clinical_ctv3)
T2D_gp_clinical_updated$event_date <- as.Date(T2D_gp_clinical_updated$event_dt, format="%d/%m/%Y")

#Remove duplicated eid entries (saves the first one) - check so it retains the FIRST date of diagnosis, yes it does
T2D_gp_clinical_updated = T2D_gp_clinical_updated[!duplicated(T2D_gp_clinical_updated$eid),]
T2D_gp_clinical_test = subset(T2D_gp_clinical_updated, T2D_gp_clinical_updated$eid=="4522908")

colnames(T2D_gp_clinical_updated)[1] = 'xue_eid'
export(T2D_gp_clinical_updated, "T2D_gp_clinical_updated.csv")

#Merge with bridging file between Xue's project and ours - the merge leads to the exclusion of 1463 imaging-participants, I think the bridging file needs to be updated to include more recent imaging participants
colnames(bridging_ukb48697_ukb66354.1) = c("xue_eid", "eid")
bridging_imaging = merge(bridging_ukb48697_ukb66354.1, Imaging_date, by='eid')

#This represents all prevalent T2D cases diagnosed in primary care in our imaging cohort - 1,010 prevalent cases (create a column for these)
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging = merge(T2D_gp_clinical_updated, bridging_imaging, by='xue_eid')
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$Prevalent_T2D = "TRUE"
colnames(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging)[17] = 'Prevalent_T2D_primary_care'

#Filter to only incident cases - only 4 cases of incident T2D
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$time_diff = T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$event_date-T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$Imaging_date
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$time_diff = as.numeric(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$time_diff)
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging <- T2D_gp_clinical_imaging %>%
  mutate(Incident_T2D = ifelse(time_diff > 180, TRUE, NA))
count(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$Incident_T2D)

Incicent_T2D_gp_clinical_imaging = subset(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging, time_diff>180)

#Check so that these cases are not also captured by the PheCodes - 3 additional incident T2D cases not captured by PheCodes, but loads of 'incident' PheCodes that are not truly incident (see code chunk below where all are combined)
Incicent_T2D_gp_clinical_imaging = merge(Incicent_T2D_gp_clinical_imaging, Incident_PheWAS_df[,c('eid', '250.2')], by='eid')
Incicent_T2D_gp_clinical_imaging = merge(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging, Incident_PheWAS_df[,c('eid', '250.2')], by='eid')
Incicent_T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$Incident_T2D = "TRUE"

#Filter to UKBB admission incident cases -  453 cases of admission incident T2D
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging = merge(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging, ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[,c(1,2)], by='eid')
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$time_diff_admission = T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$event_date-T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$`2006_2010` 
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$time_diff_admission = as.numeric(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$time_diff_admission)
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging <- T2D_gp_clinical_imaging %>%
  mutate(Incident_T2D_admission = ifelse(time_diff_admission > 180, TRUE, NA))
count(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$Incident_T2D_admission)
```


Combine all of the above T2D into separate columns
--> The incident-imaging case number went down when combining with the primary health care data, since many of these diagnoses of T2D occurred before the incident PheCodes were diagnosed: 
- 772 (PheCode only) to 639 (with all ascertained outcomes combined) 
Hence, in order to capture the TRULY incident cases of T2D, the PheCode system should be complemented with the primary health care data, as T2D disease prevalence is already present when the incident PheCodes are diagnosed.
```{r}
#Prevalent --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

T2D_gp_clinical_updated$Prevalent_T2D = "TRUE"

data_frames <- list(PheWAS_imaging_df[,c("eid", "250.2")], Non_cancer_illness_T2D_df[,c(1,2)], T2D_gp_clinical_imaging[,c(1,17)])
data_frames <- list(PheWAS_final_table[,c("eid", "250.2")], Non_cancer_illness_T2D_df[,c(1,2)], T2D_gp_clinical_updated[,c(10,11)])

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Prevalent_T2D_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)
colnames(Prevalent_T2D_df) = c("eid", "PheCode_prevalent_T2D", "Non_cancer_prevalent_T2D", "Primary_care_prevalent_T2D")
count(Prevalent_T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D) #48,053 across the whole cohort using advanced ascertainment method
count(Prevalent_T2D_df$PheCode_prevalent_T2D) #44,628 across the whole cohort using PheCodes only

Prevalent_T2D_df = Prevalent_T2D_df %>%
  mutate(Prevalent_T2D = ifelse(PheCode_prevalent_T2D=='TRUE' | Non_cancer_prevalent_T2D=='TRUE' | Primary_care_prevalent_T2D=='TRUE', TRUE, FALSE))
Prevalent_T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D[is.na(Prevalent_T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D)] <- 'FALSE'

Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Imaging_date, Prevalent_T2D_df, by='eid')

Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df = Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(Prevalent_T2D = ifelse(PheCode_prevalent_T2D=='TRUE' | Non_cancer_prevalent_T2D=='TRUE' | Primary_care_prevalent_T2D=='TRUE', TRUE, NA))

count(Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df$Prevalent_T2D) #3010
count(Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df$PheCode_prevalent_T2D) #2575
count(Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df$Non_cancer_prevalent_T2D) #531
count(Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df$Primary_care_prevalent_T2D) #1010

#Export one data frame merged with imaging dates and one not for PRS regressions
export(Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df, 'Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df.csv')
export(Prevalent_T2D_df, 'Prevalent_T2D_df.csv')

#Incident - imaging -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

data_frames <- list(Incident_PheWAS_df[,c("eid", "250.2")], Non_cancer_illness_T2D_df[,c(1,3)], T2D_gp_clinical_imaging[,c(1,13)])

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Incident_T2D_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)
colnames(Incident_T2D_df) = c("eid", "PheCode_incident_T2D", "Non_cancer_incident_T2D", "Primary_care_incident_T2D")

Incident_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Imaging_date, Incident_T2D_df, by='eid')

Incident_T2D_imaging_df = Incident_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(Incident_T2D = ifelse(PheCode_incident_T2D=='TRUE' | Non_cancer_incident_T2D=='TRUE' | Primary_care_incident_T2D=='TRUE', TRUE, NA))

count(Incident_T2D_imaging_df$Incident_T2D) #776
count(Incident_T2D_imaging_df$PheCode_incident_T2D) #772
count(Incident_T2D_imaging_df$Non_cancer_incident_T2D) #2
count(Incident_T2D_imaging_df$Primary_care_incident_T2D) #4

#Merge with dates from PheWAS and primary care diagnoses
Incident_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Incident_T2D_imaging_df, PheCode_dates[,c('eid', '250.2_date')], by='eid')

#Add primary health care diagnosis dates
Incident_T2D_imaging_df = merge(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging[,c(1,10)], Incident_T2D_imaging_df, by='eid', all=T)

#Remove all prevalent cases by subsetting to only incident cases
Incident_T2D_imaging_df = subset(Incident_T2D_imaging_df, Incident_T2D_imaging_df$Incident_T2D == 'TRUE')

#Replace all of the dates with both Primary and PheCode available with Primary, as this contains the earlier T2D Diagnoses
Incident_T2D_imaging_df <- Incident_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(combined_dates = as.Date(ifelse(!is.na(event_date), event_date, `250.2_date`)))

Incident_T2D_imaging_df$combined_time_diff = Incident_T2D_imaging_df$combined_dates-Incident_T2D_imaging_df$Imaging_date
Incident_T2D_imaging_df$combined_time_diff = as.numeric(Incident_T2D_imaging_df$combined_time_diff)

#Get the time-diff from the non_cancer data frame by using age as the time-scale variable
Non_cancer_T2D_incidence = subset(Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes, Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Incident_T2D=='TRUE')

Non_cancer_T2D_incidence <- Non_cancer_T2D_incidence %>%
  mutate(Age_diff_first_incidence = pmin(Age_diff_0, Age_diff_1, Age_diff_2, Age_diff_3, na.rm = TRUE))
Non_cancer_T2D_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence = as.numeric(Non_cancer_T2D_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence)
Non_cancer_T2D_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence = Non_cancer_T2D_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence*365

#Merge the data frames together
Incident_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Incident_T2D_imaging_df, Non_cancer_T2D_incidence[,c(1,22)], by='eid', all=T)

#Replace primary and PheCode NAs with the data from the non-cancer column
Incident_T2D_imaging_df <- Incident_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(combined_combined_time_diff = ifelse(!is.na(Age_diff_first_incidence),
                                     Age_diff_first_incidence,
                                     combined_time_diff))

#Subset data frame to remove any data entries less than 180 days - 639
Incident_T2D_imaging_df = subset(Incident_T2D_imaging_df, Incident_T2D_imaging_df$combined_combined_time_diff>180)
colnames(Incident_T2D_imaging_df)[12] = "T2D_time_to_event"
export(Incident_T2D_imaging_df, 'Incident_T2D_imaging_df.csv')

#Incident - assessment/recruitment --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

data_frames <- list(Incident_PheWAS_admission_df[,c("eid", "250.2")], Non_cancer_illness_T2D_df[,c(1,4)], T2D_gp_clinical_imaging[,c(1,16)])
data_frames <- list(PheWAS_final_table[,c("eid", "250.2")], Non_cancer_illness_T2D_df[,c(1,2)], T2D_gp_clinical_updated[,c(10,11)])

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Incident_admission_T2D_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)
colnames(Incident_admission_T2D_df) = c("eid", "PheCode_incident_admission_T2D", "Non_cancer_incident_admission_T2D", "Primary_care_incident_admission_T2D")

Incident_admission_T2D_df = merge(Incident_admission_T2D_df, ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[,c(1,2)], by='eid')
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = Incident_admission_T2D_df
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Imaging_date, Incident_admission_T2D_df, by='eid')

Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(Incident_T2D = ifelse(PheCode_incident_admission_T2D=='TRUE' | Non_cancer_incident_admission_T2D=='TRUE' | Primary_care_incident_admission_T2D=='TRUE', TRUE, NA))

count(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$Incident_T2D) #2,323
count(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$PheCode_incident_admission_T2D) #2,132
count(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$Non_cancer_incident_admission_T2D) #67
count(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$Primary_care_incident_admission_T2D) #453

#Add admission date and the dates for the T2D events
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = merge(ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[,1:2], Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, by='eid')
colnames(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df)[2] = "Admission_date"

#Merge with dates from PheWAS and primary care diagnoses
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, PheCode_dates[,c('eid', '250.2_date')], by='eid')

#Add primary health care diagnosis dates
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = merge(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging[,c(1,10)], Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, by='eid', all=T)
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = merge(T2D_gp_clinical_updated[,c(9,10)], Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, by='eid', all=T)

#Remove all prevalent cases by subsetting to only incident cases

#Replace all of the dates with both Primary and PheCode available with Primary, as this contains the earlier T2D Diagnoses
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df <- Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(combined_dates = as.Date(ifelse(!is.na(event_date), event_date, `250.2_date`)))

colnames(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df)[6] = "Admission_date"
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$combined_time_diff = Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$combined_dates-Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$Admission_date
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$combined_time_diff = as.numeric(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$combined_time_diff)
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df[,c(1,6,2,8:10)]

export(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, 'Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df.csv')

#Get the time-diff from the non_cancer data frame by using age as the time-scale variable
Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence = subset(Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes, Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Incident_admission_T2D=='TRUE')

Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence <- Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence %>%
  mutate(Age_diff_first_incidence = pmin(Age_diff_0, Age_diff_1, Age_diff_2, Age_diff_3, na.rm = TRUE))

Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence = as.numeric(Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence)
Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence = Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence*365

#Merge the data frames together
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence[,c(1,21)], by='eid', all=T)

#Replace primary and PheCode NAs with the data from the non-cancer column
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df <- Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(combined_combined_time_diff = ifelse(!is.na(Age_diff_first_incidence),
                                     Age_diff_first_incidence,
                                     combined_time_diff))

#Subset data frame to remove any data entries less than 180 days - 2,071
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = subset(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$combined_combined_time_diff>180)
colnames(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df)[13] = "T2D_time_to_event"
export(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, 'Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df.csv')

#Create one data frame with all of the above outcomes
colnames(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df)[8] = 'Incident_admission_T2D'
T2D_df = merge(Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df[,c(1,2,6)], Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df[,c(1,3,8,10)], all=T)
T2D_df = merge(T2D_df, Incident_T2D_imaging_df[,c(1,7,9)], by='eid', all=T)
colnames(T2D_df)[c(6,8)] = c('Date_admission_incident_T2D', 'Date_imaging_incident_T2D')
T2D_df = merge(T2D_df, PheCode_dates[,c('eid', '250.2_date')], by='eid')

#Re-code the 'FALSE' and 'TRUE' data entries based on co-occurance of prevalent, admission-incident and imaging-incident cases
T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D[is.na(T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D)] <- FALSE
T2D_df$Incident_T2D[is.na(T2D_df$Incident_T2D)] <- FALSE
T2D_df <- T2D_df %>%
  mutate(Incident_T2D = ifelse(Prevalent_T2D == TRUE & Incident_T2D == FALSE, NA, Incident_T2D))
T2D_df$Incident_admission_T2D[is.na(T2D_df$Incident_admission_T2D)] <- FALSE
T2D_df <- T2D_df %>%
  mutate(Incident_admission_T2D = ifelse(Prevalent_T2D == TRUE & Incident_admission_T2D == FALSE, NA, Incident_admission_T2D))

count(T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D) #2989
count(T2D_df$Incident_admission_T2D) #2060
count(T2D_df$Incident_T2D) #639

export(T2D_df, 'T2D_df.csv')
```

Use Data-Field 130708 for first occurances - I do not have access to these data through OPTIMAT, but it would be great for future work to validate the current T2D ascertainment method against the UKB's ascertainment across similar data sources (i.e., primary care, hospital records etc) 
```{r}
#Load 
file_path <- "//cmvm.datastore.ed.ac.uk/cmvm/scs/groups/OPTIMAT/Sam_Sjostrom/ukb675209.csv"

# Define the selected columns
selected_columns <- c("eid", "130708-0.0", "130708")

# Read the CSV file using fread
T2D_first_occurance_df <- fread(file_path, select = selected_columns)
```


T2D targetted regressions

MV-Cox regressions with imaging-incident and admission-incident T2D
```{r}
#Imaging-incident - merge with updated 'T2D_df' to get the prevelant cases as 'NA' NOT FALSE! - Also remove any imaging date NAs - 2 found
PC2_imaging_incident_df = merge(Imp_PC2_regressions_df, T2D_df[,c(1:3,5:8)], by='eid')
PC2_imaging_incident_df =  PC2_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Imaging_date)) # removed 1 NA for imaging dates

#Censor date
max(na.omit(PC2_imaging_incident_df$Date_imaging_incident_T2D)) #2022-10-25
max(na.omit(PC2_imaging_incident_df$Date_admission_incident_T2D)) #2022-10-25
PC2_imaging_incident_df = PC2_imaging_incident_df %>% mutate(max_follow_up = as.Date('2022-10-26'))

#Get the admission dates for all participants
PC2_imaging_incident_df = merge(PC2_imaging_incident_df, ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[,c(1,2)], by='eid')
colnames(PC2_imaging_incident_df)[32] = 'Admission_date'

#Max follow-up time

#Imaging
PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_time_imaging_incident = PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_follow_up - PC2_imaging_incident_df$Imaging_date 
PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_time_imaging_incident = as.numeric(PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_time_imaging_incident)

#Admission
PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_time_admission_incident = PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_follow_up - PC2_imaging_incident_df$Admission_date 
PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_time_admission_incident = as.numeric(PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_time_admission_incident)


#T2D incidence time 

#Imaging
PC2_imaging_incident_df$T2D_time_to_event_imaging = PC2_imaging_incident_df$Date_imaging_incident_T2D-PC2_imaging_incident_df$Imaging_date
PC2_imaging_incident_df$T2D_time_to_event_imaging = as.numeric(PC2_imaging_incident_df$T2D_time_to_event_imaging)

#Replace max-time with time to T2D incidence for cases
PC2_imaging_incident_df <- PC2_imaging_incident_df %>%
  mutate(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor = ifelse(!is.na(T2D_time_to_event_imaging),
                                     T2D_time_to_event_imaging,
                                     max_time_imaging_incident))

PC2_imaging_incident_df$Imaging_incident_T2D_cox <- ifelse(PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_T2D, 2, 1)

#Admission
PC2_imaging_incident_df$T2D_time_to_event_admission = PC2_imaging_incident_df$Date_admission_incident_T2D-PC2_imaging_incident_df$Admission_date
PC2_imaging_incident_df$T2D_time_to_event_admission = as.numeric(PC2_imaging_incident_df$T2D_time_to_event_admission)

#Replace max-time with time to T2D incidence for cases
PC2_imaging_incident_df <- PC2_imaging_incident_df %>%
  mutate(T2D_TOE_admission_censor = ifelse(!is.na(T2D_time_to_event_admission),
                                     T2D_time_to_event_admission,
                                     max_time_admission_incident))

#!! re-code any accidental admission incident T2D cases that are prevalent
PC2_imaging_incident_df <- PC2_imaging_incident_df %>%
  mutate(
    T2D_time_to_event_admission = as.numeric(T2D_time_to_event_admission),
    Incident_admission_T2D = ifelse(
      !is.na(T2D_time_to_event_admission) & T2D_time_to_event_admission < 180,
      NA,  # set to NA when time-to-event < 180
      Incident_admission_T2D
    )
  )

PC2_imaging_incident_df$Admission_incident_T2D_cox <- ifelse(PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_admission_T2D, 2, 1)

#Last check to ensure that imaging and admission incident T2D are >6 months after imaging/admission 
min_time_true <- PC2_imaging_incident_df %>%
  filter(Incident_admission_T2D == TRUE) %>%
  pull(T2D_time_to_event_admission) %>%
  min(na.rm = TRUE)

min_time_true #183 and 182 for imaging-incident and admission-incident, respectively. 

#PC2 Model 1, 2, and 3 - matched covariate sample size: n(events/controls) = 441/38,278	(1643 prevalent cases excluded); 1,419/38.278 (665 prevalent cases excluded)
#Spine BMFF Model 1, 2, and 3 - matched covariate sample size: n(events/controls) = 	( prevalent cases excluded);  ( prevalent cases excluded)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df = PC2_imaging_incident_df
count(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_T2D)
count(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_admission_T2D)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_BC_PC1 = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC1)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_BC_PC2 = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$`PC2.y`)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_BC_PC3 = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC3)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_BC_PC4 = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC4)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_BC_PC5 = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC5)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_Total_BMD = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Total_BMD_first_second_imaging)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_TTFFMVi = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$TTFFMVi)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_VATi = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$VATi_first_second_imaging)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_BMI = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$BMI_first_second_imaging)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_Age = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Age)

export(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, 'MV_Cox_PC2_df.csv')
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df = MV_Cox_PC2_df
colnames(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df)[c(4:6,11,14,20:24)] = c("Age", "Sex", "BMI", "TTFFMVi", "Total_BMD", "BC_PC1", "BC_PC2", "BC_PC3", "BC_PC4", "BC_PC5")

export(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, 'MV_Cox_Spine_BMFF_df.csv')
Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df = MV_Cox_Spine_BMFF_df
colnames(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df)[c(4:6,11,14,20:24)] = c("Age", "Sex", "BMI", "TTFFMVi", "Total_BMD", "BC_PC1", "BC_PC2", "BC_PC3", "BC_PC4", "BC_PC5")

#+rt_BC_PC1+rt_BC_PC2+rt_BC_PC3+rt_BC_PC4+rt_BC_PC5+rt_TTFFMVi

#Model 1, 2 and 3 MV-cox
mv_fit <- coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~rt_PC2*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df)
mv_fit
summary(mv_fit)

#Forest plot
ggforest(mv_fit, data = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df)

#Diagnostics: plot the Beta against time to see if there are any clear and observable associations between time and the Beta for each covariate in the model Model 1 - Global Schoenfeld test: p=0.014, individual Schoenfeld test show that only BMI violates the proportional hazards assumption (Schoenfeld residuals), p=0.0052, however inspection of the beta (BMI) ~ time plot shows no distinct association with time
#Model 2 - Global Schoenfeld test: p=0.019, individual Schoenfeld test show that only BMI violates the proportional hazards assumption (Schoenfeld residuals), p=0.005, however inspection of the beta beta (BMI) ~ time plot shows no distinct association with time
#Model 3 - Global Schoenfeld test: p=0.112, individual Schoenfeld test show that BC_PC1 and TTFFMVi violate the proportional hazards assumption (Schoenfeld residuals), however inspection of the beta beta (BC_PC1 | TTFFMVi) ~ time plot shows no distinct association with time

#Proportional Hazards assumption
cz <- cox.zph(mv_fit)
print(cz)
ggcoxzph(cz)

#Influential data points
ggcoxdiagnostics(mv_fit, type = "dfbeta",
                 linear.predictions = FALSE, ggtheme = theme_bw(), se=FALSE) #For every continuous exposure variable 

ggcoxdiagnostics(mv_fit, type = "deviance",
                 linear.predictions = FALSE, col=Incident_T2D ,ggtheme = theme_bw()) #Summary plot for the whole model - colour according to T2D status below:

model.data = model.frame(mv_fit)
y = model.data[,1]
event <- y[, "status"] 
model.data$Imaging_incident_T2D_cox <- event
model.data$Incident_T2D <- factor(
  model.data$Imaging_incident_T2D_cox,
  levels = c(0, 1),
  labels = c("FALSE", "TRUE")
)

model.data$dev_resid <- residuals(mv_fit, type = "deviance")
model.data$beta_resid <- residuals(mv_fit, type = "dfbeta")
model.data$index <- seq_len(nrow(model.data))

ggplot(model.data, aes(index, dev_resid)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color = Incident_T2D), alpha = .5) +
  theme_bw()

#Linearity using RCS

# Packages
library(survival)
library(rms)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Start from your data frame
# Assumes PC2_T2D_cox_df has columns:
# time, Incident_T2D (0/1), rt_PC2, Age, BMI, Sex, Total_BMD (or similar)
# If names differ, adjust in the rename() below.

# 1) Clean, consistent columns and coding
PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df <- Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df[,c(36,37,39,40,3:6,11,14,20:24)] 
Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df <- Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df[,c(20,21,23:27,45,29:35)] 

#Sex-stratified
PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df = subset(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df, Sex=='F')
PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df = subset(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df, Sex=='M')

Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df = subset(Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df, Sex=='F')
Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df = subset(Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df, Sex=='M')

# 2) Set datadist for rms
dd <- datadist(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df)
options(datadist = "dd")

# 3) Define spline knots: DO NOT USE THIS FOR MANUSCRIPT/THESIS
#    - Boundary knots at the data min/max
#    - Interior knots at your tertiles
#bmff_min <- min(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df$rt_PC2, na.rm = TRUE)
#bmff_max <- max(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df$rt_PC2, na.rm = TRUE)
#bmff_knots <- c(bmff_min, -0.5436456, 1.242564, bmff_max) 

#OR: according to 10.1038/s41409-019-0679-x place the knots in regular intervals between the 5th and 95th percentiles: USE THIS FOR MANUSCRIPT/THESIS
bmff_knots <- quantile(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df$rt_PC2, c(.05, .25, .5, .75, .95), na.rm = TRUE)

# 4) Fit multivariable Cox model with RCS
#    Add/remove covariates as appropriate for your analysis plan
fit <- cph(
  Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ rcs(rt_PC2, parms = bmff_knots) + Age + BMI,
  data = PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df, x = TRUE, y = TRUE
)

#BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi

print(summary(fit))
print(anova(fit))

#PC2

#Imaging-incident

#Both:
#Model 1 = 0.448 
#Model 2 = 0.448
#Model 3 = 0.506 

#Sex-stratified
#F-model 1 = 0.187, model 2 = 0.181, model 3 = 0.153
#M-model 1 = 0.617, model 2 = 0.614, model 3 = 0.622

#Admission-incident

#Both:
#Model 1 = 0.2343
#Model 2 = 0.2784
#Model 3 = 0.7054

#Sex-stratified
#F-model 1 = 0.1352, model 2 = 0.2515, model 3 = 0.3226
#M-model 1 = 0.8539, model 2 = 0.8542, model 3 = 0.9996

#Spine BMFF

#Imaging-incident

#Both:
#Model 1 = 0.741
#Model 2 = 0.750
#Model 3 = 0.775

#Sex-stratified
#F-model 1 = 0.715, model 2 = 0.725, model 3 = 0.749
#M-model 1 = 0.749, model 2 = 0.765, model 3 = 0.786

#Admission-incident

#Both:
#Model 1 = 0.0093
#Model 2 = 0.050
#Model 3 = 0.3508

#Sex-stratified
#F-model 1 = 0.0762, model 2 = 0.1681 , model 3 = 0.3212
#M-model 1 = 0.2141, model 2 = 0.2278, model 3 = 0.3319


# 5) Get HR curve and 95% CI using rms::Predict - https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/rms/refman/rms.html#Predict ; boot-strapping is ignored since the original Cox models are not boot-strapped. 
pred <- Predict(fit, rt_PC2, ref.zero = FALSE, fun = exp, np=10000, boot.type="basic")
pred_df <- as.data.frame(pred)

pred_df_M <- pred_df %>%
  mutate(
    HR    = exp(yhat),
    HR_lo = exp(lower),
    HR_hi = exp(upper)
  )
pred_df_M$Sex='M'

pred_df_F <- pred_df %>%
  mutate(
    HR    = exp(yhat),
    HR_lo = exp(lower),
    HR_hi = exp(upper)
  )
pred_df_F$Sex='F'

pred_df = rbind(pred_df_M, pred_df_F)

ggplot(pred_df, aes(x = rt_PC2, y = HR, colour = factor(Sex))) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = HR_lo, ymax = HR_hi, fill = factor(Sex)),
              alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "PC2 (rank-normalized)",
    y = "Hazard Ratio (95% CI)",
    colour = "Sex",
    fill   = "Sex"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("M" = "#0075B2", "F" = "darkred"),
    labels = c("M" = "Male\np(non-linearity) = 0.854",
               "F" = "Female\np(non-linearity) = 0.135")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("M" = "#0075B2", "F" = "darkred"),
    labels = c("M" = "Male\np(non-linearity) = 0.854",
               "F" = "Female\np(non-linearity) = 0.135")
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.title  = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", lineheight = 0.8),
    legend.key.height = unit(2, "lines")
  )


#ROC curves to optimise the tertile thresholding based on the mv-cox models - run for imaging-incident and admission-incident separately

#Match length of response and predictor variables for imaging-incident and admission-incident separately - since any prevalent cases were re-coded as 'NA'

#Spine BMFF
adapted_Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Admission_incident_T2D_cox))

adapted_Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Imaging_incident_T2D_cox))

#PC2
adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Admission_incident_T2D_cox))

adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Imaging_incident_T2D_cox))

#Set the tertiles breaks to either -Inf or Inf or min or max of the exposure for the same result
min_exposure = min(adapted_Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$rt_BMFF)
max_exposure = max(adapted_Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$rt_BMFF)

# Define the function to calculate AUC for given thresholds
calculate_auc <- function(thresholds) {
  tertiles <- cut(
    adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_PC2,
    breaks = c(-Inf, thresholds, Inf),
    include.lowest = TRUE
  )
  # Fit the Cox model
  mv_fit <- coxph(
    Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ tertiles * Sex + Age,
    data = adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df
  )
  # Calculate the linear predictor
  lp <- predict(mv_fit, type = "lp")
  # Get ROC curve and AUC
  roc_curve <- roc(adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Admission_incident_T2D_cox, lp)
  auc(roc_curve)
}

# Select potential thresholds based on quantiles: use either 0.01/0.1 and 0.9/0.99 by=0.1 for slightly different thresholds but similar AUC --> I stuck to 0.1 and 0.9 since it took a bit less time to compute 
possible_thresholds <- quantile(adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_PC2, probs = seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.1))

best_auc <- 0
best_thresholds <- NULL

# Iterate over threshold combinations
for (t1 in possible_thresholds) {
  for (t2 in possible_thresholds) {
    if (t1 < t2) {
      current_auc <- calculate_auc(c(t1, t2))
      if (current_auc > best_auc) {
        best_auc <- current_auc
        best_thresholds <- c(t1, t2)
      }
    }
  }
}

cat("Best AUC:", best_auc, "with thresholds:", best_thresholds, "\n")

#Determine the best AUC for the thresholds - these are the same for all adjustment models for spine BMFF and PC2, hence use any of them (model 1 shown) - re-run without BMI for direct WHR tertile comparison

#PC2 admission incident: AUC=0.7727346; -0.0106823, 1.262787 
#PC2 imaging incident: AUC=0.76035; -0.5436456, 1.242564; AUC=0.6710972 with thresholds: -0.8610551 0.4976318 for no BMI

#Spine admission incident: AUC=0.7590104; 0.244955, 1.271262
#Spine imaging incident: AUC=0.75504; -0.5392428, 1.257695


cut_offs <- c(-Inf, -0.8610551, 0.4976318, Inf)

# Use the cut function to create tertiles
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC2_optimal_tertiles_no_BMI_imaging_incident <- cut(
  Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_PC2,
  breaks = cut_offs,
  include.lowest = TRUE,
  labels = c("T1", "T2", "T3")
)

export(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, 'MV_Cox_PC2_df.csv')
export(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, 'MV_Cox_Spine_BMFF_df.csv')

#Kaplan-Meier curve model for imaging-incident and admission-incident separately

#Imaging incident
KM_curve_imaging_incident_df = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_T2D))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident, data = KM_curve_imaging_incident_df)
km_fit
summary(km_fit)

mv_fit <- coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~rt_PC2*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df)
mv_fit
summary(mv_fit)

#Find last date of T2D diagnosis
test = subset(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox==2)

#Admission incident
KM_curve_imaging_incident_df = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_admission_T2D))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox)~PC2_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident, data = KM_curve_imaging_incident_df)
km_fit
summary(km_fit)

mv_fit <- coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox)~rt_PC2*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df)
mv_fit
summary(mv_fit)

#Find last date of T2D diagnosis
test = subset(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, Admission_incident_T2D_cox==2)

#Admission incident
KM_curve_imaging_incident_df = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$Incident_admission_T2D))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox)~Spine_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident, data = KM_curve_imaging_incident_df)
km_fit
summary(km_fit)

mv_fit <- coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox)~rt_BMFF*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df)
mv_fit
summary(mv_fit)

#Find last date of T2D diagnosis
test = subset(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, Admission_incident_T2D_cox==2)

#Imaging incident
KM_curve_imaging_incident_df = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$Incident_T2D))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident, data = KM_curve_imaging_incident_df)
km_fit
summary(km_fit)

mv_fit <- coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~rt_BMFF*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df)
mv_fit
summary(mv_fit)

#Find last date of T2D diagnosis
test = subset(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox==2)

#Get the cumulative event rates across all three tertiles: 

# 1) KM output
km_sum <- summary(km_fit)

# 2) Build data.frame of all KM steps
df_km <- data.frame(
  strata  = km_sum$strata,   #
  time    = km_sum$time,
  surv    = km_sum$surv,
  lower_s = km_sum$lower,
  upper_s = km_sum$upper
)

# 3) Take the last time-point for when T2D was recorded per tertile (end of follow‑up for that tertile)
event_rates <- df_km %>%
  group_by(strata) %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1) %>%       # one row per T1, T2, T3
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    tertile = sub(".*=", "", strata),       # T1 / T2 / T3
    event_rate_pct      = (1 - surv)    * 100,
    event_rate_lower_ci = (1 - upper_s) * 100,  # upper S → lower event
    event_rate_upper_ci = (1 - lower_s) * 100   # lower S → upper event
  ) %>%
  select(tertile, time, event_rate_pct, event_rate_lower_ci, event_rate_upper_ci)

#Spine
#Cumulative imaging-incident event rates for T1 = 1.563% (1.181%, 1.944%); T2 = 2.632% (2.013%, 3.246%); T3 = 3.525% (2.276%, 4.757%)
#Cumulative admission-incident event rates for T1 = 3.281% (2.511%, 4.046%); T2 = 4.492% (4.145%, 4.839%); T3 = 7.550% (6.350%, 8.734%)

#PC2
#Cumulative imaging-incident event rates for T1 = 1.574% (1.107%, 2.039%); T2 = 2.422% (1.758%, 3.080%); T3 = 3.914% (2.763%, 5.051%)
#Cumulative admission-incident event rates for T1 = 2.848% (2.502%, 3.192%); T2 = 4.499 (4.057%, 4.938%); T3 = 8.521% (7.532%, 9.450%)

max(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$T2D_TOE_admission_censor) #3100/3102 for spine and PC2, respectively (set xlim to 3103, ylim to 0.9475) for imaging incident; 6066 (set xlim to 6067, ylim to 0.90) for admission incident

  km_fit, 
  data = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df,
  xlab = "Days",

)

p$plot <- p$plot +

    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold"),
  )

p
```

Sex-stratified analyses and for-loop for supplementary tables 
```{r}
#Determine the optimal tertile thresholding for males and females separately

#PC2
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df_M = subset(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, Sex=='M')
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df_M = subset(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, Sex=='F')

#Spine
Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df_M = subset(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, Sex=='M')
Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df_M = subset(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, Sex=='F')

#Match length of response and predictor variables for imaging-incident and admission-incident separately - since any prevalent cases were re-coded as 'NA'

#Admission-incident
adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df_M %>%
  filter(!is.na(Admission_incident_T2D_cox))

adapted_Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df_M %>%
  filter(!is.na(Admission_incident_T2D_cox))

#Imaging-incident
adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df_M %>%
  filter(!is.na(Imaging_incident_T2D_cox))

adapted_Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df_M %>%
  filter(!is.na(Imaging_incident_T2D_cox))

# Define the function to calculate AUC for given thresholds - change between PC2 and and Spine data frames and exposures
calculate_auc <- function(thresholds) {
  tertiles <- cut(
    adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_PC2,
    breaks = c(-Inf, thresholds, Inf),
    include.lowest = TRUE
  )
  # Fit the Cox model
  mv_fit <- coxph(
    Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor,Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ tertiles + Age,
    data = adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df
  )
  # Calculate the linear predictor
  lp <- predict(mv_fit, type = "lp")
  # Get ROC curve and AUC
  roc_curve <- roc(adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Admission_incident_T2D_cox, lp)
  auc(roc_curve)
}

# Select potential thresholds based on quantiles: use either 0.01/0.1 and 0.9/0.99 by=0.1 for slightly different thresholds but similar AUC --> I stuck to 0.1 and 0.9 since it took a bit less time to compute 
possible_thresholds <- quantile(adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_PC2, probs = seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.1))

best_auc <- 0
best_thresholds <- NULL

# Iterate over threshold combinations
for (t1 in possible_thresholds) {
  for (t2 in possible_thresholds) {
    if (t1 < t2) {
      current_auc <- calculate_auc(c(t1, t2))
      if (current_auc > best_auc) {
        best_auc <- current_auc
        best_thresholds <- c(t1, t2)
      }
    }
  }
}

cat("Best AUC:", best_auc, "with thresholds:", best_thresholds, "\n")

#Determine the best AUC for the thresholds - these are the same for all adjustment models for spine BMFF and PC2, hence use any of them (model 1 shown) - re-run without BMI for WHR comparison (see code chunks on WHR further down)

#PC2 admission incident: Male: AUC= 0.723343 with thresholds: -0.7224048 0.2859591; AUC=0.6620802 with thresholds: -0.7224048 -0.004709717 for no BMI adjustment male; Female: AUC= 0.801814 with thresholds: 0.5530352 1.47736
#PC2 imaging incident: Male: AUC=0.7217124 with thresholds: -0.7412716 0.6802662; AUC=0.6288814 with thresholds: -0.7412716, 0.2613439 for no BMI adjustment male; Female: AUC=0.7717417 with thresholds: 0.5393633 1.064921

cut_offs <- c(-Inf, -0.7412716, 0.2613439, Inf)

# Create an empty factor column with desired levels
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_no_BMI_imaging_incident <- 
  factor(NA, levels = c("T1", "T2", "T3"))

# Logical index for males
idx_male <- Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Sex == "M"

# Assign tertiles only for males
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_no_BMI_imaging_incident[idx_male] <- cut(
  Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_PC2[idx_male],
  breaks = cut_offs,
  include.lowest = TRUE,
  labels = c("T1", "T2", "T3")
)

export(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, 'MV_Cox_PC2_df.csv')

#Spine admission incident: Male: AUC=0.7211237 with thresholds: -0.5152584 0.5331987; Female: AUC=0.7821997 with thresholds: -0.579208 1.03752; AUC=0.6298782 with thresholds: -0.2651101, 1.03752 for no BMI adjustment female
#Spine imaging incident: Male: AUC=0.7244997 with thresholds: -0.5300379 0.5093545; Female: AUC=0.7655692 with thresholds: -0.5848508 1.428819; 

cut_offs <- c(-Inf, -0.2651101, 1.03752, Inf)

# Create an empty factor column with desired levels
Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_no_BMI_imaging_incident <- 
  factor(NA, levels = c("T1", "T2", "T3"))

# Logical index for males
idx_male <- Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$Sex == "F"

# Assign tertiles only for males
Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_no_BMI_imaging_incident[idx_male] <- cut(
  Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$rt_BMFF[idx_male],
  breaks = cut_offs,
  include.lowest = TRUE,
  labels = c("T1", "T2", "T3")
)

export(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, 'MV_Cox_Spine_BMFF_df.csv')

#Set up a for-loop for all regressions below

#Imaging incident - replace 'Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df' with 'Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df' for PC2 and Spine, respectively, where the 'PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident' is replaced by 'Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident' for Spine
KM_curve_imaging_incident_df = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_T2D))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident, data = KM_curve_imaging_incident_df)
km_fit #Extract the 'n' and 'events' columns from the summary statistics and store in final table for corresponding group

KM_curve_imaging_incident_df = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_admission_T2D))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox)~PC2_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident, data = KM_curve_imaging_incident_df)
km_fit #Extract the 'n' and 'events' columns from the summary statistics and store in final table for corresponding group

#Change the adjustment model covariates: change 'rt_PC2' to 'rt_BMFF' and 'Total_BMD' to 'Spine_BMD' when using the 'Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df' data frame
#Model 1 = rt_PC2*Sex+Age+BMI
#Model 2 = rt_PC2*Sex+Age+BMI+Total_BMD
#Model 3 = rt_PC2*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi

#Normalised exposure
mv_fit <- coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~rt_PC2*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df)
mv_fit #Extract p-value for rt_PC2 and rt_BMFF for 'Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df' and 'Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df', respectively
summary(mv_fit) #Extract exp(coef), lower .95, upper .95 for rt_PC2 and rt_BMFF for 'Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df' and 'Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df', respectively

#Tertiles of exposure
mv_fit <- coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df)
mv_fit #Extract p-value for PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incidentT2 and PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incidentT3 and Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incidentT2 and Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incidentT3 for 'Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df' and 'Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df', respectively
summary(mv_fit) #Extract exp(coef), lower .95, upper .95 for PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incidentT2 and PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incidentT3 and Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incidentT2 and Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incidentT3 for 'Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df' and 'Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df', respectively

#Repeat the procedure above and store the results in the same data frame of summary statistics for sex-stratified analyses:

#Males: replace the 'M' with 'F' for the Female regressions:

#Imaging incident - replace 'Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df' with 'Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df' for the two main exposures, rt_PC2 and rt_BMFF, respectively
KM_curve_imaging_incident_df = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_T2D))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_imaging_incident, data = KM_curve_imaging_incident_df)
km_fit #Extract the 'n' and 'events' columns from the summary statistics and store in final table for corresponding group

#Change the adjustment model covariates: change 'rt_PC2' to 'rt_BMFF' and 'Total_BMD' to 'Spine_BMD' when using the 'Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df' data frame
#Model 1 = rt_PC2*Sex+Age+BMI
#Model 2 = rt_PC2*Sex+Age+BMI+Total_BMD
#Model 3 = rt_PC2*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi

#Normalised exposure
mv_fit <- subset(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, Sex=='M') %>% coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~rt_PC2+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=.)
mv_fit #Extract p-value for rt_PC2 and rt_BMFF for 'Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df' and 'Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df', respectively
summary(mv_fit) #Extract exp(coef), lower .95, upper .95 for rt_PC2 and rt_BMFF for 'Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df' and 'Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df', respectively

#Tertiles of exposure
mv_fit <- coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_imaging_incident+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df)
mv_fit #Extract p-value for PC2_optimal_tertiles_M__imaging_incidentT2 and PC2_optimal_tertiles_M__imaging_incidentT3 and Spine_optimal_tertiles_M__imaging_incidentT2 and Spine_optimal_M__tertiles_imaging_incidentT3 for 'Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df' and 'Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df', respectively
summary(mv_fit) #Extract exp(coef), lower .95, upper .95 for PC2_optimal_tertiles_M__imaging_incidentT2 and PC2_optimal_tertiles_M__imaging_incidentT3 and Spine_optimal_tertiles_M__imaging_incidentT2 and Spine_optimal_tertiles_M__imaging_incidentT3 for 'Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df' and 'Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df', respectively

#Count the number of cases and controls for spine BMFF and PC2 using the for-loop below:

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

##------------------------------------------------
## Helper function: count TRUE/FALSE per tertile
##------------------------------------------------
count_tertiles <- function(dat, tert_cols,
                           imaging_incident   = "Incident_T2D",
                           admission_incident = "Incident_admission_T2D") {

  results_list <- list()
  k <- 1L

  for (tc in tert_cols) {

    if (!tc %in% names(dat)) next

    # Decide which Incident variable to use: imaging vs admission
    incident_var <- if (grepl("admission", tc)) admission_incident else imaging_incident
    if (!incident_var %in% names(dat)) next

    tmp <- dat %>%
      # keep rows where tertile and relevant incident var are not NA
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[tc]]), !is.na(.data[[incident_var]])) %>%
      # group by tertile and incident TRUE/FALSE
      dplyr::group_by(
        tertile = .data[[tc]],
        Incident = .data[[incident_var]]
      ) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(n = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(
        names_from  = Incident,
        values_from = n,
        values_fill = 0
      )

    # Ensure both TRUE and FALSE columns exist, then rename
    if (!"FALSE" %in% names(tmp)) tmp$`FALSE` <- 0L
    if (!"TRUE"  %in% names(tmp))  tmp$`TRUE`  <- 0L

    tmp <- tmp %>%
      dplyr::rename(
        n_FALSE = `FALSE`,
        n_TRUE  = `TRUE`
      ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        tertile_var  = tc,
        incident_var = incident_var
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(tertile_var, incident_var, tertile, n_TRUE, n_FALSE)

    results_list[[k]] <- tmp
    k <- k + 1L
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(results_list)
}

##------------------------------------------------
## 1) PC2 tertiles in Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df
##------------------------------------------------

pc2_tert_cols <- c(
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_imaging_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_F_imaging_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_admission_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_F_admission_incident"
)

pc2_counts <- count_tertiles(
  dat       = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df,
  tert_cols = pc2_tert_cols,
  imaging_incident   = "Incident_T2D",
  admission_incident = "Incident_admission_T2D"
) %>%
  mutate(exposure = "PC2")

##------------------------------------------------
## 2) Spine tertiles in Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df
##------------------------------------------------

spine_tert_cols <- c(
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident",
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_M_imaging_incident",
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_imaging_incident",
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_M_admission_incident",
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_admission_incident"
)

spine_counts <- count_tertiles(
  dat       = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df,
  tert_cols = spine_tert_cols,
  imaging_incident   = "Incident_T2D",
  admission_incident = "Incident_admission_T2D"
) %>%
  mutate(exposure = "Spine")

##------------------------------------------------
## Combined table: PC2 + Spine
##------------------------------------------------
tertile_T2D_counts_all <- bind_rows(pc2_counts, spine_counts)

tertile_T2D_counts_all

#Count number of cases and controls for admission and imaging incident in males and females

# Input datasets
datasets <- list(
  PC2   = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df,
  Spine = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df
)

# Outcome variables to count
outcomes <- c("Incident_T2D", "Incident_admission_T2D")

# Sex strata to report
sexes <- c("F", "M", "Both")

results <- list()

idx <- 1
for (dname in names(datasets)) {
  df <- datasets[[dname]]
  
  for (outcome in outcomes) {
    for (sx in sexes) {
      df_sub <- df
      
      # Filter by sex unless "Both"
      if (sx != "Both") {
        df_sub <- df_sub %>% filter(Sex == sx)
      }
      
      # Keep rows with non-missing outcome
      df_sub <- df_sub %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[outcome]]))
      
      # Counts (cases = TRUE, controls = FALSE)
      cases <- sum(df_sub[[outcome]] == 'TRUE', na.rm = TRUE)
      controls <- sum(df_sub[[outcome]] == 'FALSE', na.rm = TRUE)
      total <- cases + controls
      
      results[[idx]] <- tibble(
        dataset = dname,
        outcome = outcome,
        sex = sx,
        cases = cases,
        controls = controls,
        total = total
      )
      idx <- idx + 1
    }
  }
}

counts_summary <- bind_rows(results)
counts_summary
```


For-loop across PC2 and spine BMFF and admission and imaging incident and both sexes and in males and females separately - plug the code above with minor modifications into GPT 5.1 as a prompt and the following is generated
```{r}
library(survival)
library(dplyr)

#----------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: extract Cox results for a set of terms
#----------------------------------------------------------
extract_terms <- function(fit, analysis_id, outcome_type, exposure_type,
                          sex_stratum, model_label, terms) {
  s  <- summary(fit)
  cf <- as.data.frame(s$coefficients)
  ci <- as.data.frame(s$conf.int)

  cf$term <- rownames(cf)

  out <- cf %>%
    dplyr::filter(term %in% terms) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      HR  = ci[term, "exp(coef)"],
      LCL = ci[term, "lower .95"],
      UCL = ci[term, "upper .95"],
      p   = `Pr(>|z|)`
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(term, HR, LCL, UCL, p)

  out$analysis_id   <- analysis_id
  out$outcome_type  <- outcome_type      # "imaging" / "admission"
  out$exposure_type <- exposure_type     # "PC2" / "Spine"
  out$sex_stratum   <- sex_stratum       # "All" / "M" / "F"
  out$model_label   <- model_label       # "Model1_cont", ...

  out[, c("analysis_id", "outcome_type", "exposure_type",
          "sex_stratum", "model_label", "term", "HR", "LCL", "UCL", "p")]
}

#==========================================================
# SPECS FOR IMAGING-INCIDENT AND ADMISSION-INCIDENT
#==========================================================

# Overall (all sexes)
overall_specs_imaging <- list(
  list(
    exposure_type = "PC2",
    df           = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df,
    cont_var     = "rt_PC2",
    tert_var     = "PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident",
    bmd_var      = "Total_BMD"
  ),
  list(
    exposure_type = "Spine",
    df           = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df,
    cont_var     = "rt_BMFF",
    tert_var     = "Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident",
    bmd_var      = "Spine_BMD"
  )
)

overall_specs_admission <- list(
  list(
    exposure_type = "PC2",
    df           = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df,
    cont_var     = "rt_PC2",
    tert_var     = "PC2_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
    bmd_var      = "Total_BMD"
  ),
  list(
    exposure_type = "Spine",
    df           = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df,
    cont_var     = "rt_BMFF",
    tert_var     = "Spine_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
    bmd_var      = "Spine_BMD"
  )
)

# Sex-stratified
sex_specs_imaging <- expand.grid(
  exposure_type = c("PC2", "Spine"),
  sex           = c("M", "F"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

sex_specs_admission <- sex_specs_imaging  # same structure

#==========================================================
# 1. IMAGING-INCIDENT ANALYSES
#==========================================================

##-------------------------------
## 1A. Overall (all sexes)
##-------------------------------
res_overall_cox_imaging <- list()

for (sp in overall_specs_imaging) {
  dat      <- sp$df
  exposure <- sp$exposure_type
  cont_x   <- sp$cont_var
  tert_x   <- sp$tert_var
  bmd_x    <- sp$bmd_var

  # Continuous – Model 1
  f_cont_m1 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + BMI",
      cont_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m1 <- coxph(f_cont_m1, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_imaging[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M1_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m1,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model1_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Continuous – Model 2
  f_cont_m2 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + BMI + %s",
      cont_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m2 <- coxph(f_cont_m2, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_imaging[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M2_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m2,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model2_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Continuous – Model 3
  f_cont_m3 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + %s +
       BC_PC1 + BC_PC2 + BC_PC3 + BC_PC4 + BC_PC5 + TTFFMVi",
      cont_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m3 <- coxph(f_cont_m3, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_imaging[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M3_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m3,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model3_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 1
  f_tert_m1 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + BMI",
      tert_x
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m1 <- coxph(f_tert_m1, data = dat)
  term_T2 <- paste0(tert_x, "T2")
  term_T3 <- paste0(tert_x, "T3")

  res_overall_cox_imaging[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M1_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m1,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model1_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2, term_T3)
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 2
  f_tert_m2 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + BMI + %s",
```
